programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Hunter Johnson vs Yates Johnson
programme.desc: Experience the thrilling showdown at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships as twin brothers Hunter Johnson and Yates Johnson face off for the very first time in the men's pro singles gold medal match. Both top seeds with years of experience playing doubles together, these brothers bring a unique dynamic filled with expert strategy, rapid exchanges, and emotional rivalry. From early leads and tactical shot-making to late-game drama and camaraderie, watch Hunter and Yates battle it out point by point in a historic and captivating final. Featuring expert commentary and insights into their playing styles, this match is a must-watch for pickleball fans everywhere.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA) - NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU
programme.desc: Welcome to Week 3, Day 1 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025, live from the Barnes Tennis Center in the heart of San Diego, California. This highly anticipated state rivalry pits the UCLA Bruins against the SDSU Aztecs in a crucial best-of-seven collegiate team match.The match format prioritizes singles, with UCLA winning the coin toss and opting to start with Women's Singles. The broadcast features the Women's Singles match between Mae Lee (UCLA) and Emily Miller (SDSU), and the Men's Singles where SDSU's Preston Lynch takes a commanding early lead. The match also includes Gender Doubles, where SDSU (the Aztecs) took an early 3-0 lead in the overall match score. The winner of this pool play match gains a strong position for seeding, moving closer to securing one of the National Championship bids.

Witness an elite tactical battle in women's doubles as Clemson’s Fiorella Busetto and Seeley Feldman showcase their trademark gritty defensive play against the explosive "difference maker" energy of UVA’s Vivian No and Laura Lee Sing Sang. Set in the high-pressure atmosphere of Performance Pickleball RVA, the match tests Clemson's mental fortitude as they attempt a signature come-from-behind charge against a dominant Virginia start. With both squads already securing their bids to Nationals, this showdown is a pure battle for regional pride and championship hardware.

From high-velocity "scary" 15-minute singles sprints to intense mixed doubles rallies, every point contributes to the prestigious Band of Honor leaderboard. programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 - US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault
programme.desc: The match features the second-seeded team of Anna Leigh Waters, the world's number one ranked women's player and a Triple Crown winner, and Andre Agassi, an eight-time Grand Slam tennis champion making his pro pickleball debut. They face the young team of Stevie Petruleas (13 years old) and Tristan Dassault (16 years old), who are playing in only their third tournament together and are looking to make their mark against the seasoned pros. The match highlights key plays, including Agassi's powerful two-handed backhand and Waters' quickness at the kitchen line, and showcases the dynamic between these experienced and rising stars in the sport.

programme.title: European Pickleball Championship - Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik

Witness Team England secure the gold medal in the inaugural singles event of the championships.

The stakes are incredibly high as teams battle for the final semi-final spots.The action starts with the First Mixed Doubles match, featuring Chennai's coach, the legendary pro Joey Farias, teaming up with Anna Clarice. They face the formidable duo of Delhi's Willie Chung and Lauren Mercado. The match is a tactical masterclass, with Willie Chung noted for his consistent, pro-level reset game and Farias praised for his on-court intelligence.

programme.title: Picklebowl 2023 - Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles – Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe
programme.desc: Dylan Frazier and Ritchie Tuazon meet Irina Tereschenko and Connor Pardoe in a high-stakes mixed doubles match at Picklebowl 2023. Set against the backdrop of this annual charity event, the match features four seasoned competitors known for their precision, quick reflexes, and court awareness. Expect fast-paced exchanges, smart teamwork, and big momentum swings as both teams battle for bragging rights and a good cause. Blending professional play with the spirited energy of Picklebowl, this match is a crowd favorite you won’t want to miss.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal 2

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 - US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara
programme.desc: Experience the excitement of the Mixed Split Pro Age pickleball match on Championship Court. This video features a unique pairing of new partners Schull and Endara, who are familiar with the heat and come from a grinding three-game win in their last match. They face off against the formidable Lee Whitwell and Kafka. With Lee Whitwell's impressive hands and athleticism, and Kafka's hard-hitting forehand and topspin drives, this is a matchup you won't want to miss. Get ready for incredible rallies and a display of top-tier pickleball as these pros battle it out.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA) - NCPA 2026 Semifinal - Utah Tech vs. Florida Atlantic University
programme.desc: The atmosphere at the Arch Pickleball Center in Saint Louis reaches a fever pitch as the Utah Tech Trailblazers face off against the FAU Owls in a high-stakes semifinal showdown. This match showcases a "racing" intensity as Liam Duffin looks to maintain Utah Tech's momentum following their grueling victory over Colorado. Fans are treated to the technical "skills" and "freestyle" shot-making of Alex LaMacchia, whose crafty drop shots and highlight-reel volleys keep the score neck and neck throughout the opening game. With a spot in the National Championship on the line, both squads must navigate high-pressure video challenges and tactical timeouts in a match many spectators believe is worthy of the final itself.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2
programme.desc: Experience the electric intensity of the "Maharashtra derby" as local rivals Pune United and Mumbai Pickle Power clash at the Jio World Garden in a match hailed as one of the season's best. Mumbai ignites the home crowd with a dominant early lead, fueled by Jada Bui’s emotional victory over a "fearful" Katie Morris and a clinical masterclass from Brandon and Glauca Carvajal Lane in mixed doubles. However, the tide turns in a dramatic "tale of two halves" as Pune United mounts a stunning comeback. Witness the high-power precision of Bolin Bako as he derails Max Green’s momentum, sparking a relentless surge that sees Pune sweep the final three matches to snatch victory from the jaws of defeat. This tie is a masterclass in team resilience and tactical pressure under the lights in Mumbai.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2
programme.desc: The action continues on Day 2 of the World Pickleball League (WPL) with the highly anticipated second matchup: Delhi takes on Mumbai Pickle Power at the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai.This matchup features a spectacular lineup, including Delhi's players Alexa Schule, Eduardo Irizarry, and Willie Chung, against a strong Mumbai squad that includes Brandon Lane, Glauca Lane, and Kim Ngo.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 - US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Fliegelman/Braverman vs. Bar/Cote
programme.desc: Watch an exciting Mixed Split Pro Age match featuring the team of Scott Fliegelman and Jillian Braverman against Susannah Barr and Patrick Cote. Scott Fliegelman is a top-10 ranked Senior Pro and co-founder of Boulder Pickleball. His partner, Jillian Braverman, is a well-known professional pickleball player. They face the team of Susannah Barr and Patrick Cote, a pickleball pro and trainer. This match showcases high-level gameplay between four skilled pros.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Delhi - Day 4 Tie 2
programme.desc: The World Pickleball League Season 2 returns to the Jio World Garden in Mumbai for an electrifying Tie 8 showdown. The defending champions, Bengaluru Jawans—led by coach Oliver Strecker and backed by owners Atlee and Priya—return to the court for the first time since their dominant opening night performance. They face a determined Delhi Dilwale squad, coached by Wesley Gabrielsson, who are looking to climb the standings after a hard-fought tie-break victory in their previous outing.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Hyderabad - Day 9 Semifinal 1
programme.desc: It's Semi-Final Time on Day 9 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL)! This highly anticipated clash pits the Bengaluru Jawans, who finished top of the table (number one seed), against the Hyderabad Superstars, who narrowly snuck into the semi-finals (number four seed) after winning two matches the previous night. This is a classic 1 vs. 4 match-up, with the winner stamping their ticket to Championship Sunday.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 - US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta
programme.desc: Welcome back to the 2025 Minto US Open Pickleball Championships for the Men's Pro Doubles semifinal match. This is a great representation of the sport's global growth, with the top-ranked player from India competing. The match features teams Munro and Yang against Bhatia and Mehta. The match is tightly contested, with the level of play stepping up as they enter the semi-finals. The caption file also notes that Bhatia's grandfather was a world-renowned cricketer in India with the nickname "the Sultan of Swing," which is comparable to an NFL star like Tom Brady.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA) - NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Penn State vs. Liberty
programme.desc: Live from Virginia Beach, this Round of 16 matchup from the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 features Penn State battling Liberty University for a spot in the quarterfinals. With a bid to the National Championship on the line, the stakes are incredibly high in this win-or-go-home match.The contest goes the distance, pushing both teams to their limits. After splitting the initial six games 3-3, the match culminates in a dramatic Sudden Death Dreambreaker (Game 7). Watch standout performances from Liberty's John McCutcheon and Anneliese Brielle, who fight to keep their team alive, and Penn State's Caitlin Hartman and Theodore De Sousa, who deliver clutch plays under pressure.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 - US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles - Valdes/Gabrielsen vs. Barr/Lane

programme.desc: The stakes are sky-high in this Mixed Senior Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships. Beth Bellamy and Rick Witsken team up with power and precision as they face off against the dynamic duo of Eva Welsher and Altaf Merchant. With each rally more intense than the last, the match showcases expert-level shot placement, quick hands at the kitchen, and the emotional highs and lows of championship pickleball.From thrilling volleys to strategic momentum shifts, this final clash is a must-watch for fans of senior pro competition. Watch as tempers flare, crowds roar, and legends battle for the ultimate title in Naples, Florida.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Rajasthan - Day 8 Tie 1
programme.desc: The atmosphere at Mumbai's Jio World Garden is electric as the host team, Mumbai Pickle Power, rides the momentum of their first season victory into a high-stakes clash against the Rajasthan Titans. With Rajasthan still hunting for their elusive first win of the season, the pressure is at a breaking point for both squads as they fight to climb the "Band of Honor" leaderboard. Witness tactical masterclasses as veteran Lorena Dupnik faces off against Jada Bui in a strategic battle of precision, and feel the intensity of the men's singles where superstars like Brandon Lane and Jack Foster showcase explosive athleticism. From game-changing "Pickle Plays" to high-stakes challenges and the presence of celebrity guests like Rishabh Pant, every rally in this tie is a desperate fight for survival on the road to the semifinals.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing | Party Boat El Dorado Takes on Cortez Bank
programme.desc: Fishing out west has been fantastic this year, but eventually, the fish move or disappear due to currents, weather, or heavy traffic. However, there are always some offshore banks that have resident fish on or around them year-round, and one of those spots is called the Cortez Bank. You can always guarantee one thing: if you make it 110 miles, you'll catch some big Rockfish. Additionally, if Mother Nature and currents work out in your favor, there can be some incredible Yellowtail fishing on the bank. Today, we're rallying up for our "Stoked On Fishing" day and a half charter on board the one and only El Dorado, a top vessel in the Long Beach sport fishing scene. With anticipation running high, we can't wait to cast our lines and see what kind of adventures await us on the open waters.

Whether it’s offshore, inshore, freshwater, or somewhere off the beaten path, every episode brings you along for the adventure — with real anglers, real conditions, and no scripted nonsense.

programme.title: FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte
programme.desc: In this exciting episode of FishON!, we hit the legendary Bay of Quinte with none other than Dicki (Richard Sommerville), the ice fishing legend himself. With years of experience and a knack for finding trophy walleye, Dicki helps us navigate the ever-changing ice conditions and put our gear to the test. From early morning setups to heart-pounding battles with giant Quinte gold, this episode is packed with action, expert tips, and stunning winter scenery. Don't miss the ultimate ice fishing adventure!

programme.title: FishON! | Trailblazing to Trophy Walleye: Polaris Ranger Adventure
programme.desc: Join the FishON! TV crew as we tackle rugged Northern Ontario terrain with our Polaris Ranger equipped with a custom boat rack. This remote expedition takes us deep into the wilderness to an untouched lake known for its walleye bounty. From the adrenaline of the journey to the thrill of the catch, this episode is packed with adventure, stunning scenery, and fishing tips you won’t want to miss!

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing - Bluefin Fishing on the El Dorado
programme.desc: Over the last few years, we have been hosting sponsored fishing charters on the El Dorad, out of Long Beach Sport Fishing. Due to Covid 19, the sport boats have new guidelines to follow and only offer limited guests. This turns out to be a massive benefit to the passengers because they have more space for Fishing. On this adventure, we fish on the El Dorado for the first time since the pandemic began and have a blast.

programme.title: FishON | Spring Thaw on Frederick House Lake
programme.desc: Paul, Perry, and Dan head east of Timmins to the historic waters of Frederick House Lake for a late-season ice adventure under warm, spring-like skies. What starts as a perfect day on the hardwater quickly turns into a multispecies showcase—pike, perch, walleye, and sauger all keep the crew busy as the bite fires up. But as Northern Ontario weather often reminds us, conditions shift fast. With the wind picking up and clouds rolling in, the team wraps up an incredible day and makes their way home, grateful for one more memorable outing before the thaw.

This episode highlights the thrill of angling in Northern Ontario's untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Ice Off Trout
programme.desc: Jarrett and his guest Beau Meyer head to 10,000 feet elevation to catch some ice out Colorado trout. Its freezing but the fishing is hot!

programme.title: Hook 'n Look — Hunger is the Best Pickle
programme.desc: South Dakota’s scenic Lake Oahe sets the stage for this week’s episode. Although well known as a walleye fishery, Kim and Cheyenne Ridge Signature Lodge, General Manager, Sean Finley reveal the under-utilized fishery within the overpopulation of smallmouth bass and respectable northern pike. Strike King’s Dream Shot Worm is the featured lure.

programme.title: Hook 'n Look — Right Under Your Nose
programme.desc: Kim demonstrates the virtues of a Strike King KVD "Deep" 1.5 Crankbait along weed edges. Once the bass are located, he follows up with a Swinging Swim Jig. As customary, he provides visual confirmation of the pattern from the lake bottom.

programme.title: Summer Fishing Gear and Rigs
programme.desc: With warmer waters and deeper fish, we demonstrate how to set up for hauling in those trophy fish.

programme.title: Hank Parker Outdoors: Fishing for stripers on Lake Murray
programme.desc: Hank is headed to SC to spend a day with some of his favorites young pals at The Boy's Farm in Newberry. Hank & the boys target stripers on beautiful Lake Murray.

programme.title: Hank Parker Outdoors: Making dreams a reality
programme.desc: Kids with life-threatenting illnesses are in need of help & hope. Today Hank shares his boat with Outdoor Dream Foundation.

programme.title: Hank Parker Fishing - Alabama Challenge
programme.desc: Hank shares the water with some youth bass anglers. He teaches the anglers how to read and fish new water.

programme.title: Hank Parker Fishing - Lake Monticello
programme.desc: Hank Parker goes after the fish on Lake Monticello with friend Bobby Williams.

programme.title: Hank Parker Fishing - Grosse Savanne Bass Fishing

programme.title: Hank Parker Outdoors: Big Bass at Rockhouse Farms
programme.desc: Hank and close friend/business partner, Keith Kelly return to Hank's premiere signature lake.

programme.title: Hank Parker Outdoors: 'Pitching' for bass
programme.desc: Fom South Carolina to Texas, today's show covers 1,500 miles of bass fishing & baseball fun. Hank's grandson pitcher, Alec takes a break from sports camp to join "pawpaw."

programme.title: Hank Parker Outdoors: 'Pitching' for bass
programme.desc: Fom South Carolina to Texas, today's show covers 1,500 miles of bass fishing & baseball fun. Hank's grandson pitcher, Alec takes a break from sports camp to join "pawpaw."

programme.title: Hank Parker: High School Bassin'
programme.desc: Hank sets out with two next-generation fishermen... high schoolers with a hunger for the outdoors. He shares his tricks of the trade as he & his young friends land some big bass using a variety baits.

programme.title: Hank Parker Fishing - Lake Hartwell
programme.desc: Hank Parker spends a day on Lake Hartwell chasing after the fish and sharing his boat with Outdoor Dream Foundation friends.

programme.title: FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake
programme.desc: Season 8 Episode 3 kicks off our first open-water shoot of the year as Paul Ethier and Jeff Shippam make their way to the legendary Mattagami Lake for some classic spring walleye action. With competitive tournaments on pause this season, the guys revisit their favourite early-season hotspots—areas they’d normally fish under pressure—now with time to explore, adapt, and enjoy the day. From structure-hopping to dialing in the spring pattern, Paul and Jeff put their tournament instincts to work for a fun, relaxed day chasing hungry post-spawn walleye in Northern Ontario.

programme.title: FishON! | Spring on the Ivanhoe: Post-Spawn Walleye Adventures
programme.desc: In Episode 3, we navigate the serene waters of the Ivanhoe River, embracing the beauty of spring as we target post-spawn walleye. With rods in hand, we explore the river's productive fishing spots, uncovering the best techniques and tips for a successful catch in this transitional season. From scenic backdrops to thrilling strikes, this episode captures the essence of spring fishing at its finest.

programme.title: Lindner's Angling Edge | Panfishing Today
programme.desc: Al Lindner and Jake Wallace target summertime crappies in the weeds using Big Bite Baits Lindner� Panfish Special and Rapala Countdown Elite crankbaits.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom - Coast Guard Veteran Brad Peterson

Today, we head out into the Gulf of Mexico to take Brad on his first saltwater fishing trip.

programme.title: Angling Edge - Fishing Techniques for the Dog Days of Summer
programme.desc: On this week's show, we're gonna be talking about some timely fishing techniques for fishing in the heat of summer. It's late July and fishing is very good for a variety of different species all across the Upper Midwest. We're gonna share with you some great tactics for walleye, largemouth bass, smallmouth bass and muskie, with special guests Brian Brosdahl, James Lindner and Jeremy Smith.

programme.title: FishON! | Northern Adventures: Mid-Summer Walleye Quest with Cameron Racine from Mercury Canada
programme.desc: Join us on an exhilarating journey deep into the heart of Northern Ontario as we tackle mid-summer walleye fishing like never before! Guided by the rising sun, we gear up with our Polaris Ranger to access a remote lake for a day filled with fishing action and good times. Joining the adventure is Mercury Canada Marketing Manager Cameron Racine, adding expertise and excitement to this unforgettable outing. Don't miss the fun, the fish, and the breathtaking scenery!

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 107 Rotterdam
programme.desc: GLORY welterweight world champion Chico Kwasi (45-6-2, 23 KO) will step up in weight to challenge GLORY middleweight world champion Donovan Wisse (23-1, 10 KO) in the main event of GLORY 107. In the co-main event, giants Tariq ‘Cookie’ Osaro (30-5-1, 17 KO) and Nico ‘Big Sexy’ Horta (26-11, 4 KO) will square off in a highly anticipated rematch.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 108: Last FW Standing Finals
programme.desc: What began with twenty-four of the world’s top featherweights is now down to the final four as they battle in a one-night tournament to crown the Last Featherweight Standing.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - COLLISION 9
programme.desc: GLORY heavyweight world champion Mory Kromah (37-3-1, 21 KO) defends his title against Serbian sensation Milos Cvjeticanin (19-5, 10 KO), Croatian superstar Antonio Plazibat (23-5, 16 KO) faces Belgian Moroccan Anis Bouzid (49-5, 37 KO) and the GLORY light heavyweight grand prix plays out in full, deciding the next GLORY light heavyweight world champion.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 107 Rotterdam
programme.desc: GLORY welterweight world champion Chico Kwasi (45-6-2, 23 KO) will step up in weight to challenge GLORY middleweight world champion Donovan Wisse (23-1, 10 KO) in the main event of GLORY 107. In the co-main event, giants Tariq ‘Cookie’ Osaro (30-5-1, 17 KO) and Nico ‘Big Sexy’ Horta (26-11, 4 KO) will square off in a highly anticipated rematch.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - COLLISION 9
programme.desc: GLORY heavyweight world champion Mory Kromah (37-3-1, 21 KO) defends his title against Serbian sensation Milos Cvjeticanin (19-5, 10 KO), Croatian superstar Antonio Plazibat (23-5, 16 KO) faces Belgian Moroccan Anis Bouzid (49-5, 37 KO) and the GLORY light heavyweight grand prix plays out in full, deciding the next GLORY light heavyweight world champion.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 103 Rotterdam LHS
programme.desc: GLORY 103: Last Heavyweight Standing main event features Levi Rigters (19-3, 9 KO) colliding with Jamal Ben Saddik (38-10, 29 KO) to see who moves on in the tournament. Among the other names taking part in Phase Two are Nabil Khachab (29-6-1, 4 KO), Iancu Ionut (31-11, 13 KO), Rade Opacic (21-7, 16 KO), Milos Cvjeticanin (13-4, 9 KO), Sofian Laidouni (39-5-1, 20 KO), and many more. In addition, Chico Kwasi (44-5-2, 23 KO) will defend his GLORY welterweight world title against Mehdi Ait El Hadj (35-4-2, 8 KO), Mory Kromah (34-3-1, 20 KO) returns and takes on Cristian Ristea (44-26, 13 KO) in a heavyweight match-up outside the tournament, and Tayfun Ozcan (88-11-3, 28 KO) clashes with rival Don Sno (6-2, 3 KO).

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 104 Rotterdam
programme.desc: Former Light Heavyweight Champion Tarik Khbabez (52-12-1, 22 KO) and Bahram Rajabzabeh (72-5, 63 KO) collide in a huge showdown for the vacant Light Heavyweight title. The penultimate round of the Last Heavyweight Standing tournament resumes with eight heavyweights competing in two separate four-man one-night tournaments. Notable participants include Levi Rigters (20-3, 10 KO), Nabil Khachab (30-6-1, 4 KO), Rade Opacic (22-7, 17 KO) and Milos Cvjeticanin (14-4, 9 KO).

programme.desc: GLORY 100 features four GLORY world title bouts, four separate four-man one-night tournaments to determine who qualifies for the Last Heavyweight Standing finals, and several key matchups involving some of GLORY’s most popular fighters.

programme.title: K1 - K1 World Grand Prix: Final 14, Osaka, 2003
programme.desc: K-1 World Grand Prix 2003 Final Elimination was a kickboxing event promoted by the K-1 organization. The event was held at the Osaka Dome in Osaka, Japan on Saturday, October 11, 2003 in front of 31,700 spectators. It was the final elimination competition for the K-1 World Grand Prix 2003, involving fourteen fighters from across the world, with all bouts being fought under K-1 Rules (100 kg/156-220 lbs). The fourteen fighters were a mixture of invitees or had qualified via previous events.

programme.title: K1 - K1 World Grand Prix: Finals, Tokyo, 2003
programme.desc: K-1 World Grand Prix 2003 Final was a kickboxing event promoted by the K-1 organization. The event was held at the Tokyo Dome in Tokyo, Japan on Saturday, December 6, 2003 in front of 67,320 spectators. It was the eleventh K-1 World Grand Prix final involving ten of the world's best fighters (two being reservists). The eight finalists had almost all qualified via preliminary events, while two additional fighters were invited as reserve fighters (for more detail on this see bulleted list below), with all bouts being fought under K-1 Rules (100 kg/156-220 lbs).

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY Heavyweight Grand Prix 2024
programme.desc: 3 wins to come out on top, who's it going to be? Rico Verhoeven, Levi Rigters, Tarik Osaro, Benjamin Adegbuyi, Sofian Laidouni, Uku Jurjendal, Bahram Rajabzadeh, and Nabil Khachab pair up and throw down for the GLORY Heavyweight Grand Prix, an 8-man 1-night heavyweight tournament for the ages.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 91 Paris
programme.desc: The GLORY welterweight title will be on the line in the main event as the reigning & defending champion Endy Semeleer (35-1, 17 KO) welcomes the challenge of top contender Chico Kwasi (42-5, 22 KO). In the co-main event, after his crazy GLORY Heavyweight Grand Prix performance, the wild & exciting Bahram Rajabzadeh (66-2, 58 KO) steps down to light heavyweight and meets the hard-hitting Paris-based Kevin Oumar (33-4, 7 KO), a French kickboxing champion & budding MMA star. Belgian-Moroccan superstar Youssef Boughanem (187-43-8, 119 KO) steps into the GLORY ring for the very first time in his illustrious career as he meets the Ukraine’s Stanislav Kazantsev (25-8-1, 7 KO). The best of French kickboxing will be on display throughout the rest of the card as a host of the nation’s top stars will be in action against opponents from all over the world.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 96 Rotterdam
programme.desc: A Champ vs. Champ superfight takes place in the main event as GLORY welterweight world champion Chico Kwasi (43-5, 23 KO) puts his title on the line against GLORY lightweight world champ Tyjani Beztati (27-4, 9 KO). In the co-main event, Donovan Wisse (21-1, 10 KO) aims to defend his GLORY middleweight world championship for a fifth time when he welcomes the challenge of top German Sergej Braun (44-13, 27 KO).

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - COLLISION 7
programme.desc: In the main event, ‘The King of Kickboxing’ Rico Verhoeven put his GLORY world heavyweight title on the line against number one contender ‘The Prince’ Levi Rigters in a hotly anticipated rematch from their GLORY Grand Prix final earlier this year. GLORY light heavyweight world champion Tarik Khbabez will collide with Donegi Abena in a trilogy fight to end their heated rivalry in the co-main event.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY Light Heavyweight Grand Prix 2024
programme.desc: The eight-man one-night GLORY Light Heavyweight Grand Prix will crown the baddest light heavyweight striker on the planet. The eight participants are: GLORY champion, #C Tarik Khbabez (58-10-1, 28 KO), Morocco. Former champion, #1 Donegi Abena (27-10, 7 KO), Suriname. Former champion, #2 Sergej Maslobojev (38-6, 23 KO), Lithuania. Undefeated in GLORY, #3 Stefan Latescu (17-2, 8 KO), Romania. ‘Mister Cool’ #4 Ibrahim El Bouni (41-9-1, 22 KO), Morocco. The wild & unpredictable, #5 Bahram Rajabzadeh (67-2, 59 KO), Azerbaijan. Top French light heavyweight, #6 Pascal Toure (20-6, 7 KO), France. Veteran fighter, #7 Bogdan Stoica (58-14, 40 KO), Romania.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 33 SuperFight Series
programme.desc: The GLORY 33 SuperFight Series features a middleweight title fight between champion SImon Marcus and top ranked challenger Jason Wilnis. Plus a heavyweight battle between Chi Lewis Parry and Anthony McDonald.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 36 Oberhausen
programme.desc: The Lightweight title is on the line as Sittichai looks to defend his title against #1 challenger Marat Grigorian. There is also a four-man lightweight tournament on the card.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 39 SuperFight Series
programme.desc: The GLORY 39 Superfight Series is headlined by a Lightweight title fight as champion Sittichai defends his crown against Dylan Salvador.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 26 Amsterdam
programme.desc: This event featured world title fight for the Glory Middleweight Championship between Artem Levin and Simon Marcus as headliner. Also this event featured 4-Man Middleweight Contender Tournament to earn a title shot for the Glory Middleweight Championship.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 29 Copenhagen
programme.desc: This event featured world title fight for the Glory Welterweight Championship between Nieky Holzken and Yoann Kongolo as headliner, and 4-Man Heavyweight Contender Tournament to earn a title shot for the Glory Heavyweight Championship.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 79 Arnhem
programme.desc: Serkan Ozcaglayan makes his GLORY premiere, a battle of the best Featherweights in the division and Nabiev takes on Troy Jones in the Welterweight division.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 77
programme.desc: 6 Champions, 3 Title Fights, 1 Special Night. The main event features a four man heavyweight tournament including Glory heavyweight champion Rico Verhoeven, as well as Hesdy Gerges, Levi Rigters and Tarik Khbabez.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 59 Amsterdam
programme.desc: GLORY Kickboxing’s Summer of GLORY concluded with a massive event from the Johan Cruijff Arena in Amsterdam. In the night’s headliner, heavyweight champion Rico Verhoeven took on Brazilian challenger Guto Inocente. Verhoeven had defended his belt seven straight times since capturing the title in 2014. His winning streak inside the GLORY ring stood at 16. Inocente looked to dethrone the world’s top-ranked heavyweight riding the momentum of wins over Benjamin Adegbuyi, D’Angelo Marshall and Hesdy Gerges. Gold was also on the line in the co-main event, as longtime featherweight titleholder Robin van Roosmalen rematched interim champion Petchpanomrung Kiatmookao. The pair met previously at GLORY 41 — also in van Roosmalen’s home country of Holland — with the Dutchman taking home a controversial, majority-decision victory.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 40 Copenhagen
programme.desc: Jason 'Psycho' Wilnis puts his belt back on the line against the man he took it from in 2016: Canada's Simon 'The ONE' Marcus.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 75 Utrecht
programme.desc: World featherweight champion Petchpanomrung (163-36-3, 27 KO’s) headlines the card, traveling from Bangkok, Thailand to defend his title belt against former champion Serhii Adamchuk (40-11, 15 KO’s), from Ukraine but fighting out of Mike’s Gym in Amsterdam.

programme.title: 52 Super Series
programme.desc: Established as the world's leading grand prix for monohull yacht, the 52 Super Series is a yacht racing circuit like no other. The circuit grew from the ashes of the TP52 MedCup that finished in 2011 in an initiative by three key stakeholders who enjoyed this race so much they wanted to keep it alive. The 52 Super Series embraces like-minded individuals and crews in venues and locations enjoyed by all. This is a series for the best. From Olympic medallists to America's Cup victors, the dockside is filled with talent. Watch the racing circuit that has yachts speed well over 20 knots and representing sailors from over 20 different nationalities in this sustainable event that has competitors race on a simple first-past-the-post format. Here real time racing is all that matters, as there is no post-race time compensation, making the 52 Super Series the best monohull racing in the world.

programme.title: 52 Super Series
programme.desc: Established as the world's leading grand prix for monohull yacht, the 52 Super Series is a yacht racing circuit like no other. The circuit grew from the ashes of the TP52 MedCup that finished in 2011 in an initiative by three key stakeholders who enjoyed this race so much they wanted to keep it alive. The 52 Super Series embraces like-minded individuals and crews in venues and locations enjoyed by all. This is a series for the best. From Olympic medallists to America's Cup victors, the dockside is filled with talent. Watch the racing circuit that has yachts speed well over 20 knots and representing sailors from over 20 different nationalities in this sustainable event that has competitors race on a simple first-past-the-post format. Here real time racing is all that matters, as there is no post-race time compensation, making the 52 Super Series the best monohull racing in the world.

programme.title: Lost Classics
