programme.title: Rutter's Detailin Garage - Wheel & Tire Care
programme.desc: Nick Rutter shows you how to properly care for your wheels and tires

programme.title: Rutter's Detailin Garage - Common Problems
programme.desc: Nick Rutter shows you how to fix common issues with your automitve finish

programme.title: Truck U - 4 WD Conversion
programme.desc: What does it take to go from 2-wheel drive to 4-wheel drive? A new transfer case, front axle and transmission parts to name a few. Your not going to want miss this 4 wheel drive conversion today on Truck U.

programme.title: Truck U - Donor Truck
programme.desc: Today on Truck U we’ll show you what it takes to pick out the right donor truck for your next project and give you an inside look at some of the problems areas inside the engine.

programme.title: Truck U - Flip This Ford
programme.desc: How do you get a truck to sell faster at a dealership? Bring it to Truck U and let them have their way with it. See if Matt and Bruno can flip this Ford on Truck U.

programme.title: Truck U - Alligator Hunter
programme.desc: Matt and Bruno customize a truck for a local alligator hunter.

programme.title: Truck U - Low Center JK
programme.desc: If you want to know what makes a low center of gravity so important on a Jeep, then you won’t want to miss this episode.

programme.title: Truck U - Rock Buggy
programme.desc: Our rock buggy chassis is ready for some major components, we’re going to bolt on some headers, cut holes for gauges, and even make mounts for a fuel cell.

programme.title: Truck U - C-10 Body Panels
programme.desc: Bruno and Matt show you what to look for when repairing body panels on your old truck.

programme.title: Truck U - Slammed S-10
programme.desc: Matt and Bruno put an S-10 on bags to give the truck a more improved look with better handling.

programme.title: AmeriCarna - HOT RODS
programme.desc: Legendary drag racer Don “The Snake” Prudhomme proves he is no stranger to the thrill of racing rivalry. Prudhomme’s career and subsequent competition with driver Tom “The Mongoose” McEwan earned the pair an unforgettable imprint on American pop culture. Legions of kids in the 60’s and 70’s flocked to the shelves for Snake and Mongoose Matchbox cars which helped make drag racing an undisputable American pastime. Famed director Ron Howard makes an appearance to discuss the incredible stories hidden within the world of Formula 1 Racing, the topic of his latest, epic feature ‘Rush”.

programme.title: AmeriCarna - BURIED TREASURE
programme.desc: Ray finds Buried Treasures in the form of two race cars that had been left almost completely untouched since the last time they were on a race track. One is found sitting in a barn with the other trapped in an old car hauler. Upon uncovering the cars, we find both have big stories to tell.

programme.title: AmeriCarna - INDY RESCUE
programme.desc: A journey to Indianapolis unveils the winning car of the 1955 Indy 500 sits on the roof of an auto mechanic shop. More than 50 years after it’s magic at the track, prominent Indy mechanic/owner Chris Paulsen begins to restore the car and Ray talks about the evolution of America’s illustrious Indy 500.

programme.title: AmeriCarna - SMOKEY
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Smokey Yunick, the most innovative mechanic in NASCAR history, sold his famous truck that hauled equipment & cars across the country. Ray is on a mission to uncover this storied truck that helped launch the beginning of NASCAR’s cross-country popularity.

programme.title: AmeriCarna - VANDERBILT
programme.desc: Ray travels to Long Island, New York with the hopes of learning more about America’s first major auto racing competition. The race, which began at the turn of the 20th century, helped develop the first major American racing stars and drove American manufacturing to competitive standard with the highly progressive Europeans.

programme.title: AmeriCarna - RAYS ROOTS
programme.desc: Fred Dmuchowski is a New Jersey racing icon. He was a regular workingman who raced on weekends for fun and became a legend in his iconic 303 racer. Ray works to rebuild the 303 in homage to Fred who inspired him to pursue his career in motorsports.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Proving Provenance on a One-Off Ferrari
programme.desc: Tracing the origins and solving the mystery of a controversial all-aluminum bodied 512 BBI Boxer Ferrari.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Twin City Turbos
programme.desc: Caffeine & Octane goes Turbo in the Twin Cities; Ferrari Drifter Federico Sceriffo finds a home in Atlanta.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - 470MPH with Custom King George Poteet
programme.desc: Jaguar F-Type Project 7 crosses the Pond.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Art & Oddities at Old Car City, USA
programme.desc: Mustang Mayhem at the big show.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - The Unsung Hero in the Movie Ford v. Ferrari
programme.desc: Red carpet receptions for a Koenigsegg Regera.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Hollywood's Cars Come to Life at Picture Car Productions
programme.desc: Covert cars that slipped into the U.S.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Rickey Gadson Stares Down a Steep Learning Curve at Rd. Atl
programme.desc: "Go Fast Girl" Katherne Legge's Model A Racer.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - A Sneak Peek at a Premier, Private Collection
programme.desc: Mecum Auction's push for a $15,000,000 sale.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - The World's Largest Monthly Car Show Goes Up for Sale to the Highest Bidder
programme.desc: Doubling down for cars and coffee.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Landscaping a Home with a Nod to Automotive
programme.desc: British Invasion through the decades.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - The Fertile Car Grounds in the North Georgia Mountains
programme.desc: Due diligence on custom builds and their quirky builders.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Cars and Coffee Takes Center Stage on Amelia Island
programme.desc: The Concourse d'lemons celebrates the oddball, mundane, & truly awful of the automotive world.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Concourse d'lemons: One Man's Trash Is a Car Enthusiast's Treasure
programme.desc: Rickey, Bryan and Adam explore all the cars that should never have been built at Concourse d'lemons.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Super Cars at Course d'Elegance
programme.desc: One of a kind cars at Amelia Island Caffeine & Octane.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - A New Generation Takes over Amelia Island Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Caffeine & Octane at Ameilia Island have everything from classic to extraterrestrial.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Voices: Blackberry Smoke
programme.desc: A new season kicks off with some big numbers: Featuring the world's fastest C8 Corvette, an overpowered Cortina Mark I, and a Buick Regal with over 1,700 horsepower

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Voices: Bishop Rob Wright
programme.desc: C & O: North America's most diverse car show: Featuring custom Bugs, John Kaase fire breathing '56 Fords, and Chevy Silverados touching 1000HP

programme.title: Brumos Collection with Hurley
programme.desc: C & O Jacksonville: Featuring Hurley Haywood's Brumos Porsches, a street legal Indy car, and a dynamic '60 Olds

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Brumos Collection with Hurley
programme.desc: C & O Jacksonville: Featuring Hurley Haywood's Brumos Porsches, a street legal Indy car, and a dynamic '60 Olds

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Graffiti Artist KBMER
programme.desc: Jacksonville's C & O's colorful and quirky car culture.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Voices: Sport's Radio Legend, Mike Bell
programme.desc: C & O: North America's greatest car show

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Voices: Killer Mike
programme.desc: Caffeine & Octane: North America's greatest car show

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Fuller's Fab 5
programme.desc: Amelia Island's own Caffeine & Octane car show,: Featuring $2,000 Wrek Racing Truck, David Patterson's favorite C&O cars, a plastic Citroen Mehari, and much more.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Generation Amelia
programme.desc: The Concours d'Elegance from Amelia Island: Featuring bomb-proof Conquest Knight XV, '69 Camaro Hagerty Fixer-Upper, and car-enthusiast John Oates.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Delta Wing Racer with a Vengeance
programme.desc: State-of-the-art engineering and passion projects take center stage on this edition of Caffeine & Octane. The revolutionary Delta Wing Racer turns on hot lap after hot lap at Road Atlanta, and driver Katherine Legge offers insight on how “less is more” when it comes to power to weight ratios; the dark world of a graffiti artist paints a picture of a car called Vengeance while the hosts share the eclectic hybrids of machines that make it to Caffeine and Octane with Vengance’s creator Totem.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Henry Ford III & Counterfeit Cars
programme.desc: The word is out that Caffeine & Octane is the ultimate scene and the place to be seen. Even after 12 hours of racing at the Petit Le Mans endurance race, Henry Ford III, the great grandson of Henry Ford the industrial magnate and current member of Ford’s Board of Directors, showed up to take in the sights, address the crowds, and sign a one of a kind Ford Shelby GT350R. The GT350R will hit the road with Operation Hope to encourage young people to study math and science through motorsports; Covert car counterfeiter, Chuck Beck looks for Ford’s approval on his own version of a muscled up Festiva. YouTuber ‘That Dude in Blue’ David Patterson joins Skip and Bryan to get a special look at the motor-based philanthropic outreach and amazing cars that come with it done by John Hope Bryant, friend of Caffeine and Octane.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Go Fast Collections
programme.desc: Rickey and Bryan race outside of their comfort zones, each competing to find the raddest car collection. Rickey hangs out with classic racer, Ron Green, who shows him the ropes in the ultra light '83 Ralt RT5. Bryan visits a collection of 120 racing motorcycle owned by mechanic and racer Mike McConville. Mike takes Bryan motorcross racing in his backyard after showing off his high horsepowered car collection. Caffeine and Octane alongside Ron Green visit Atlanta's first Concours d'elegance to look at classic cars that have been perfectly maintained for decades.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - The Wrap on the Most Beautiful Cars
programme.desc: Wayne Phears’ Jaguar E-Type was nothing more than a diamond in the rough before the mineral rights attorney took on the basket case. Caffeine & Octane brings viewers the story of how Phears’, through relentless research and determination, restored and reunited the #10 Jag that Enzo Ferrari called “the most beautiful car ever made”; Atlanta Wraps shows how wrapping Corvettes and Lamborghinis can color a car fast. Caffeine and Exotics is featured again to show off the coolest wraps Atlanta can supply.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Panoz Racing & Chasing Chevys
programme.desc: Twenty-five years of hand building record-setting race cars is no easy task. But don’t tell that to Don Panoz who takes on Porsches and Ferraris with his laid back personality and a full-production facility that makes improvised versions of Americas V-8’s; Caffeine & Octane gets an exclusive look at an elusive man’s life long pursuit of everything Chevrolet.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Retrofitting a Psycho Mercury
programme.desc: Caffeine & Octane goes old school with Psycho Deville singer and pin striper Walt Richards. Richards has less than a week to hand paint his signature flames on a way cool ’50 Mercury. An introduction to Retrofit Lighting’s trickle down technology - from cars to motorcycles - that will revolutionize how bikes will see and be seen.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Beetles, Bugs, and Buses, Oh My!
programme.desc: Caffeine & Octane is known for having something for everyone. That reputation is tested when over 100 VW’s, on the lunatic fringe of automotive, rattled into an event. The annual VW Invasion has swarmed C&O, bringing with it Bugs, Beetles, Buses and more by a very dedicated VW fan base.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Big Tigger v. Monster Muscle
programme.desc: Rapper, radio, and ATL TV personality Darian “Big Tigger” Morgan invites Caffeine & Octane into his home. Cameras look past his collection of 500 Michael Jordan shoes to focus their lenses on a one-off motorcycle the 6–time NBA Champion gave to Tigger as a gift; A second to none, muscle car collection by one of the founders of Monster Energy gets toured by one of our hosts.

programme.title: Rutter's Detailin Garage - Dust, Bugs and More
programme.desc: Nick Rutter shows you how to remove bugs, polish exhaust tips and safetly remove dust

programme.title: Rutter's Detailin Garage - Coating Your Car
programme.desc: Nick Rutter shows you the process of applying a coating from claying, polishing, and maintenance

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Race Ya!
programme.desc: When Kevin brings a punch-packing Dodge Charger into the garage, Willie gets an idea for a fast project of his own.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Daytona Turkey Run
programme.desc: Willie B spends a weekend at one of the biggest car events of the year, where a special project is being built right in the middle of all the madness.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Chevelle Part 1: Transmission Conversion
programme.desc: Kevin and Willie B take a 1970 Chevelle from an automatic to a manual transmission, outfitting the new engine along the way.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Chevelle Part 2: New Interior
programme.desc: Everyone knows that with a classic beauty, it’s really what’s on the inside that counts. Willie B and Kevin finish up a 1970 Chevelle project with some much-needed attention to the interior.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - On-and-Offroad Jeep
programme.desc: Kevin and Willie beef up the suspension on a 2014 Jeep JK to transform it from a daily driver into a weekend off-roading vehicle.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Duramax Diesel: Common Problems
programme.desc: A good diesel truck is indispensable on the jobsite, but Duramax diesels are known to have a few common problems. Kevin and Willie B show us what they are and how to fix them to keep your fleet complete.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Meaner Mustang
programme.desc: Nice cars finish last. Willie B and Kevin turn a mellow 2002 Mustang GT into a mean, lean, power machine with a few performance upgrades.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - A Tale of Two Trucks
programme.desc: Kevin and Willie diagnose a noise issue on a high-mileage F-150. Meanwhile, a battered old pickup shows up in the garage in need of serious repairs.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - AAR You Ready for This?
programme.desc: The team tears down Mike Hill's '70 Superbird and finishes up final touches on Chris Driscoll's '70 AAR Cuda. Daren confronts Mark about stealing parts from his car and Mark gets a rematch on Chris Driscoll's race track.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Go for It!
programme.desc: Holly asks Mark if she can work on cars. Mark Cain from Bad Boy Blasters brings the crew a huge gift. The '70 Barracuda Convertible is torn down and sent to the dipper, progress is made on the '70 Sunroof Challenger and Mark gets a surprise from one of his favorite actors.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Get Your Hands Dirty
programme.desc: Mark installs the hood decal on the '70 Sunroof Challenger, Holly helps Josh disassemble the Barracuda suspension, Mark and Daren work on the 440 engine for the Challenger, and the team assembles one of the rarest Mopar options, the sunroof for the '70 Challenger.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - W-O-M-A-N, Mark Woman
programme.desc: The team rushes to ready the '69 Dodge Daytona for Tom Partridge and his family's visit. The guys settle a leadership dispute the old fashioned way, the Graveyard Carz van gets a face lift, and Daren retaliates when Mark won't let him sign for deliveries.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Pop Secrets
programme.desc: Holly helps Mark on the '70 Challenger, Daren annoys everyone with his popcorn and causes Mark to damage a very rare car. Tony D'Agostino, from Tony's Mopar Parts, visits and lends a hand on the '70 sunroof Challenger. Mark lets Holly in on the big secret and Daren reveals a secret of his own.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Let the Sunshine In
programme.desc: Mark gets a portable showroom, the '70 Hemi Charger is dissembled and the team finishes the 1970 Sunroof Challenger. Mark finally reveals his big secret project to the Graveyard Carz team and Royal makes a video tribute to the Sunroof Challenger.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - The Royal Treatment
programme.desc: Mark and the ghouls build out the 440 Super Commando engine for their '70 Plymouth Superbird and install the suspension for the '69 Daytona Charger. Daren finally has enough of Mark's foolishness.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - The Grand Torino
programme.desc: Body man Derrick becomes an official Graveyard Carz crew member and assists in the disassembly of the rare '67 Plymouth Hemi GTX Convertible. Josh and Daren play "the game" with Mark.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - The Waltons
programme.desc: Mark and the Ghoulz get a massive sheet-metal order from AMD for their '70 Plymouth Superbird. Meanwhile, the owners of the '72 Charger visit and talk about what made their car so special. Daren gets the offer of a lifetime on his '70 Challenger R/T.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - It's the Great Pumpkin, Goldberg!
programme.desc: It's a Moparween at Graveyard Carz! Just when things couldn't get crazier, Bill Goldberg shows up to go over his '68 GTX Convertible and knock some sense into the guys. He can handle the NFL and the WCW, but can he hold his own at GYC?

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Daytona Reborn Pt. 1
programme.desc: Mark is behind on his promise to get Tom Partidge's '69 Daytona Charger finished by the end of the month. The crew kicks into high gear to get Tom's Daytona looking great and out the door.

programme.title: Can-Am Presents
programme.desc: Chris Blais was at the top of the dirt bike game, winning some of the toughest races in the world, when everything changed in a flash. In this new episode of the Can-Am series 72 Hours, jump in the cockpit with Can-Am Factory racer Chris Blais as he prepares to compete against off-road riders in the longest one-day race in the US. See how his racing career changed after a spinal cord injury at Vegas to Reno 15 years ago.

programme.desc: Legendary Eldora Speedway hosts one of its crown jewels for another unforgettable dirt showdown.

programme.title: East Bay Winternationals
programme.desc: East Bay Winternationals dirt track racing from the famed FL oval.

programme.title: NASCAR Modified Tour

programme.title: All Star Circuit of Champions
programme.desc: All Stars battle at Lernerville’s Silver Cup.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: At the latest since a 1967 Toyota 2000 GT was sold at auction in the USA for 1.2 million dollars, Japanese classic cars have a different status. We present old and youngtimers "Made in Japan".

programme.title: Saab 93 and Saab 99 Turbo
programme.desc: In 1937 an airplane manufacturing company was founded in Sweden that later became the famous car manufacturer Saab. We present two of their iconic car models, the Saab 93 and 99 Turbo.

programme.title: Volvo Laplander 6x6
programme.desc: More extremes are always possible. Volvo's Laplander army vehicle has 6 wheels, 3 axles and provides space for at least 12 soldiers.

programme.title: Harley-Davidson Trio
programme.desc: We took a look at three very different Harley-Davidson models. The versatile Switchback Dyna, the motorized wheelie bike Sportster 72, and the bad-boy motorcycle Softail Slim.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Martial arts specialist Ramazan creates a fight choreography that involves four stuntmen who play secret agents that try to nail him down. And somebody will spectacularly take off with a car.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Fog, darkness and a pileup involving multiple cars, the Stunt Heroes want to recreate such a scene as part of a stunt with burning people, a fireman who arrives late at the scene and a car that flies through the air.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes leave their headquarters and travel to a ski resort. They simulate the attack of an army of soldiers all dressed in white. As part of this scene they want to make a car explode and fly through the air.

programme.title: Toyota GT86 J-Sport
programme.desc: With the Toyota GT 86 from J-Sport, it is noticeable that the company's roots lie in racing. The fans' wish to give the Japanese racer significantly more power nevertheless remained unfulfilled.

programme.title: Porsche Cayman GT4
programme.desc: The Porsche Cayman GT4. Lighter, more powerful and faster than ever. Porsche shows what is possible with this vehicle, when fast lap times are in the focus of attention.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: We were allowed to drive a car of Citroen's sub-brand DS who try to set foot in the Formula E. In addition: Citroen and Peugeot share the same platform with their Rifter and Berlingo models. And: the facelift of the 508, Peugeot's flagship car.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Eager to overcome the damage to their image following the diesel scandal, Volkswagen allowed exclusive sneak peaks into future developments. We took their T-Cross on a covered drive. In addition: a first glance at Audi's A1 and A6 models.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: We compared the Ford Mustang 2.3 EcoBoost turbo to BMW's 430i with similar engine and drive specs. Also: Lada tries to take on Dacia with their Vesta SW station wagon. And: Opel's Grandland X may be an SUV, but it doesn't offer an all-wheel drive.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Is Kia's visually exciting Stinger able to convince in our test? In addition: we explored how Subaru's Boxer engine concept works in their XV model. And: Hyundai i30N vs. Volkswagen Golf GTI.

programme.title: Ford GT40
programme.desc: With their V8 cars, Ford showed that they were able to build race winners. The Ford GT40 was a prime example for that, especially in Le Mans.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Bentley New Flying Spur and the Rolls Royce Wraith are both an extremely exclusive breed of cars. These luxurious power packs make for an almost transcendental driving experience and deliver the perfect combination of elegance and performance.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: There are names that sound like music in car enthusiasts' ears: the Mc Laren MP4 12C, the Porsche 911 Turbo S and the Mercedes SLS AMG GT are super sports cars that are second to none. We put the pedal to the metal in these exciting and powerful driving machines.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: 1,000 kilometers on the famous Nurburgring. It's the final race of the 2013 season. The Blancpain Endurance Series is a racing event for grand tourers like the Ferrari 458 Italia, the McLaren MP4-12 C or the Nissan GT-R Nismo GT3. We took a look at all the action, the drivers, their cars and the competition.

programme.title: Mercedes 300 SL Lightweight
programme.desc: An iconic racing car and one of only 29 ever built! We accompanied the Mercedes 300 SL 'lightweight' on its premiere drive at the Mille Miglia.

programme.title: Bentley Bentayga
programme.desc: With the Bentley Bentayga, the traditional British brand is entering the fastest growing market segment. This world's first luxury SUV is a conglomerate of superlatives on wheels.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: The Nürburgring is the place where you can really let your hair down on a spectacular and difficult race track and learn how to get fit for motor sports. This is the reason why motoring enthusiasts go there throughout the year.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: We prepared some very entertaining clips from the Nürburgring for you. Expect to see the pedal on the metal and rubber burning.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: When the weather cleared up a bit at the Nürburgring, we were finally back at the track. As soon as the snow and ice were gone the horsepower junkies returned to the ring to once again let their engines roar.

programme.title: Artega GT
programme.desc: From 2006 to 2012 the German company Artega produced their GT sports car model. Thanks to the know-how of a former Porsche and BMW manager the Artega GT was able to be manufactured in a small series.

programme.title: Ferrari California T
programme.desc: The Ferrari California T has a lot of Italian passion and elegant lines to offer. Super sports car cabriolets are popular all over the world. It is no wonder that more and more manufacturers are 'opening up'.

programme.title: Chevrolet Caprice 9C1 police car
programme.desc: This 1994 Chevrolet Caprice 9C1 is a former police car from the Los Angeles Police Department. Its curvaceous body was often mocked as looking like a whale, but this Chevy Caprice possesses the qualities of a shark.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The emphatically sporty cars and motorbikes of BMW are equally successful with customers and in racing. However, the former aircraft engine manufacturer's entry into automobile production threatened to fail at an early stage.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The Porsche 550 Spyder is small and fast, but only 140 units were built. It was Porsche's first racing sports car and laid the foundation for the German manufacturer to be considered a force in car racing today.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Racing has been a matter of the heart for Ford for over 100 years. Henry Ford already wins the first race with his first car. Thousands of other victories were to follow.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The development of engineering at BMW has always been closely linked to motorsport. Racing has always played a decisive role in shaping the brand and setting the pace for its future.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: In the 1980s and 90s, Porsche races from victory to victory. A McLaren with Porsche engine wins the Formula 1 World Championship three times. In Le Mans in 1982, Porsche starts an unbelievable winning streak with the new 956/962 prototype.

programme.title: Glas 1700 GT
programme.desc: The Glas GT looks like a Ferrari, but comes from the province of Lower Bavaria in Germany. In the early 1960s it was one of the few German sports cars.

programme.title: Peugeot 205 Turbo 16
programme.desc: Peugeot released this classic, all wheel drive monster for one purpose only: It should bring the World Rally Championship to France. The Peugeot 205 Turbo 16 shook up the rally world in the 80s.

programme.title: Ignition GT
programme.desc: Volvo breathes new life into the sedan segment, with the ES 90. The Renault Kiger receives a mid-life make over and Ernest get better acquainted with the Leapmotor C10.

programme.title: Buyer's Guide
programme.desc: We explore how long a high-mileage Honda CR-V can last, help an Audi A3 owner plan long-term without a warranty, and guide a first-time buyer in choosing the right German car now.

programme.title: IGNITION Goes to SEMA
programme.desc: Vic brings you yet another varied line-up of ultra desirable custom-built vehicles in this episode: from a carbon fibre bodied, classic Ford pickup to an air-cooled Porsche 911 Targa and a slammed Mercedes-Benz CLS.

programme.title: Petrolheads
programme.desc: We’re down at the Cape Town Motorshow for the world record breaking sound off. Vic chats to up and coming spinner Brian Sto. And car enthusiast Calvin Fisher gives us a look at the 911 GT3 RS.

programme.title: Alfa Romeo 6C 2500SS
programme.desc: Founded in 1910, the iconic Italian car manufacturer Alfa Romeo experienced a very eventful history. Their 6C 2500 SS model is right in the middle of the company's more than 100-year history. It combined new technology with an early post-war appearance.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The sixth generation of the Opel Corsa shows its sporty side. Also: automotive minimalism in perfection, the Mitsubishi Space Star. And: the 2020 Seat Leon takes on the VW Golf again.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Can the new Mercedes-Benz C-Class and Skoda Octavia models continue to ride the wave of success? Also: the new generation of the Nissan Quashqai and the Opel Astra. And: the history of the Mercedes-Benz C-Class.

programme.title: All-rounders
programme.desc: We take a look at all-rounders such as the Volkswagen Caddy or the new T7. In addition: both Opel and Nissan offer electric variants for their Combo and Townstar models respectively.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Minivans offer an ideal blend of functionality, versatility and comfort that has been appreciated for generations. The Mercedes V-Class has to prove itself in six disciplines. And can the fully electric ID. Buzz continue the legacy of the Volkswagen Transporter?

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Minivans offer space for family, friends and adventures and are popular due to their practical size and functionality. We test the Mercedes V-Class, Opel Zafira-e and VW T7 in everyday use and show what you need to look out for in car subscriptions.

programme.title: Alpina B6
programme.desc: An Alpina is optically never intrusive. Understatement is the motto. One should not recognize at first glance, what potential is hidden under the bodywork. Huge spoilers are not used and neither are striking power domes. Any modifications serve the technical improvement, for example, optimized cooling and aerodynamics.

programme.title: Porsche Panamera
programme.desc: In the second generation Porsche Panamera, practically everything is different. Optics, technology, handling. Porsche's main goal is to provide the perfect combination of sportiness and comfort.

programme.title: Ignition GT
programme.desc: Volvo breathes new life into the sedan segment, with the ES 90. The Renault Kiger receives a mid-life make over and Ernest get better acquainted with the Leapmotor C10.

programme.title: Buyer's Guide
programme.desc: We explore how long a high-mileage Honda CR-V can last, help an Audi A3 owner plan long-term without a warranty, and guide a first-time buyer in choosing the right German car now.

programme.title: IGNITION Goes to SEMA
programme.desc: Vic brings you yet another varied line-up of ultra desirable custom-built vehicles in this episode: from a carbon fibre bodied, classic Ford pickup to an air-cooled Porsche 911 Targa and a slammed Mercedes-Benz CLS.

programme.title: Petrolheads
programme.desc: We’re down at the Cape Town Motorshow for the world record breaking sound off. Vic chats to up and coming spinner Brian Sto. And car enthusiast Calvin Fisher gives us a look at the 911 GT3 RS.

programme.title: Alfa Romeo 6C 2500SS
programme.desc: Founded in 1910, the iconic Italian car manufacturer Alfa Romeo experienced a very eventful history. Their 6C 2500 SS model is right in the middle of the company's more than 100-year history. It combined new technology with an early post-war appearance.

programme.title: Motorvision Specials
programme.desc: The Yas Marina Circuit in Abu Dhabi is the most glamorous race track of the Formula One. Khaled Qubaysi takes us for a spin on this exclusive behind-the-scenes look at the famous race track.

programme.title: Motorvision Specials
programme.desc: Stéphane Peterhansel is the most successful driver in the history of the Dakar Rally. With the German team X-Raid he won the 2012 and 2013 editions of this prestigious competition in a Mini Countryman.

programme.title: Motorvision Specials
programme.desc: For more than a century man and machine have tried to tame the Pikes Peak mountain, where daredevils risk everything to be the fastest up the 20-kilometer road to the summit at 4,300 meters above sea level. We show you the highlights of the 2018 race.

programme.title: Motorvision Specials
programme.desc: Former World Rally champion Armin Schwarz is a legend behind the wheel. We accompanied him when he instructed other talented drivers in a Subaru WRX STI rally car in the snowy and icy, but also breathtaking landscape of Finland.

programme.title: Motorvision Specials
programme.desc: The Tourist Trophy on the British Isle of Man is the most famous motorcycle race in the world. TT Sidecar champion Klaus Klaffenböck and racing expert Lenz Leberkern explore the fascination behind this exciting and iconic racing event.

programme.title: BMW Active Hybrid 7
programme.desc: With the Active Hybrid 7, unlike with its predecessor bearing the same model name, BMW now banks on a full hybrid, which can also be driven solely with electric power.

programme.title: Maserati Quattroporte GTS
programme.desc: 1963, over 50 years ago, with the Quattroporte Maserati invented a new vehicle category, the sports sedan. This GTS model is already the 6th generation of this iconic car.

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Lake Faaker is both a popular holiday spot in Austria and also a place with a special tradition. In early September, the region is the destination for thousands of bikers who celebrate their big annual event, the European Bike Week. (Part 1 of 5)

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Lake Faaker is both a popular holiday spot in Austria and also a place with a special tradition. In early September, the region is the destination for thousands of bikers who celebrate their big annual event, the European Bike Week. (Part 2 of 5)

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Lake Faaker is both a popular holiday spot in Austria and also a place with a special tradition. In early September, the region is the destination for thousands of bikers who celebrate their big annual event, the European Bike Week. (Part 3 of 5)

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Lake Faaker is both a popular holiday spot in Austria and also a place with a special tradition. In early September, the region is the destination for thousands of bikers who celebrate their big annual event, the European Bike Week. (Part 4 of 5)

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Lake Faaker is both a popular holiday spot in Austria and also a place with a special tradition. In early September, the region is the destination for thousands of bikers who celebrate their big annual event, the European Bike Week. (Part 5 of 5)

programme.title: Harley-Davidson Trio
programme.desc: We took a look at three very different Harley-Davidson models. The versatile Switchback Dyna, the motorized wheelie bike Sportster 72, and the bad-boy motorcycle Softail Slim.

programme.title: KTM 990 Adventure
programme.desc: It's very big and mostly comes in orange: the KTM 990 Adventure. Over rough terrain it's often driven standing up. Today, the 990 is considered the off-road specialist among travel Enduros.

programme.title: Facel Vega Facellia
programme.desc: In the late 1950s, the Facel Vega Facellia was designed to compete with Porsche and Alfa Romeo and open a new market segment for the fledgling French luxury car company.

programme.title: Dreamcars
programme.desc: British limousines are the embodiment of luxury, they are the automotive upper class. Built with the most exclusive materials, these limousines like the Rolls Royce Phantom, Bentley Mulsanne or Jaguar XJ combine luxury, comfort and power.

programme.title: Dreamcars
programme.desc: Whether it is the Mercedes S-Class, the BMW 7-series or the Audi A8, limousines "Made in Germany" are considered status symbols, setting standards when it comes to comfort, pioneering technologies and safety.

programme.title: Dreamcars
programme.desc: International limousines by Rolls Royce, Bentley, Mercedes, BMW and Jaguar guarantee an exclusive appearance and stand for status, prestige and perfection. They are the benchmark when it comes to luxury and comfort.

programme.title: Dreamcars
programme.desc: Power limousines like the BMW M5, Mercedes-AMG E63, Audi RS6 and Mulsanne Speed offer a unique mix of style, performance and suitability for daily use. They combine the luxury of a limousine with the dynamics of a super sports car.

programme.title: Dreamcars
programme.desc: They are masterpieces of automotive art, cars of breathtaking elegance, extraordinary performance, built for speeds beyond imagination: Bugatti Chiron, Lykan Hypersports, Pagani Huayra and Ferrari LaFerrari.

programme.title: BMW Kelleners Sport 640i Grand Coupe
programme.desc: The Kelleners Sport 640i is based on one of the most beautiful 4-door coupes. The tuning company of Ralf Kelleners, the son of a three-time European touring car champion, made a name for itself by specializing in remodeling BMWs.

programme.title: Volkswagen Touareg V6 TDI
programme.desc: Volkswagen subjected the Touareg to a radical makeover. After the end of the Phaeton, it's the new luxury top model from VW. Hopes are high: it has to sell big so that management can restore the peoples' confidence in the Volkswagen brand.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: We were allowed to drive a car of Citroen's sub-brand DS who try to set foot in the Formula E. In addition: Citroen and Peugeot share the same platform with their Rifter and Berlingo models. And: the facelift of the 508, Peugeot's flagship car.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Eager to overcome the damage to their image following the diesel scandal, Volkswagen allowed exclusive sneak peaks into future developments. We took their T-Cross on a covered drive. In addition: a first glance at Audi's A1 and A6 models.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: We compared the Ford Mustang 2.3 EcoBoost turbo to BMW's 430i with similar engine and drive specs. Also: Lada tries to take on Dacia with their Vesta SW station wagon. And: Opel's Grandland X may be an SUV, but it doesn't offer an all-wheel drive.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Is Kia's visually exciting Stinger able to convince in our test? In addition: we explored how Subaru's Boxer engine concept works in their XV model. And: Hyundai i30N vs. Volkswagen Golf GTI.

programme.title: Ford GT40
programme.desc: With their V8 cars, Ford showed that they were able to build race winners. The Ford GT40 was a prime example for that, especially in Le Mans.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Nowadays the gull-winged classic DeLorean is an automotive investment. Also: 100 dream cars under the hammer at a classic car auction in Switzerland. And: modern classics with investment potential like the Mercedes 190E 2.3 16V.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The BMW 328 'Schlüter' wrote racing history in the 1930s. Today, the unique car is operational again. Also: the TVR 3000M Cosworth is able to scare any Porsche out of its mind. And: a 60 years old Opel Kapitän gets a makeover.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: At the latest since a 1967 Toyota 2000 GT was sold at auction in the USA for 1.2 million dollars, Japanese classic cars have a different status. We present old and youngtimers "Made in Japan".

programme.title: Saab 93 and Saab 99 Turbo
programme.desc: In 1937 an airplane manufacturing company was founded in Sweden that later became the famous car manufacturer Saab. We present two of their iconic car models, the Saab 93 and 99 Turbo.

programme.title: Volvo Laplander 6x6
programme.desc: More extremes are always possible. Volvo's Laplander army vehicle has 6 wheels, 3 axles and provides space for at least 12 soldiers.

programme.title: Harley-Davidson Trio
programme.desc: We took a look at three very different Harley-Davidson models. The versatile Switchback Dyna, the motorized wheelie bike Sportster 72, and the bad-boy motorcycle Softail Slim.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes team plan to create a clash between man and machine. For a stunt showreel one of Action Concept's stunt people will be facing a new BMW 3 series in an action-packed chase.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: It's getting hot in this episode of Stunt Heroes. Stuntman Paul will be engulfed by flames as everything around him blows up in this dangerous fire stunt. The Action Concept team carefully prepares for this heated scene.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: For a showreel, the team choreographs a fight that involves hand-to-hand combat, glass bottles shattering on heads and bodies crashing through walls. In the end, a car flies high, detonates in the air, leaving a trail of destruction.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Action Concept wreck more than 100 cars each year for their stunts. In this episode, a quad rider is chased by a car. The car is crashed in the process and the quad bike also has to be destroyed, but the question is how?

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: In this episode of Stunt Heroes, it's all about stunt driver Christoph Knobloch. He drives down a ramp and crashes into cars stacked on top of each other while several petrol barrels explode at the same time.

programme.title: Harley-Davidson Trio
programme.desc: We took a look at three very different Harley-Davidson models. The versatile Switchback Dyna, the motorized wheelie bike Sportster 72, and the bad-boy motorcycle Softail Slim.

programme.title: Rimac Concept One
programme.desc: The futuristically designed Rimac Concept One is one of the fastest, most powerful and expensive electric cars in the world, it does not adhere to convention.

programme.title: Bentley Bentayga
programme.desc: With the Bentley Bentayga, the traditional British brand is entering the fastest growing market segment. This world's first luxury SUV is a conglomerate of superlatives on wheels.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: Subaru shows the new facelift of their former rally car WRX STi. Also: it's small, economical and an iconic car, the Fiat 500 with its Twin-Air engine. And: the Mercedes ML 350 BlueTEC 4MATIC.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: Huge power and lightning-fast accelleration without any engine sound, the Tesla Roadster Sport. Also: engine sound design for the Audi R8 e-tron. And: MTM specialises in tuning Audi cars.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: Infiniti, Nissan's luxury division, is stepping up in order to make the brand a global success, starting with their FX50 SUV. Also: Audi introduce the hybrid version of their top dog model A8. And: Mercedes-AMG's C63 Black Series.

programme.title: Arabella Classics
programme.desc: Rare Automobiles and stunning views! The Arabella Classics, one of the most exclusive Classic Car Rallies in Europe.

programme.title: Bentley Bentayga
programme.desc: With the Bentley Bentayga, the traditional British brand is entering the fastest growing market segment. This world's first luxury SUV is a conglomerate of superlatives on wheels.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: The Jaguar XF-S is supposed to put pressure on BMW, Audi and the other competitors in the business class segment. Volvo take a different approach. Their S90 is captivating due to its Scandinavian design and economical four-cylinder engines.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: BMW offers the X2 as a compact hipster SUV for young people. The DS 7 Crossback, on the other hand, wants to convey the French lifestyle. And Jaguar's E-Pace enters the market as a smaller version of the F-Pace.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: With the compact SUV Velar, Range Rover attempts to reach a broader audience. Jeep relies on the tried and tested: the design of the Wrangler has remained almost the same for more than 60 years. Also: the Volvo XC60 and the Ford Edge.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: The Mercedes Sprinter still is one of the most popular commercial vehicles. For its third generation, the brand chose to have it manufactured in Poland. Before, this iconic van shared its production line with Volkswagen's Crafter.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Porsche quits the diesel business. Hybrids such as the Cayenne E-Hybrid are expected to become their focus of attention. Also: taking the BMW X4 on tour around Spartanburg, USA. And: mountain climbing with the Volkswagen Touareg in Austria.

programme.title: Mitsubishi Lancer Evo 10
programme.desc: The ice course on Lungauring, the Mitsubishi Lancer Evo 10 in winter training. Twelve participants in six Evos were taught the art of drifting with a four-wheel drive car. We accompanied a student on his first drifting experience.

programme.title: Joseph Stalin's ZIS 110
programme.desc: James Bond still didn't have a license to kill, when this representative Russian vehicle called ZIS 110 rolled off the production line in 1949. The 110 was developed by reverse engineering a 1942 Packard Super Eight.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: At the end of the 1960s, under adverse conditions, Heinz Melkus built the GDR's only sports car, the Melkus RS 1000 with lightweight plastic bodywork and gullwing doors. Also: Audi resurrects the Wanderer streamline racing cars.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The Volkswagen Samba transforms from pack mule into high-priced classic. And: a former letter box with 37 seats. The 1962 'Graf and Stift' post bus now takes tourists to their hotel.

programme.title: Studio 52 - Episode 2 - Poker Night In America

programme.title: Studio 52 - Episode 3 - Poker Night In America

programme.title: Studio 52 - Episode 4 - Poker Night In America

programme.title: Studio 52 - Episode 5 - Poker Night In America

programme.title: Studio 52 - Episode 7 - Poker Night In America

programme.title: Studio 52 - Episode 8 - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: The established PROS received BAD intel on Keir Sullivan, not realizing they invited a SHARK to their game. Wild high stakes action $100/$200. Lineup: Shaun Deeb, Ben Lamb, Keir Sullivan, MJ Gonzales, Shane Sigsbee, Craig Stackewicz, Clay Johnson. Commentary by Joe Stapleton.

programme.title: Studio 52 - Episode 9 - Poker Night In America

programme.title: Studio 52 - Episode 10 - Poker Night In America

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 451 - Up Next Fighting 13 part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Up Next Fighting 13 part 2 from the Commerce Hotel and Casino in Southern California. Starting off in the bantamweight division, Jonathan Powell steps into the cage with veteran grappler Will Holguin. In a featherweight bout, striker Jonny O'Neill takes on wrestler Eudardo Zarate with the winner moving on to a title opportunity. Also watch as Adam Garcia and Zachary Kraschinsky take to the ring in a lightweight bout. With two titles on the line in the featured bout, the rising star UNF Featherweight title and the California State featherweight title in the rising stars division, Stone Lavelle and his opponient Sean Crenshaw battle it out for the two belts.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 481 - Dream Boxing 14 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Dream Boxing 14 part 1 from Riga, Latvia. First up Miks Berzins takes on Aleksandrs Sidorans for a heavyweight bout. The next matchup is betweeen Mika Bigvava from Georgia and Bohdan Sobol from Latvia with 18 wins and only one loss. In the ffinal match, Aleksis Volkovics, making his pro-debut, and Igor Trosins, both Latvian, take to the ring.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 482 - Dream Boxing 14 part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Dream Boxing 14 part 2 from Riga, Latvia. In this episode the IBF European Champion title belt is on the line as Poland's Przemyslaw Zysk takes on undefeated Latvian Jevgenijs Alekseejavs in a 10 round bout. In the main event, Joel Mafauad from Argentina steps into the ring with Karen Chukhadzhian from Ukraine for a WBO and IBF international title match with two belts up for grabs.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 441 - Up Next Fighting – Migran vs. Douglas
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Up Next Fighting: Migran Vs. Douglas from Southern California. In this episode "Westside" Dion Young looks to replicate his KO of the night when he steps into the cage with Sexyama Albert Lee. In a featherweight championship bout, Hamzeh Trad and undefeated Shane Collins take to the cage in a battle for the belt. In the main event, Olympic silver medalist Migran "The Maestro" Arutyunyan faces off against David "Tarzan" Douglas.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 442 - DMG Boxing presents Night of Champions III part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents DMG Boxing Night of Champions III part 1 from The Fox Theater in Pomona, Califorinia. In this episode Letryle Pearson making his pro debut faces Louis Vasquez in the super-middleweight division. Plus undefeated Chelsey "Mae Mae" Anderson returns to the ring to take on Mexico's Claudia Herrera and in the main event, undefeated and lightning fast "Terrible" Terry Washington takes on the experienced Nelvis "Tricky Train" Rodriguez who looks to end Washington's perfect record.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 445 - DMG Boxing presents Night of Champions III part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents DMG Boxing Night of Champions III part 1 from the historic Fox Theater in Pomona, Califorinia. Tonight watch as Brandon Douglas from Salt Lake City takes on undefeated Javier Zamarron from Wisconsin in the featherweight division. Also Emmanuel Dominguez and Micheal Bracamontes take to the ring in the lightweight division in a match of youth versus strength.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 446 - CMH Boxing I part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents CMH Boxing I part 1. In this initial episode of Championing Mental Health Boxing, Marlen Avila faces the young and undefeated Poison Ivy Enriquez. Watch as Jose Ramirez steps into the ring with Jessie Mandapat looking for an upset. Also on this card, promising up and comer Jonny "Magic" Mansour is matched up against Christian Avalos who looks to end Jonny's undefeated streak.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 452 - CMH Boxing I part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents CMH Boxing I part 2 from the Avalon in Hollywood. In the women's division, Brook Sibrian of California takes on the younger Rubi Gutierriz out of Mexico. In the co-main event, Victor Pisillas is set to meet the challenge with Carlos Jackson in a crossroads fight.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 447 - Up Next Fighting 13 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Up Next Fighting 13 part 1 from the Commerce Hotel and Casino in Southern California. First up, striker Bryen Dao takes on brawler Ferrin Marcelin in the featherweight division and Aiden Ingram steps into the cage with Steve Mora in a bantamweight bout. Also on this card Carlos Figueroa looks to break Artem Afanasenko's undefeated streak. In the main event, Christopher "Taco" Padilla puts his lightweight title on the line when he faces his toughest opponent yet with five time UFC veteran Justin Janyes.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 342 - Bare Knuckle Boxing 32 Part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Bare Knuckle Boxing 32 part 1 from London. In the flyweight devision, Salim Jamshidi and Joe Fitzpatrick, both making their pro BKB debut, battle for the win. Stanlee Wilson faces Tony Barratt, Reece Murray takes on the much more experienced Jonny Lawson, Danny Meins goes head to head with Tony Meeham and Martyn Grainger faces Eryk Majda in the Cruiserweight division.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 482 - Dream Boxing 14 part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Dream Boxing 14 part 2 from Riga, Latvia. In this episode the IBF European Champion title belt is on the line as Poland's Przemyslaw Zysk takes on undefeated Latvian Jevgenijs Alekseejavs in a 10 round bout. In the main event, Joel Mafauad from Argentina steps into the ring with Karen Chukhadzhian from Ukraine for a WBO and IBF international title match with two belts up for grabs.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 463 - KOK Bushido 93 Vilnius part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents KOK Bushido 93 part 1 from Vilnius, Lithuania. First up in the featherweight division, Vladislav Jud faces Pavelas Majauskas followed by Luuk Valk versus Emilis Panceris. Valts Volkolakovs and Adomas Razma face off in the lightweight division in a semi-pro bout and in the light heavyweight division, Antioine Abou Chadid faces Kristupas Simkus.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 465 - KOK Bushido 93 Vilnius part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents KOK Bushido 93 part 2 from Vilnius, Lithuania. In this episode in the light heavyweight division, Timur Chalbajev and Tautvydas Sarkauskas face off while Mindaugas Bartlis amd Robertas Gunoa step into the cage for a middle weight bout. In the lightweight division, grappling legend Adem Vashakmadze takes on Sergej Grecicho who is looking for a quick end to the fight. In the main event, Cedric Severac and Raimondas Krilavicius face off in a lightweight bout for the chance to fight in the KOK world championship title fight.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 466 - Dream Boxing 7 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Dream Boxing 7 part 1 from Berlin Germany. In the first matchup Dariusz Lassotta takes on Artsiom Charniakevich in the cruiserweight division. Fabio Cascone of Italy faces Germany's Paul Wall in a super welter-weight bout and Ezequiel Zarate and Grant Shala take to the ring in a heavy weight matchup of Germany versus Argentina.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 467 - Dream Boxing 7 part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Dream Boxing 7 part 2 from Berlin, Germany. In this episode, Germany's Bujar Tahiri takes on Argentina's Nicolas Veron in a middle-weight bout, Also watch as Alexander Pavlov steps into the ring with undefeated Etinsoa "El Chapo" Oliha for a Germany versus Italy match.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 468 - Dynamite Fighting Show 28 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Dynamite Fighting Show 28 part 1 from the Sala Polivalentă BT Arena in Cluj-Napoca, Romania. First up in the light-heavyweight division, undefeated Paul Danci takes on Alex Andreescu. Next up undefeated Eric Bubuleandra versus Becali Bodescu face off in the cruiser-weight division. In a heavyweight bout Bogdan Besta steps into the ring with Vasile Corcodel who looks to remain undefeated against his significantly heavier opponent. The main event features a super-cruiserweight bout between Italy's Frank Kanate and Romania's Stean Latescu.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 469 - Dynamite Fighting Show 28 part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Dynamite Fighting Show 28 part 2 from the Sala Polivalentă BT Arena in Cluj-Napoca, Romania. First up, a bout in the cruiserweight division with Madalin Mogos versus Sebastian Lutaniuc. Achilles Karapiperis and Calin Petrisor "The KO Hunter" step into the ring to face off in a middleweight division fight. In an open weight entertainment fight Justitiarul De Berceni makes his professional debut against veteran fighter Tolea Ciumac "The Tiberian Bear." In the co-main event Netherland's Chris Baya faces Romania's Florin Lambagiu in a supermiddleweight division fight.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 457 - Shamrock FC 368
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Shamrock FC 368 from St. Louis. Up first in a female bout, Jett Bouckaert and Scarlet Mayfield take to the cage. Next watch as Arthur Jackson faces Emmanuel Primer and Billy Duncan takes on Jaylon Jones in the welterweight division. In the co-main event, Max Choriev looking to head to the UFC faces Anders Murray in what's expected to be a battle of attrition and Sam Paneitz, coming off haitus, takes on Dusty Little.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 459 - Real Fight Promotion 100
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Real Fight Promotion 100 from Ukraine. In this special centenial event RFP brings its viewers an exciting night of fights. First up Stanislav Bogush and Nazar Pryshliak faceoff in the flyweight division followed by Timofiy Mytkalyk versus Ruslan Danyliuk. Also Vyacheslav Vaseichuk and Andriy Dzioba square off. In the Grand Prix finals, the two remaing fighters Roman Bandrivchak and Stanislov Bogush vye for the championship.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 474 - Up Next Fighting 16 part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Up Next Fighting 16 part 2 from the Commerce Hotel and Casino in Southern California. In ther first bout, Angel Becerra steps into the cage with undefeated Carson Dohan. In the lightweight division, veteran Darion Champman looks to stop Diego Perez' three bout winning streak. Up next grappler Joe Murphy returns to the cage for a match against boxer Luciano Ramos in a catchweight bout.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 255 - KOK’84 World Series, Vilnius part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents KOK '84 World Series from Vilnius Lithuania part 1. In a battle between Lithuanian fighters, Zygimantas Kidikas making his pro debut goes up against his 2-0 opponent Ovidijus Pocius. Watch as Aleh Moshin (Belarus) faces Samuelis Sorochovas (Lithuania), Osvaladas Fedorovic takes on the less experienced Aurimas Krukauskas in a battle between Lithuanian fighters and Vladislav Shatunskui (Poland) battles against Gustas Dimsa (Lithuania). In addition Polish fighter Hubert Dylewski takes on Lithuanian Jan Naus in a very evenly matched fight.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 256 - KOK’84 World Series, Vilnius Part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents KOK '84 World Series from Vilnius Lithuania part 2. In this episode, watch as Ukrainian Volodymyr Hynzhu takes on Lithuanian Raimondas Avlasevicius, Finn Larsen (Ireland) goes up against the more experienced Nauris Lukosiunas (Lithuania) and Oleskil Mykhailo 9-0 (Ukraine) faces Henrikas Viksraitis 43-7(Lithuania). In the main event Lithuanians Zygimantas Ramaska and Vitoldas Jagelo face one another in an MMA Bushido battle with at title on the line.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 257 - Shamrock FC 334
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Shamrock Fighting Championship out of the Ameristar Casino in St. Charles, MO. In this event Austin Miller faces Arvin Mills in the cage, Arnez Ferguson takes on Pat Vega in a kickboxing bout and in a female match, Livvy Pecher takes on Lora Campbell. Also Jason Gavril faces Isaac Dancy and Nico Alcaraz takes on Todd Madden in the middleweight division. In the Co-Main event Devin Anderson takes on Aushton Elleby Midkiff and in the main event Jeremiah Curtright with a 3 fight win streak takes on Zack Davis with a 4 fight win streak.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 258 - UFA Presents the Fighter's Only World MMA Awards XIII
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents the 13th annual Fighter's Only 2021 World MMA Awards from Worre Studios in Las Vegas, hosted by Chael Sonnen. Presentations by Dave Farra, Jessy Jess, Doggface208, Emily Whitmire, Cassie Scherbo, Jay Hieron, Dan Henderson, Kayla Harrison, Mackenzie Dern, and more.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 259 - KOK 94 Tallinn Part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents King of Kings 94 World Series from Tallinn, Estonia part 1. Young Estonian fighters Stanislav Teniugin and Siim Viljus battle under KOK Kickboxing rules. Aleh Moshin from Belarus takes on Karl Margus Haud out of Estonia and Edvinas Bubelis (Lithuania) faces Sergei Strinza (Estonia). Also, powerhouse Volodymyr Hynzju from Ukraine takes on Aleksey Larin from Estonia.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 260 - KOK 94 Tallinn Part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents King of Kings 94 World Series from Tallinn, Estonia part 2. Watch as the first ever KOK women's bantamweight world championship title is on the line. In some intense all-female matchups each fighter is vying to move on to the finals for a chance at the title. In the semi-finals Estonians Sigrid Kapanen and Astrid Johanna Grents fight to move on and Italian Ludovica Ciarpaglini faces Polish Ilona Woijda to see who will move on to the Grand Prix final match and have a chance at the title.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 261 - KOK 94 Tallinn Part 3
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents King of Kings 94 World Series from Tallinn, Estonia part 3. Watch as Canadian Mohammed Shushan faces Jevgeni "Zora XXL" Ravlusevits of Estonia and Dzmitry Varats (Belarus) takes on Ott Remmer (Estonia).

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 262 - Shamrock FC 335
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Shamrock 335 from Ameristar Casino St Charles. Watch as Pat Gordon takes on Adam Stone, Stanton Ketcherside faces Jerry Ing, Matt Tinker battles it out against James Yarbrough, Kevin Mueller faces Trevon Crawford and Tavae Lewis faces Josh Weston In the co-main event in a kickboxing bout, Ian Zarvos faces Cody Naucke and in the main event Josh Augustin returns to the cage after a long layoff to take on blackbelt Thomas Thatcher.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 263 - SFT 30 - Predador vs Manchinha
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents SFT 30 from Brazil. Denis Araujo with 6 KO's meets Jose Reborn Alexandre in the cage for a fierce MMA bout. In a compelling matchup, Paulo Pizzo takes on the much younger Fernando "ben 10" Lourenco and in the lightweight division #1 ranked Felipe Buakaw takes on #2 Marcio Velaminho. In the main event Wellington Predador faces Thiago Manchinha in an exciting matchup.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 255 - KOK’84 World Series, Vilnius part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents KOK '84 World Series from Vilnius Lithuania part 1. In a battle between Lithuanian fighters, Zygimantas Kidikas making his pro debut goes up against his 2-0 opponent Ovidijus Pocius. Watch as Aleh Moshin (Belarus) faces Samuelis Sorochovas (Lithuania), Osvaladas Fedorovic takes on the less experienced Aurimas Krukauskas in a battle between Lithuanian fighters and Vladislav Shatunskui (Poland) battles against Gustas Dimsa (Lithuania). In addition Polish fighter Hubert Dylewski takes on Lithuanian Jan Naus in a very evenly matched fight.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 256 - KOK’84 World Series, Vilnius Part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents KOK '84 World Series from Vilnius Lithuania part 2. In this episode, watch as Ukrainian Volodymyr Hynzhu takes on Lithuanian Raimondas Avlasevicius, Finn Larsen (Ireland) goes up against the more experienced Nauris Lukosiunas (Lithuania) and Oleskil Mykhailo 9-0 (Ukraine) faces Henrikas Viksraitis 43-7(Lithuania). In the main event Lithuanians Zygimantas Ramaska and Vitoldas Jagelo face one another in an MMA Bushido battle with at title on the line.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 257 - Shamrock FC 334
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Shamrock Fighting Championship out of the Ameristar Casino in St. Charles, MO. In this event Austin Miller faces Arvin Mills in the cage, Arnez Ferguson takes on Pat Vega in a kickboxing bout and in a female match, Livvy Pecher takes on Lora Campbell. Also Jason Gavril faces Isaac Dancy and Nico Alcaraz takes on Todd Madden in the middleweight division. In the Co-Main event Devin Anderson takes on Aushton Elleby Midkiff and in the main event Jeremiah Curtright with a 3 fight win streak takes on Zack Davis with a 4 fight win streak.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 258 - UFA Presents the Fighter's Only World MMA Awards XIII
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents the 13th annual Fighter's Only 2021 World MMA Awards from Worre Studios in Las Vegas, hosted by Chael Sonnen. Presentations by Dave Farra, Jessy Jess, Doggface208, Emily Whitmire, Cassie Scherbo, Jay Hieron, Dan Henderson, Kayla Harrison, Mackenzie Dern, and more.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 255 - KOK’84 World Series, Vilnius part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents KOK '84 World Series from Vilnius Lithuania part 1. In a battle between Lithuanian fighters, Zygimantas Kidikas making his pro debut goes up against his 2-0 opponent Ovidijus Pocius. Watch as Aleh Moshin (Belarus) faces Samuelis Sorochovas (Lithuania), Osvaladas Fedorovic takes on the less experienced Aurimas Krukauskas in a battle between Lithuanian fighters and Vladislav Shatunskui (Poland) battles against Gustas Dimsa (Lithuania). In addition Polish fighter Hubert Dylewski takes on Lithuanian Jan Naus in a very evenly matched fight.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 256 - KOK’84 World Series, Vilnius Part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents KOK '84 World Series from Vilnius Lithuania part 2. In this episode, watch as Ukrainian Volodymyr Hynzhu takes on Lithuanian Raimondas Avlasevicius, Finn Larsen (Ireland) goes up against the more experienced Nauris Lukosiunas (Lithuania) and Oleskil Mykhailo 9-0 (Ukraine) faces Henrikas Viksraitis 43-7(Lithuania). In the main event Lithuanians Zygimantas Ramaska and Vitoldas Jagelo face one another in an MMA Bushido battle with at title on the line.

programme.title: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Abdalla Ibrahim vs. Dionicio Gustavo
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 04
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 05
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Abdalla Ibrahim vs. Dionicio Gustavo
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 04
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: And Two If By Sea
programme.desc: The story of iconic professional surfers and identical twins CJ & Damien Hobgood. Their sibling rivalry and struggle to each establish their own identity fueled their careers, but ripped their personal and peripheral relationships apart.

programme.title: All Tha Way Live
programme.desc: From beaches to streets, All Tha Way Live takes you on a journey with some of the planet's best surfers.

programme.title: That's Caroline
programme.desc: Teen phenom Caroline Marks: pro at 13, now surging and set to represent her country.

programme.title: LENA
programme.desc: L E N A documents the purpose and persistent journey of the first German female big wave surfer.

programme.title: Lady Killers
programme.desc: Lady Killers follows top female surfers risking it all, featuring Moore, Marks, and Simmers in 4K action.

programme.title: No Contest: Off Tour
programme.desc: Florida’s long coast, heavy waves, and champ pedigree make it a best-kept surfing secret.

programme.title: No Contest: Off Tour
programme.desc: Explore Honolulu’s pristine waves, culture, community, and deep Hawaiian heritage.

programme.title: No Contest: Off Tour
programme.desc: Japan blends tradition, technology, and quality swell to emerge as a surf hotspot.

programme.title: No Contest: Off Tour
programme.desc: From Eastern Suburbs to Northern Beaches, dive into Sydney’s vibrant surf culture.

programme.title: The Curious Tales of Italo Ferreira
programme.desc: He was the world's first Olympic surfing gold medalist. Can the Brazilian surfing sensation Ítalo Ferreira now wrap up the World Surf League Championship Tour title for the second successive time?

programme.title: Let's Be Frank
programme.desc: Is Frank Solomon a kind-hearted surfer or a hard-living bad boy? The man and myth may be inseparable.

programme.title: Let's Surf Seriously
programme.desc: Surf like you mean it--grab surfing by the balls and twist them like a crocodile dragging a baby goat to its death! If you're gonna surf, do it for real, it's time. Let's surf seriously!

programme.title: Gold
programme.desc: Sterling discovers what it takes to rise to the top and become one with the ocean.

programme.title: Fish: The Surfboard Documentary
programme.desc:
Fish: the Surfboard Documentary, covers the impact the fish surfboard made on surf culture. A deep look at the origin and impact of the Fish Surfboard design and how it would influence surf culture 30 years later.
A look at what happens when a creative San Diego surfer invents a board with a brand-new shape, and the whole surfing world hops aboard for the ride. THE FISH SURFBOARD DESIGN was created by Steve Lis in the San Diego Cliffs area in 1967, and became HUGELY popular in the 1990's.

programme.title: 7 Miles of Paradise
programme.desc: The North Shore is a 7 Mile stretch of paradise like no other on Earth. Every year thousands of people flock to the North Shore of Oahu to see the world's best surfers ride arguably the world's best waves. Pro surfers have created their careers, made their livings and even become legends from surfing these shores. Pro surfer Anastasia Ashley will be your tour guide and take you to the places she loves, the places she went as a kid growing up there, and introduce you to the people that always made it feel like home. We will experience and understand why she loves the North Shore, and considers it '7 Miles of Paradise'

programme.title: The Essence of Surfing
programme.desc: The Essence of Surfing is a riveting surf documentary that gets to the heart of why surfing is the greatest sport in the world. Featuring surfers of all kinds, from the neighborhood grom to some of the greatest surfers to ever live, The Essence of Surfing uncovers what it is about this awesome sport that makes it a necessary part of each of their lives. Shot in the world's most beautiful locations by top notch Cinematographers Erik Ippel and Mike Prickett, this film is sure to hook and inspire anyone looking to get wet and catch some waves.

programme.title: S1E2 Lucha
programme.desc: Ian Hodgkinson, known as Vampiro in the world of wrestling, was a famed wrestler in the late 80’s and 90’s. Today, he shifted his career to being behind the scenes as a Story Producer for AAA, the top wrestling company in Lucha Libre. Hodgkinson intimately peels back the curtain on the mysteries of this show, how it’s produced, and what life is like on and off the stage. We dive deep in to the lives of two wrestlers and follow their stories as they prep for their next fight: El Hijo Del Fantasma, an up and coming star who seemingly has it all, as well as Faby Apache, a veteran female wrestler struggling to stay relevant as she raises her son.

programme.title: S1E1 Tour
programme.desc: Pursuing the Tour de France, one of the most physically demanding sporting events in the world, covers over 3,535 kilometers in just three weeks. Every young cyclist dreams of competing in this prestigious race, but only nine riders from each team make the cut. Young cyclist Adam Yates is giving everything he has to prove he belongs on cycling’s biggest stage. 2016 Tour de France winner Chris Froome reflects on the long and grueling journey to victory, while former professional cyclists and Tour de France veterans Jens Voigt, Christian Vande Velde, and Haimar Zubeldia reveal what it truly takes to compete at the highest level.

programme.title: S1E1 Animals
programme.desc: GoPro Animals delivers heartwarming, hilarious, and jaw-dropping moments from the animal world. From Golden Retrievers, French Bulldogs, and Border Collies bringing endless puppy smiles, to rescuing orcas and swimming with humpback whales, this show has it all. Wildlife photographer Chris Barnard captures the wild up close, even surviving a giraffe’s mighty kick. Plus, join Ocean Conservation Namibia as they race to save seals trapped in deadly ocean debris. A must-watch for every animal lover.
