programme.title: They Call Me The Godfather
programme.desc:
Welcome back to The Therapy Crouch! On this week’s episode Abbey and Peter are on hand to share some pearls of wisdom on what makes a good godparent, and some top tips on how to expertly navigate a thanks but no thanks conversation with your nearest and dearest.
In Agony Ab, Abbey and Peter are on hand to help when your better half suddenly decides to take up the gym 10 years too late and we hear from Louis, one of our international listeners who needs some advice on how to make the first move!
We hope you enjoy this very special episode from the OG Podfather and your fairy Podmother!

programme.title: The Therapy Crouch made some new friends....and they do not disappoint
programme.desc:
The moment you’ve all been waiting for has finally arrived! The Therapy Crouch has waited almost a year for this very special moment and boy was it worth it…
This week, we are joined by fellow podcasters and new best friends, James Buckley and Clair Buckley!
It’s fair to say that this is a bit of a milestone for the podcast and nothing was off the table in this no holds barred chat, from how to pity a girl into bed to James’ truly teeth woes.
They are also a welcome addition to Agony Ab couch, where we hear from a woman who is being constantly undermined in the workplace which Clair has some FANTASTIC advice for.
Do not miss this one!

programme.title: The Therapy Crouch - You May As Well Move In Then
programme.desc:
On this week’s episode, Pete provides a lesson on exactly how not to ask the love of your life to move in with you.
Learn more about Peter’s revolutionary invention, ‘The Squat Box’ and why you should never leave your home movie collection lying around when your future wife and mother-in-law are coming round for tea.
From Pet Detectives to interior design clashes, no stone is left unturned on The Therapy Crouch.

programme.title: The Therapy Crouch - Will You Marry Me?
programme.desc:
This week, Abbey and Peter provide a schooling session on how to nail the perfect proposal (spoiler: It does not involve chemtrails)
Weekly Whine club is also back, with Abbey and Peter going a bit more upmarket to celebrate the roaring success that is The Therapy Crouch! We learn why you can't trust Abbey to keep a clean car and how Peter is considering taking up a career modelling fake tan.
And, as always, Agony Ab is on hand to give you the listener some advice for your tricky relationship problems.
Enjoy!

programme.title: The Therapy Crouch - I WANT BONO
programme.desc:
On today’s episode, Abbey and Peter shed light on all the things they have in common, from nights in watching boxsets to nights out on the tiles.... and even their taste in men.
The pair also bond over their shared appreciation for all things Bono and Barry from Eastenders.
In the Weekly Whine Club, we learn why having a Victoria Secret’s model as a wife may not be as glamorous as it sounds and, rather ironically, that poor punctuality is one of Abbey’s pet hates.
In Agony Ab, we go international and provide assistance to some of our Spanish listeners and Pete gives tips on how to keep to spice alive (spoiler: it does not involve dressing up as a viking)

programme.title: The Sidwell’s: Steve and Krysy Sidwell on Marriage, Teenage Tear-Ups and Book Club Blunders
programme.desc:
On today’s episode of The Therapy Crouch, Abbey and Peter are joined by some of their oldest and closest friends - Steve and Krysy Sidwell.
In a friendship spanning two decades which has seen the couples share career paths, holidays and some outrageous nights out, this podcast is full of laughs and a behind the curtain, sneak peak into what it’s like being best friends with your favourite pair of podcasters!
Steve and Krysy discuss what they think has made their 20 year marriage stay rock solid after all these years and how they are navigating having three teenage boys who have developed of penchant for knocking seven bells of sh*t out of each other on a regular basis.
In the Agony Ab section, we hear from a listener who has some concerns about his wife’s recent fashion choices as well what to do in the awkward situation when someone likes you more than you like them - so stay tuned for that!!
Enjoy this week’s Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: David Walliams Talks Swimming the Channel, Austin Powers, Matt Lucas and Astrochimp!
programme.desc:
On today’s episode of The Therapy Crouch, Abbey and Pete are joined by actor, comedian and children’s author David Walliams who heard us shouting him out on a previous pod and decided to pop onto the couch for a chat!
David talks about his massive success in the world of children’s literature, his literary inspirations and why writing two books is never the same process.
He also weighs in on Abbey’s debut novel ‘Remember my name’ and gives a very special reading of the prologue which now has Abbey pondering if we should get this re released as an audio book!
In the Agony Ab section, we have a Shallow Hal-esqu scenario featuring a boyfriend who is getting worried about his girlfriend waistline woes and we have some very direct advice for a listener whose girls trip is in jeopardy due to the addition of some unwanted plus ones!

programme.title: Doggystyle
programme.desc:
In this week’s pod, Peter finally admits his love love for the young pup!! As expected, Abbey is less than magnanimous in success but there is no love lost between the pair.
In the weekly whine club, one of our golf widow listeners has been in touch, much to the detriment of the big man, and we also hear from a young scaffolder who’s struggling to enjoy a day evening off even on a cold wet Tuesday underneath the spotlights.
In one of our most F’d up Agony Abs of the series, a long time suffering housewife details her husbands perverted tea making skills and Abbey is on hand to give some advice to an unlucky in love recently singleton.
Enjoy this week’s Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: Father's Day
programme.desc:
On this week’s Therapy Crouch, Abbey and Peter sit down and have a chat about their recent Father’s Day festivities, with Pete having put in a slightly underwhelming performance on Mother’s Day, is it likely Abbey pulled out all the stops for him this year? There is only one way to find out!
To kick things off, Abbey and Peter share with us some of their favourite Dad jokes (that’s rubbish jokes, not jokes about Dads, Peter)
In Agony Ab, the gang are on hand to give some advice for when your best mate gets a new girlfriend and she is constantly up staging you in the best friend department. Abbey is also on hand for some reassuring advice for one of our listeners who has recently seen one of her flings develop into something more serious with potentially catastrophic consequences.
So sit back, relax and enjoy this weeks Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: Freaky Friday
programme.desc:
In this week’s Therapy Crouch, Abbey and Peter embrace their inner Jamie Lee Curtis and Lindsey Lohan and ponder one of life’s great questions…..what would you do if you found yourself in a Freaky Friday situation?
They look at which one of their heroes they would most like to switch with, what would be the first thing they’d do if they found themselves in the other’s body (parental guidance advised) and Peter answers a very tricky question regarding his mum and Abbey’s own Freaky Friday experience.
In Agony Ab, we hear from the only woman on the planet who is offended her husband believes she resembles Margot Robbie and Pete tries to help a sister out who’s in desperate need of some funny one liners for her Tinder profile.
Enjoy this week’s Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: Friends with (no) Benefits
programme.desc:
ADVISORY CONTENT WARNING: Unfortunately, our mics dropped out for the last 10 mins of this week’s episode so we apologise for the audio quality at the end of the ep......
Welcome to this week’s episode of the Therapy Crouch!
This week, Abbey has had some life affirming news and it has encouraged the gang to discuss all things friendship group related.
Ever found yourself stuck with a talkative boring Norman at a wedding? Or had the dreaded experience of when two of your close friends split up and you don’t know which one to keep? You’re not alone.
Abbey and Peter are here to give you some witty personal anecdotes, and advice on what to do if you ever find yourself in one of these sticky situations.
We also find out why Pete could be inline for the next Gucci modelling job and Abbey has some choice words for one of our listeners who has an issue with her attempt at an Italian accent.
It’s a cracker!

programme.title: Glastonbury....Part 1
programme.desc:
Welcome back to The Therapy Crouch! This week, your favourite couple take a sit down to spill the beans on all their Glastonbury planning and preparations. We have got some interesting ideas on how we can help Pete go incognito in the crowd (wig suggestions welcome) and Abbey gives a breakdown on how she is going to give Sir Elton John himself a run for his money when it comes to outfit changes.
In Weekly Whine Club you guys have been in touch to berate Peter about his skinny wrists and we also hear how you have incorporated this into your own daily lives with varying degrees of success.
Agony Ab is also back…but this time with a twist! Rather than our usual pearls of wisdom and relationship saving advice, we hear some of your best (and worst) festival stories….from burst sh*t pipes and POONCHO nightmares - nothing is off the cards.
Enjoy this week’s, Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: Glasto....Part 2
programme.desc:
It’s the one you have all been waiting for! After a rather hectic Glastonbury experience, a slightly worse for wear Therapy Crouch is here to dish the dirt on what went down at Worthy Farm.
The gang battle through some rather self-inflicted hangovers and lift the lid on their Glastonbury experience - expect a lot of Elton John chat, Abbey’s step count and the avoidance of the dreaded long drop….
Enjoy this week’s Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: Half Term from Hell
programme.desc:
Happy Therapy Crouch release day! In this week’s episode Abbey and Peter talk about their rather eventful Easter break spent with their nearest and dearest….as well as their four kids.
With Pete pondering why the little ones get such a long time off for Easter when Jesus himself only took 3 days, Abbey lets loose on some of their less-than-wholesome strolls in the park and trips to the beach.
During Weekly Whine Club, Pete’s shortcomings on all things technology based are exposed and we hear from one of our listeners whose husband is left rather unimpressed by one of her morning rituals.
In Agony Ab, we hear how one of our dear listeners is planning on throwing the wedding of a lifetime with his boyhood passion taking front and centre stage, and what to do when your gut feeling is telling you there is something wrong in the relationship.
We hope you enjoy this weeks episode of The Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: Here comes the Bride(maid) - The Therapy Crouch
programme.desc:
It has been a big week for Abbey - she finally popped her bridesmaid’s cherry for none other than her BFF Holly.
But before they spill the beans on the wedding of the year, they reminisce on what has been a rather eventful week. From halloween face paint fails to a Geoff Clancy fashion faux pas there is plenty to be unravelled here.
Abbey and Pete also take a surprising detour from the pod topic and reminisce on some of their school school day pranks and performances which brings a lot of happy memories flooding back.
In Agony Ab, we hear from a woman who has suffered the ultimate betrayal from her former best friend and we also hear from someone who got A LOT more than they bargained for when they went for their monthly mop chop.
Enjoy this week’s, Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: “I Want to Enrich my Own Life, No Disrespect” Abbey’s New Venture Announced!
programme.desc:
On today’s episode of The Therapy Crouch, Abbey has a VERY special announcement regarding an exciting new career move.
After admitting that she needs a little more enrichment in her life than the what she is getting from the lighthearted drivel we chat on the crouch couch, Abbey has launched a new podcast venture - Exhibit A.
The first episode with Mo Gawdat and Alice Law is OUT NOW watch it here:

programme.title: “Thanks Mark, You’ve Ruined the Pod!” Abbey and Pete’s #AMA
programme.desc:
Welcome back to The Therapy Crouch: Ask Us Anything series, the only place where you can get Abbey and Pete’s raw and unfiltered answers to YOUR burning questions!
On today’s episode it is almost over before it even begins after a cheeky question from listener Mark threatens to derail the whole thing!!
Another listener also gets in touch who has a great addition to one of our new favourite games which leads to some outrageous film titles reimagined!
And stick around until the end, where Abbey gives her verdict on her top podcast recommendations that will change your life!

programme.title: The Rulebreakers
programme.desc:
In this week’s episode of The Therapy Crouch, Abbey and Peter discuss their differing attitudes when it comes to parenting styles - expect fun dad and house management vibes.
And it isn’t just Abbey and Pete’s parenting styles that we get a glimpse into, but you guys as well! We hear from a couple whose attempts at confiscating their child’s Peppa Pig tablet backfired with some hilarious results.
In Agony Ab, we learn of a fairly new and sh*t cultural phenomenon called a ‘Sten do’ as well as what to do when you suspect the girl you’ve got your eye on may be playing the o’l treat them mean keep them keen tactics on you.
Enjoy this week’s Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: The Sidwell’s: Steve and Krysy Sidwell on Marriage, Teenage Tear-Ups and Book Club Blunders
programme.desc:

They are also a welcome addition to Agony Ab couch, where we hear from a woman who is being constantly undermined in the workplace which Clair has some FANTASTIC advice for.
Do not miss this one!

programme.title: The Therapy Crouch’s Christmas Party!!!
programme.desc:
It is a double celebration in the Crouch household after Scott pulled his finger out and asked the big Q - which has prompted some discussions on Abbey trading hers in for an upgrade (ring not fella)
Although it isn’t all festive cheer as the pair have been up to their usual antics and have come locked and loaded with multiple weekly whines - a lot of of them regarding the other’s fashion faux pas.
And fear not, we are not abandoning you guys with your own relationship woes, Agony Ab is still on the couch to help with your long distance heart ache and those of you who are struggling with husbands who have little to no interest in putting the Christmas tree up!! Bah humbug!
Enjoy this week’s Therapy Crouch

programme.title: To Dream The Impossible Dream
programme.desc:
In this week’s Therapy Crouch, Abbey and Peter take a while to sit down and discuss some of their dreams and aspirations both as a pair of youngsters and now as one of the UK’s most prominent power couples.
We hear about Abbey’s early days in Genie Queen - Liverpool’s answer to the Sugababes - and a young football protege with dreams of scoring 100 premier league goals and becoming the nation’s Podfather in the process.
We also hear from our lovely listeners with their Weekly Whines and Agony Abs. We hear about one of listeners whose girlfriend has being using their toothbrush for bit of DIY and a fellow NETTO alumni has been in touch with a playground anthem that has been sung for generations across Merseyside.
Enjoy this week’s Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: Top O' the Mornin to Ya
programme.desc:
In honour of St Patrick, the Therapy Crouch goes international and takes the team too Dublin.
Expect plenty of Guinness, Irish stew and questionable footwear chat.
In Agony Ab, we hear from one of our listeners whose boyfriend’s hairline is in desperate need of a trip to Turkey, and learn why Bondi Rescue and Home and Away may not be the best research tools used if you are planning to emigrate to Australia.
So Happy (belated) St Patrick’s day, we hope you enjoy this week’s episode of the Therapy Crouch!
Sláinte!

programme.title: Wedding Planning
programme.desc:
On today’s episode, we get an exclusive invite to the planning behind the wedding of the decade. From pre-match nerves to Elton John’s florist - learn more about the planning of the most important day of Abbey’s life (and probably Pete’s as well).
We also hear how Abbey feels how she has made a load of new friends since starting the podcast and why Peter is still struggling to show his face in the bakery after THAT famous incident.
And your favourite Agony Ab is back, helping to navigate the tricky waters of what to do when your girlfriend plans, and pays for, your wedding without your knowledge but on your credit card and how to get out of your sister’s OTT wedding prep.

programme.title: When Partying With Celebs Goes WRONG! Therapy Crouch #AMA
programme.desc:
On today’s episode of The Therapy Crouch #AMA, Abbey and Peter give a glimpse behind the curtain of what it’s really like partying with global superstars, and have some top tips on what to do when the party goes on a little too long….
By popular demand, Abbey is also revealing some of her tip top cleaning tips on how to get your house smelling just like the Crouch’s!
We hear from a listener who has concerns that her kids are knocking seven bells of sh*t out of each other on a regular basis and what best to do when your partner is going through the hormonal rollercoaster that is pregnancy
And stick around until the end when Abbey and Peter finally answer a MILLION DOLLAR QUESTION!
Enjoy this week’s, Therapy Crouch #AMA
If you want your question read out on the pod, hit the link below

programme.title: When You Are Too Old for Only Fans and Have to Create Your Own #OnlyGrans
programme.desc:
With one more week of the dreaded January blues left, we thought we would brighten up your day with a very special episode of The Therapy Crouch!
On today’s episode, Abbey and Peter are joined on the couch by Chattyman Alan Carr and his partner in crime Amanda Holden.
As you can probably guess, this episode was full of surprises, and explosive revelations. We hear Alans habits that drive Amanda up the wall, why you never want to take a trip to a marble quarry on a hangover and Alan’s disappointment at the fact he is less OnlyFans, more OnlyGrans….
They are also on hand to give advice to our listeners who are struggling with their ‘Mingebag’ husbands, groaning grannies and Judgey Dry Jan partners.
Enjoy this week’s, Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: Youth is Wasted on the Young
programme.desc:
It’s your favourite part of the week again! Therapy Crouch is back with a bang and this week Abbey and Peter lift the lid on some of their misspent youth activities.
Expect tales of underage discos enough to whip you up into a FRENZY and lessons how not to pull a sicky when you are battling your first hangover.
Agony Ab is on hand to provide some much needed guidance and comic relief for what to do when your husband has some interesting locations he likes to spend a penny or, even worse, thinks they’re the next Whitney Houston.
Enjoy this week’s Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: “I Want to Enrich my Own Life, No Disrespect” Abbey’s New Venture Announced!
programme.desc:

programme.title: Extraterrestrials, Memory Loss and Bedroom Antics: Therapy Crouch #AMA
programme.desc:
On today’s episode of The Therapy Crouch, Ask Us Anything, Abbey and Peter are back answering some of the hot topics that you guys want to know the answer too!
As is quickly becoming a bit of a tradition of this new weekly edition, we hear some weird and wonderful ‘would you rather’ questions the majority of which leave Abbey and Pete stumped on how you guys even come up with them!
We also tackle some more hard hitting questions, such as sleep talking, how to keep yourself occupied in the bedroom on a cold rainy day, and Abbey finally puts to bed the age old question of is their Alien life out there?
Enjoy this week’s Therapy Crouch, Ask Us Anything!

programme.title: Guilty Pleasures
programme.desc:
After the ribena-gate of last week, tune in to see if Ralphie made it to a second week in the Crouch family household.
This week, the Abbey and Peter are chatting about all things guilty pleasures. After hearing about a recent TikTok trend, Abbey is desperate to stay down with the kids and expose all the things that men secretly love but hate to admit, what could go wrong…..?
From their mutual taste in TV and the fact they are both more than partial to a bit of Simply Red, it is safe to say they both have more than their fair share of guilty pleasures they can expose the other one for.
As always, you guys have been in touch in search of some advice from the nation’s number 1 Agony AB! Abbey takes the role of hype queen for a woman who has been stuck with a guy suffering from Botox Bias and is on hand to help a young gent who is suffering from a 3 ft 5 neighbour from hell.

programme.title: Happy Halloween
programme.desc:
Keeping in the spirit of the spookiest day of the year, Abbey and Peter have donned their best outfits and are talking all things fright night.
Before delving into everything that gives them the heebie jeebies though, we have a recap on what could have potentially been the best week of Abbey’s life……so far.
There is some big name dropping in this week’s podcast, with Madonna, Frankie Dettori, Mick Hucknall of Simply Rouge and Mr Micky Mouse himself all getting honourable mentions.
It’s a laugh a minute on today’s Therapy Crouch, with Dad jokes galore, Pete’s biggest fears exposed and Abbey’s sharp scouse wit is in full swing to keep everyone in check.
In our Agony Ab section, Abbey and Pete are on hand to give advice on toenail health and maintenance as well as what to do when your hubby starts to neglect his hair and waistlines!
Happy Halloween from all the team at The Therapy Crouch!

On this week’s Therapy Crouch, Abbey and Peter sit down and have a chat about their recent Father’s Day festivities, with Pete having put in a slightly underwhelming performance on Mother’s Day, is it likely Abbey pulled out all the stops for him this year? There is only one way to find out!
To kick things off, Abbey and Peter share with us some of their favourite Dad jokes (that’s rubbish jokes, not jokes about Dads, Peter)
In Agony Ab, the gang are on hand to give some advice for when your best mate gets a new girlfriend and she is constantly up staging you in the best friend department. Abbey is also on hand for some reassuring advice for one of our listeners who has recently seen one of her flings develop into something more serious with potentially catastrophic consequences.
So sit back, relax and enjoy this weeks Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: Extraterrestrials, Memory Loss and Bedroom Antics: Therapy Crouch #AMA
programme.desc:
On today’s episode of The Therapy Crouch, Ask Us Anything, Abbey and Peter are back answering some of the hot topics that you guys want to know the answer too!
As is quickly becoming a bit of a tradition of this new weekly edition, we hear some weird and wonderful ‘would you rather’ questions the majority of which leave Abbey and Pete stumped on how you guys even come up with them!
We also tackle some more hard hitting questions, such as sleep talking, how to keep yourself occupied in the bedroom on a cold rainy day, and Abbey finally puts to bed the age old question of is their Alien life out there?
Enjoy this week’s Therapy Crouch, Ask Us Anything!

programme.title: Doggystyle
programme.desc:
In this week’s pod, Peter finally admits his love love for the young pup!! As expected, Abbey is less than magnanimous in success but there is no love lost between the pair.
In the weekly whine club, one of our golf widow listeners has been in touch, much to the detriment of the big man, and we also hear from a young scaffolder who’s struggling to enjoy a day evening off even on a cold wet Tuesday underneath the spotlights.
In one of our most F’d up Agony Abs of the series, a long time suffering housewife details her husbands perverted tea making skills and Abbey is on hand to give some advice to an unlucky in love recently singleton.
Enjoy this week’s Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: “Thanks Mark, You’ve Ruined the Pod!” Abbey and Pete’s #AMA
programme.desc:
Welcome back to The Therapy Crouch: Ask Us Anything series, the only place where you can get Abbey and Pete’s raw and unfiltered answers to YOUR burning questions!
On today’s episode it is almost over before it even begins after a cheeky question from listener Mark threatens to derail the whole thing!!
Another listener also gets in touch who has a great addition to one of our new favourite games which leads to some outrageous film titles reimagined!
And stick around until the end, where Abbey gives her verdict on her top podcast recommendations that will change your life!

programme.title: David Walliams Talks Swimming the Channel, Austin Powers, Matt Lucas and Astrochimp!
programme.desc:
On today’s episode of The Therapy Crouch, Abbey and Pete are joined by actor, comedian and children’s author David Walliams who heard us shouting him out on a previous pod and decided to pop onto the couch for a chat!
David talks about his massive success in the world of children’s literature, his literary inspirations and why writing two books is never the same process.
He also weighs in on Abbey’s debut novel ‘Remember my name’ and gives a very special reading of the prologue which now has Abbey pondering if we should get this re released as an audio book!
In the Agony Ab section, we have a Shallow Hal-esqu scenario featuring a boyfriend who is getting worried about his girlfriend waistline woes and we have some very direct advice for a listener whose girls trip is in jeopardy due to the addition of some unwanted plus ones!

programme.title: Therapy Crouchfest
programme.desc:
On today’s episode of The Therapy Crouch, Abbey and Peter take a while to take stock after the roaring success that was Crouchfest.
Never ones to take themselves too seriously, the gang talk all things fancy dress, gameshow parodies, music and everything in between.
Abbey also gives insight into their ‘Sunday Monday’ experience - a rare treat when the house is normally jam packed with four kids.
In the Agony Abs, we hear from a listener who is feeling pressured into going on a rather expensive family group holiday as well as a young couple who are struggling to decide if they want to have another baby, secure their nest or blow it all on the big day!
Enjoy this week’s, Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler - Help for the Hurting Heart Day 3
programme.desc: Loss can make you feel powerless, but grief is your work and your power. David Kessler guides you to grieve fully on your terms, honor your unique process, and reclaim agency over your healing, showing that you can live fully while holding your pain with strength.

programme.title: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler - Help for the Hurting Heart Day 4
programme.desc: Your survival mind is wired to protect you from pain, but after loss it can spiral into worry and worst-case thinking. Learn the science of grief, how repetitive thoughts form deep mental pathways, and how to rewire your mind to heal and grow.

programme.title: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler - Help for the Hurting Heart Day 5
programme.desc: Trauma overwhelms the heart and mind, but healing requires grief. This lesson guides you to honor your triggers as maps of pain and recovery, reclaim choice in how you live with trauma, and create space for healing while moving through grief with awareness and care.

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - Marilyn Monroe: Behind the Icon
programme.desc: Lisa Garr talks with Nina Boski, host of the podcast Behind the Icon, which explores Marilyn Monroe’s life & the circumstances around her passing. Decades after her death, she is still considered one of the most popular icons in Hollywood history.

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - Do Cultural Beliefs Impact Your Health?
programme.desc: Lisa Garr talks with clinical neuropsychologist and founder of Biocognitive science, Dr. Mario Martinez. He lectures worldwide on how cultural beliefs affect health and longevity more than genetics. He is the author of The MindBody Code."

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - Deeper Understanding of Your Soul
programme.desc: Lisa Garr talks with Serena Dyer Pisoni and Saje Dyer, daughters of international best-selling author & the “Father of Motivation” Wayne Dyer, who died suddenly in 2015. They share stories of growing up with him & reflect on his profound wisdom.

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - Science and Spirit
programme.desc: Lisa Garr talks with Mark Anthony, who is known as the “Psychic Lawyer,” about the intersection of science & spirit. His latest book is “The Afterlife Frequency: The Scientific Proof of Spiritual Contact & How That Awareness Will Change Your Life.”

programme.title: Smart Life - Smart Life S1E35
programme.desc: Ovarian Cancer with Dr. Ellen Schwartzbard, Improve Your Sleep with Janette Janero, Physical Therapy for Knee Osteoarthritis with Ron Yacoub

programme.title: Smart Life - Smart Life S1E36
programme.desc: Ask the Experts Segment with Dr. Gosha Brusovanik, Kids Making Healthy Choices with Lynne Kunnin, FLIPANY

programme.title: Smart Life - Smart Life S1E37
programme.desc: Student Athlete Injuries with Dr. Gosha Brusovanik, Cataract Surgery with Dr. Barry Schechter

programme.title: Smart Life - Smart Life S1E38
programme.desc: Addiction and Family Counseling with Dan Simmons, Hazelden Naples, Parkinson's Disease Therapies with Dr. Lisa Corsa, Healthy Eating on the Go with Jerome Turner, personal trainer

programme.title: Smart Life - Smart Life S1E39
programme.desc: Living with a Family Member with Disabilities with Yadira Torres, PHD, Veterans Care with Coralie Patterson and Richard Shutes, JCSFL, Hair Loss Overview with Dr. Alan Bauman

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series - Day 1: Yoga is Commitment
programme.desc: Day one of our challenge centers around commitment, so Kino is asking you start by going all in on 31 days of practice with her.

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series - Day 2: Strength Plank
programme.desc: Tune in and learn alignment and articulation in the body that will help you tap into new levels of strength.

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series - Day 3 Acceptance/Contentment Upward Facing Dog
programme.desc: Venture deep into the realm of body and mind in this sequence focused on an experience of santosha, the yogic notion of contentment.

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series - Day 4: Balance Tree Pose
programme.desc: Day 4 is about finding balance.

programme.title: Rooted In Wellness - Rooted in Wellness Autumn Smith EP 6
programme.desc: If your mind feels foggy or unfocused, your food could be the missing piece. Mona unpacks how nutrition impacts your brain, mood, and energy—offering simple shifts to nourish your body and sharpen your mind from the inside out.

programme.title: Rooted In Wellness - Darin Olien: Everyday Products that Are Making You Sick + How to Return to a Toxin-Free Lifestyle
programme.desc: In this episode of Rooted in Wellness, I’m joined by Darin Olien who explains the importance of nature and mindfulness practices for revolutionizing our health and happiness.

programme.title: Unsupersize Me
programme.desc: Unsupersize Me documents the inspiring story of personal trainer Juan-Carlos Asse and his quest to prove that a whole foods, plant based diet coupled with an exercise regimen is capable of remarkably improving the health of any and every individual.

programme.title: KASHF: THE LIFTING OF THE VEIL
programme.desc: A Pakistani man searches for the origins of his family curse.

programme.title: GURU - BHAGWAN HIS SECRETARY AND HIS BODYGUARD
programme.desc: The rise of guru Bhagwan and his model commune in Poona and oregon in the 1970s & 1980s told by his former close disciples, his personal secretary and bodyguard. A spiritual journey to the depths and shallows of the human soul.

programme.title: The Wright Turn - The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: La Dolce Vita (Sweet Life) - Ten years after the divorce from Maxwell Turner, with children grown, Celeste Wright Turner makes a choice to start living her life. No SEX with the EX! Simon and Mimi try to get Celeste’s head on straight when it comes to Maxwell’s charm. After facing an emotional challenge, Celeste decides to take a trip abroad.

programme.title: The Wright Turn - The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down
programme.desc: London Bridges Burning Down - Breakdowns are inevitable when Celeste tries to run from her past. Her therapist gives Celeste sound advice on how to spice up her sex life.

programme.title: The Wright Turn - The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up
programme.desc: Butter Me Up - Celeste returns back to Los Angeles after her journey. Her friends throw her a sex toy birthday party. When an old flame comes back, can he melt her butter? Nikki reveals a trauma from her childhood.

programme.title: The Wright Turn - The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace
programme.desc: Pearl Necklace - Can a long-desired gift bring Max and Celeste closer together? While Father Cross’s guilty pleasure is exposed, leaving a young family member seeking revenge and Celeste on his trail. A Fundraiser brings Maddy back to the stage with new comic material on the stage of Denim & Diamonds fundraiser for Autism Care Today.

programme.title: The Wright Turn - The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - Marci Shimoff
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Marci Shimoff.

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - Human Powered Health
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Laura Kunces and Cory Greenberg on the topic of Human Powered Health

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - Dr. Lisa Miller
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Dr. Lisa Miller.

programme.title: Smart Life - Smart Life S1E20
programme.desc: Ask the Expert Segment with Dr. Ileana Perez-Quintairos, An Alternative to Facelift with Dr. John Martin, What is Alzheimer's? with Michael Pearson, Alzheimer's Association

programme.title: Smart Life - Smart Life S1E21
programme.desc: Eating Healthy on a Budget with Natalie Castro, Robotic Surgery for Fertility with Dr. Armando Hernandez-Rey

programme.title: Smart Life - Smart Life S1E22
programme.desc: Recovery After Surgery with Matt Pack, Fitness Instructor, Pilates Reformer with Ginelle Ruffa

programme.title: Smart Life - Smart Life S1E23
programme.desc: Importance of Wellness Visits with Dr. Deepa Sharma, ing and Self-Defense with Jerome Turner, Meditation with Leslie Glickman, Yoga Instructor

programme.title: Smart Life - Smart Life S1E24
programme.desc: Ask the Experts with Dr. Harlan Selesnick, Cavities with Dr. Jose Blanco

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series - Yoga Is - Day 20 Equanimity Lolasana
programme.desc: Lolasana is a challenging position that offers a unique opportunity to experience balance and equanimity in both the body and mind.

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series - Yoga Is - Day 21 Unity Pigeon
programme.desc: For day 21 of our challenge we will explore this concept through the restorative Pigeon Pose.

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series - Yoga Is - Day 22 Energy Bakasana
programme.desc: Today's posture is Bakasana, a powerful arm balance that will help you find that energy in the arms, the core and the entire body.

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series - Yoga Is - Day 23 Love Gomukhasana
programme.desc: Day 23 is all about love. Start practice by tuning into breath and body, bringing a special attention to the heartspace. Take a moment for feeling into the vibration of the heart, welcoming a feeling of receptivity. Warm yourself up as Kino brings extra attention to opening the chest and front body. Next we segue into finding and loving your particular expression of Gomukhasana, the cow facing posture. Remember that the cow is a sacred symbol of giving and love as you feel into the postures heart opening effects.

programme.title: World’s Greatest Motivators - World’s Greatest Motivators David Meltzer
programme.desc: Starring DAVID MELTZER, and with special cameo appearance by boxing champion, Sugar Ray Leonard.

programme.title: World’s Greatest Motivators - World's Greatest Motivators - Mary Morrissey
programme.desc: Mary Morrissey, with cameo appearances by Les Brown, David Meltzer, Bob Proctor and special guest, celebrity boxer and motivator, Sugar Ray Leonard

programme.title: World’s Greatest Motivators - World's Greatest Motivators - Jack Canfield
programme.desc: Jack Canfield, with cameo appearance by David Meltzer, interviewer.

programme.title: World’s Greatest Motivators - World's Greatest Motivators - Blaine Bartlett
programme.desc: Blaine Bartlett, with cameo appearances by David Meltzer, Cynthia Kersey, John Assaraf and emcee, Paisley Demby.

programme.title: Millionaire Maker - Millionaire Maker - Fight or Flight
programme.desc: Shawn Meaike's Millionaire Maker is a new series that shows you what you're really worth. Shawn is confident he could pluck anyone - no matter their background or experience - and turn them into a 7-figure earner...IF, they have the right attitude and drive. This series is about Shawn selecting who he will mentor and teach to reach a level of success they never thought possible. Welcome to the toughest job interview of your life. In this episode, Shawn meets the contestants and immediately finds out who's actually willing to fight for the life they want.

programme.title: Millionaire Maker - Millionaire Maker - Uncomfortable Positions
programme.desc: Shawn only wants folks who are willing to be honest about their struggles because it shows you can be fearless. Everyone deserves a happy life...but he can only help you if you're ready to take a chance on yourself. In this episode, the candidates have to sell themselves. They have to tell Shawn their story because he wants to know how you got stuck...but more importantly, they have to convince him they won’t give up...no matter how hard it is to hang on, or take a leap of faith.

programme.title: Fund Tank - Fund Tank - Day 1 Distro
programme.desc: In the premiere episode of Fund Tank, viewers are introduced to Charlie Cimitile, an enterprising entrepreneur with a passion for the burgeoning cannabis industry. With a background in medical device sales, Charlie shares his journey of starting Day 1 Distro, an ancillary cannabis distribution company on the East Coast. Facing financial challenges and a desire for rapid growth, Charlie pitches his business to a panel of investors, laying out his vision for expanding his product offerings and capturing a larger market share.

programme.title: Fund Tank - Fund Tank - Aptivio
programme.desc: Guy Mounier, the CEO of Aptivio, seeks a $500,000 investment to expand his AI-driven lead generation business. Aptivio's AI engine, similar to ChatGPT, analyzes online behavior to identify potential clients. However, the investors express concerns about market saturation and the clarity of Aptivio's value proposition.

programme.title: Resonate Series - Pilot
programme.desc: Pilot episode of Resonate With Sara for Season 1

programme.title: Help Wanted
programme.desc: HELP WANTED is the story of an immigrant mechanic stuck in a middle-age malaise who learns to re-appreciate his life through the eyes of a confident new employee.

programme.title: BREAD. AN EVERYDAY MIRACLE
programme.desc: Bread is a branded product with an endless number of varieties and providers. But do we actually know what we eat every day? We meet small craft bakers who stand up for their quality and we meet CEOs who work on bread as an industrial mass product which becomes increasingly artificial. How can traditional bakery skills survive? And how will the future of bread look like?

programme.title: The Luminescence Podcast - Episode 1: The Orgasm Gap
programme.desc: Why do women orgasm less than men in heterosexual relationships? Schuyler Grant and experts Dr. Jolene Brighten, Dr. Marisa Snyder, and Rosie Acosta unpack the orgasm gap, clitoral anatomy, arousal vs. desire, and why penetration-focused sex falls short—plus practical tools for better intimacy and pleasure.

programme.title: The Luminescence Podcast - Episode 2: Sex Between Your Ears
programme.desc: Why does your libido disappear, your mood swing, and brain fog take over? Schuyler Grant and experts Dr. Jolene Brighten, Dr. Marisa Snyder, and Rosie Acosta explain how estrogen and progesterone shape your brain, especially in perimenopause, and share tools to calm your nervous system and take back control.

programme.title: The Luminescence Podcast - Episode 3: Vagina Conspiracies
programme.desc: Turned on but not wet? Schuyler Grant and experts Dr. Jolene Brighten, Dr. Marisa Snyder, and Rosie Acosta unpack arousal non-concordance, vaginal pH, estrogen’s role, and common myths. Learn what’s normal, when to seek care, and how vaginal health connects to overall wellbeing—science-based and shame-free.

programme.title: The Luminescence Podcast - Episode 1: The Orgasm Gap
programme.desc: Why do women orgasm less than men in heterosexual relationships? Schuyler Grant and experts Dr. Jolene Brighten, Dr. Marisa Snyder, and Rosie Acosta unpack the orgasm gap, clitoral anatomy, arousal vs. desire, and why penetration-focused sex falls short—plus practical tools for better intimacy and pleasure.

programme.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Julia Dorny
programme.desc: Over 800 Fights in her Life Professional MMA Fighter Julia Dorny, What get in Martial Arts when you train in over 6 Arts, you get the professional MMA Fighter in Julia Dorny! She is humble and amazing and is training for her upcoming fights. She is a podcaster with her show Women Hit Harder! Get ready and get involved in the conversation!

programme.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Denise Jones
programme.desc: From Hell to Heaven's Doors, From Crime to having Quality Time Author Denise Jones! We are about to get deep in conversation with a young lady that came from the Chicago Crime , drugs and Jail to coming out to finding the light of success and glory! This will take you through the pain and passion of what she and her mom went through, turn your speakers up and get inspired!

programme.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Kerry James
programme.desc: R&B Singer Kerry James influenced by his Icons..So he dedicated a song to his Mom! Kerry James born in Chicago, but moved to the King of Pop Michael Jackson hometown Gary, Indiana and started signing and has been accomplishing many milestones in his life. We had a blast with Kerry and all of the things that he has accomplished and other obstacles! Support this gentleman!

programme.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Robert Griffin
programme.desc: What you all need to know is that we had a blast with Robert Griffin aka Chief 1 Love, was talking about his journey and the love of the game! You are going to hear some great stories and you will have a great time watching!

programme.title: Health Insiders - Health Insiders S1E20
programme.desc: DR. GEORGIY BRUSOVANIK - Preparing for Surgery DR. DEREK PAPP & TORRE WASHINGTON - Types of Plant-Based Diets DR. MICHAEL SWARTZON - Hydration & Athletes

programme.title: Health Insiders - Health Insiders S1E21
programme.desc: MARCO BORGES & NATALIE CASTRO - Nutrition DR. JACOB STEIGER - Tech Neck DR. ITALO LINFANTE - Neuroradiology

programme.title: Health Insiders - Health Insiders S1E22
programme.desc: DR. LUIS RODRIGUEZ - Fractures DR. DANIEL MARTINEZ - Prostate Cancer DR. GEORGIY BRUSOVANIK - Preparing for Surgery

programme.title: Health Insiders - Health Insiders S1E23
programme.desc: DR. ANTHONY GONZALEZ - Obesity JASON MELAND - Sports Medicine DR. GEORGIY BRUSOVANIK - Preventing Infections Post-Surgery

programme.title: Good Morning Joy - Good Morning Joy - Imperfectly Perfect
programme.desc: Founder, Glenn Marsden, of Imperfectly Perfect Campaign, and Jeremy Jackson, former Baywatch star share their personal journeys with body dysmorphia and how it led to a worldwide campaign. A young man faces his fears and a tale of kindness at 30,000 ft.

programme.title: Good Morning Joy - Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing
programme.desc: Laura Di Franco, CEO of Brave Healer Productions, discusses brave healing and the power of sharing our stories. And, meet Oyen the ginger cat and adorable kids from India, along with Daaji redefining meditation for a joyful heart.

programme.title: Good Morning Joy - Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After
programme.desc: Join The Kitchen Psychic, Hannah McKitrick, as we talk ditching diets, embracing food freedom, and finding lightness in mind and body, alongside Susan Noles from The Golden Bachelor for some fun, and meditation leader Daaji discussing compassion.

programme.title: Good Morning Joy - Good Morning Joy - The New Boy Code
programme.desc: Raelene S. Weaver, author and TEDx speaker who's breaking barriers by normalizing boys' emotions. Witness a touching moment as a man in Italy feels a human touch after 30 years, and Daaji joins for another inspiring segment on our Soul Hugs series.

programme.title: Rooted In Wellness - 1. 5 Ways to Become Rooted in Wellness
programme.desc: In our very first solo episode of Rooted in Wellness, we explore the transformative power of being anchored like a sturdy tree—steady, grounded, and unwavering amidst life's storms. We'll illuminate how feeling rooted manifests as inner peace, emotional stability, and a profound connection with yourself and the world around you.

programme.title: Rooted In Wellness - Dr. Mindy Pelz: How to Become Hormonally Literate through Ancient Healing Practices
programme.desc: Have you ever felt like your hormones are playing a tune out of sync with your well-being? Chances are, they probably are. The good news? There's a transformative journey waiting for women when they realign with nature, pay attention to their meals, and practice intermittent fasting the right way.

programme.title: Rooted In Wellness - Dr. Casey Means: Finding Optimal Metabolic Health through Ancient Wisdom
programme.desc: Did you know that your metabolic health and energy are controlled by our modern food? This means your metabolism is not broken! You just need to work on healing your metabolism through simple lifestyle shifts you can easily apply to your life today.How? This is what we dive into in this episode of Rooted in Wellness with Casey Means.

programme.title: Rooted In Wellness - Wade Lightheart + Matt Gallant: Plant-Based Muscle Building, Digestion Optimization + Balancing Urban Life
programme.desc: Do you feel both captivated and exhausted by city life? Are the conveniences worth the chaos? In this episode of the Rooted in Wellness podcast, join me, Wade Lightheart, and Matt Gallant as we explore the challenges of maintaining balance in busy urban environments and the serene contrast of ashram life.

programme.title: Capturing Grace
programme.desc: The Mark Morris Dance Group works with Parkinson's patients.

programme.title: ALCOHOL - THE MAGIC POTION
programme.desc: Alcohol is the world’s most powerful drug. Four billion people drink it regularly and the number is rising. Of the world’s 30 countries with the highest per capita alcohol consumption, no fewer than 26 are in Europe. Big business with 3 million victims each year. But who profits from all this?

programme.title: HEAL
programme.desc: Director Kelly Noonan Gores’ HEAL takes us on a scientific and spiritual journey where we discover that our thoughts, beliefs, and emotions have a huge impact on our health and ability to heal. We have more control over our health and life than we have been taught to believe.

programme.title: Resonate Series - Pilot
programme.desc: Pilot episode of Resonate With Sara for Season 1

programme.title: Help Wanted
programme.desc: HELP WANTED is the story of an immigrant mechanic stuck in a middle-age malaise who learns to re-appreciate his life through the eyes of a confident new employee.

programme.title: HEAL
programme.desc: Director Kelly Noonan Gores’ HEAL takes us on a scientific and spiritual journey where we discover that our thoughts, beliefs, and emotions have a huge impact on our health and ability to heal. We have more control over our health and life than we have been taught to believe.

programme.title: Sex Talk - Sex Talk - A Satisfying Sex Life as You Age
programme.desc: Age and orgasms - how to stay satisfied when your body won't cooperate. Plus, is everyone else really having more sex than you are? This and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.

programme.title: Sex Talk - Sex Talk - Choosing the Right Sex Toy
programme.desc: Wondering how to choose the sex toy that is right for you? Plus, we'll explore the healthy habits of couples who are having great sex. All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - Susan Miller
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Susan Miller

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - Andrew Harvey
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Andrew Harvey

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - Cynthia Schwartzberg and Beth Medina
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Cynthia Schwartzberg and Beth Medina

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - Tom-Crystal and Marcus Bethea
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Tom-Crystal and Marcus Bethea

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - Spring Washam
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Spring Washam

programme.title: HealthDay - What You Need to Know about the 988 Hotline
programme.desc: In this episode, we are joined by members of the National Action Alliance for Suicide Prevention to talk about the 988 suicide and crisis lifeline, discussing how the lifeline works and what more needs to be done to ensure equitable support for everyone.

programme.title: HealthDay - Fighting Heart Disease
programme.desc: The president of the American College of Cardiology joins us to discuss how heart disease is the leading cause of death in American women, and how different factors and treatments can lower or worsen your risk of cardiovascular disease.

programme.title: HealthDay - Why Are Allergies Getting Worse Every Year?
programme.desc: Medical experts meet to discuss seasonal allergies and why each spring brings more intense allergy symptoms than the last.

programme.title: Good Morning Joy - Good Morning Joy - Power of Positivity
programme.desc: Social media personality Bruce W. Brackett details his triumph over addiction and trauma giving hope to all facing challenges. Plus, head to Rhode Island for a heartwarming tale where students make dreams come true for a security guard.

programme.title: Good Morning Joy - Good Morning Joy - Speaking with the Heart
programme.desc: Dr. Heather Browne is a master at transforming conversations between couples. She shares how she helps couples bridge divides and cultivate more fulfilling relationships. Plus, we are back in India chatting with some cute kids and sharing good news.

programme.title: Good Morning Joy - Good Morning Joy - Unleash Your Inner Warrior
programme.desc: Hollywood star, Sean Kanan, helps you unleash your inner warrior and change your life with his new book. We head to Rochester, NY, for a party that has been 46 years in the making. And we go international with inspiring conversations from India and Italy!

programme.title: Play To Win - Play To Win- Episode 1
programme.desc: "Play To Win" pits a group of contestants from around the world against one another for a chance to compete for a life-changing job or a six-figure coaching opportunity with the HIGDON GROUP.

programme.title: Play To Win - Play To Win- Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode contestants not only travel from the other side of the world to compete - but they overcome some of the most horrific stories you will ever hear in your life.

programme.title: Play To Win - Play To Win- Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode is all about HOW to demonstrate your worth and we've never seen so many people pour themselves out and completely rebuild like we saw in this episode.

programme.title: Play To Win - Play To Win- Episode 4
programme.desc: Getting attention for yourself or for a product is one of the most difficult things you will ever be faced with. We devised a unique marketing challenge unlike any of the previous episodes.

programme.title: Fund Tank - Fund Tank - IKW Solutions
programme.desc: Matthew Aarsvold, the owner and president of IKW Solutions, takes center stage, seeking $1,000,000 to elevate his innovative software, Constantly Current. This cutting-edge prototype promises to transform Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems by ensuring they remain updated seamlessly, offering potential time and cost savings for businesses.

programme.title: Fantastic Fungi: Remastered
programme.desc: Fantastic Fungi Remastered is a breathtaking journey into the hidden world of mycelium. Through stunning imagery and expert insights, the film reveals fungi’s beauty, intelligence, and power to heal, inspire, and offer solutions for our planet’s future.

programme.title: Road To Dharma - Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath
programme.desc: Emptiness and Power in the Gap. The stunning Tungnath Peak at 13,000 ft, the Feminine Temple above the Masculine. Ken goes from rational doubter to having an experience beyond understanding that relates to his deceased sister. Unfortunately, the experience is tainted by ignorance and the seemingly inspiring day is further marred when Anna has an accident…

programme.title: Road To Dharma - Real Love at Badrinath
programme.desc: Badrinath – Reverberating with thousands of years of yogic wisdom… But Jeff won’t even wear a helmet. You try and talk to him, he won’t listen to me, says Jen. The ebb and flow of relationships and how to sustain them is found here in Badrinath, the temple of Naryana, the sustainer. This isn’t religious, it is all about getting empty and receiving the wisdom of the sages in the great Himalayas.

programme.title: Fantastic Fungi: Remastered
programme.desc: Fantastic Fungi Remastered is a breathtaking journey into the hidden world of mycelium. Through stunning imagery and expert insights, the film reveals fungi’s beauty, intelligence, and power to heal, inspire, and offer solutions for our planet’s future.

programme.title: A Return To Wholeness - A Return To Wholeness - Human Nature vs. Modern Culture
programme.desc: As humans, we need interconnection: We rely on others to survive, especially as children. Yet, we also strive for authenticity. This creates an inherent tension. In this lesson, Dr. Maté discusses what is true human nature — and how the modern world has warped our understanding of our needs.

programme.title: A Return To Wholeness - A Return To Wholeness - Approaching Trauma with Curiosity and Compassion
programme.desc: Trauma is a wound that you sustain; it's not what happened to you. In this lesson, Dr. Maté explains why traumatic wounds get triggered and how to understand triggers in your process of transformation and healing.

programme.title: Commune Meditation Summit - CMS - Michael B. Beckwith
programme.desc: In this lesson, you will focus on the gift of the body temple, which is the signature for revealing life, love, peace, joy, wisdom, harmony, and abundance. When the body’s temple is healthy, you can hold more energy. More of life’s cosmic energy can flow through you.

programme.title: Commune Meditation Summit - CMS - Preethaji
programme.desc: Every one of us, at any point in time, is living in one of two states of being. We are either in a suffering state or we are living in a beautiful state. When you are in a beautiful state of connection, you enter a new realm where synchronicities unfold, where the randomly moving universe arranges itself into patterns to fulfill your heart's desires. Use this meditation practice to manifest heart-felt intentions in your life.

programme.title: Commune Meditation Summit - CMS - Tracee Stanley
programme.desc: In this grounding meditation, allow yourself to let go and relax your mind and body so you can slip into a state of deep rest and rejuvenation.

programme.title: Breath, Body, Beats with Schuyler Grant - Breath, Body, Beats with Schuyler Grant - Day 1: Breathing with the Beats
programme.desc: Welcome to Day 1! Congratulations on making this powerful commitment to yourself and giving yourself the gift of flow state. Research shows that if you cultivate the flow state in your daily life, the benefits touch every part of your life—job performance, peace of mind, creativity, and your own sense of purpose. Connecting to the breath is that powerful. Remember that it’s important to have your blocks and yoga blanket or thick towel. If you find yourself empty-handed, you can always DIY your own. In this first class, you will learn key postures and proper shoulder alignment to establish a foundation for this challenge. (Upcoming classes include less talking and more flowing, but this one is important for everything that follows, so stick with it!)

programme.title: The Wellness Master Class - The Wellness Master Class: Energy & Motivation
programme.desc: As we prepare for Day 1 tomorrow, celebrate yourself for setting out on the path to lasting, exuberant wellness. Come to the course with an open mind for earnest personal dialogue and you’ll lay the groundwork for better performance, better experiences, and true depth to your life.

programme.title: Live Fearlessly with Anita Moorjani - Welcome to Live Fearlessly with Anita Moorjani
programme.desc: In this course, Anita Moorjani guides you toward loving yourself as if your life depends on it – because it does! When love (rather than fear) determines your life, you will recognize what is truly important for you to be happy and healthy.

programme.title: Live Fearlessly with Anita Moorjani - Life Lessons from Almost Dying NEW
programme.desc: Today, Anita shares what her near-death experience taught her about how to live. You’ll discover why everything we have learned through our education system, government, mass media, etc. is the exact opposite of what we should know in order to create a meaningful, joy-filled life.

programme.title: Qigong: The Eight Brocades - Qigong: The Eight Brocades - Day 1
programme.desc: Qigong is considered one of the five branches of Chinese Medicine, a foundational basis for martial arts, and a long-standing spiritual practice revered in Daoist and Zen traditions. In this video, your qigong teacher, Mimi Kuo-Deemer, introduces you to the etymology of qigong and the history of the 8 Silk Brocades you will practice in this course.

programme.title: Grounding Into Grace - Jump In With Both Feet
programme.desc: If you want to build a dynamic yoga practice from the ground up, we must start with the feet. This class encourages you to open and awaken the many muscles of the feet before moving through a flowing sequence of standing postures. End class with hamstring lengthening and a gentle, restorative backbend.

programme.title: Gut Health with Dr. Mary Pardee - Day 1: Introduction to Gut Health
programme.desc: Over the course of the next 10 days, you're going to get the full scoop on, well, poop but plenty more such as the role that our nutrition, nervous system, and hormones play in our gut health. What happens in the gut does not stay in the gut, and we will discuss how important the gut-brain connection is for our health and wellness optimization.

programme.title: Gut Health with Dr. Mary Pardee - Day 2: The Gut-Brain Connection
programme.desc: For day 2, we'll look at the connection between the gut and the brain. We'll also practice mindful eating.

programme.title: Ecstatic Breathwork - Body: The First Reality
programme.desc: Breathwork has tangible effects on the physical body, too. In this practice, the nervous system shifts from a sympathetic to parasympathetic state, into a mode of ‘rest and digest,’ where insights and intuitions arise effortlessly.

programme.title: The Emerging Science of Longevity - The Emerging Science of Longevity: Secrets to Healthy Aging
programme.desc: The body has inherent systems to slow and even reverse aging. When you activate these systems you increase stem cell production, reduce inflammation, increase antioxidant enzymes, build muscle, lose fat, and increase cognitive capacity.

programme.title: Peace of Mind Parenting - Peace of Mind Parenting - Day 1: Positive Parenting in a Pandemic
programme.desc: Today, you'll learn solutions to this work, life, and parenting balancing problem many of us are experiencing during this pandemic. You're never going to be perfectly in balance, particularly during this time. But you’ll learn how to be aligned with your goals, values, and intentions.

programme.title: Weight Loss Master Class - Weight Loss Master Class - This Is Why You 'Can’t Lose Weight'
programme.desc: The media tells you, 'Don’t worry! You’re big and you’re beautiful.' That you are healthy at any size. Nice to hear, but it simply isn’t true. Pharma companies and many in the medical community are now going to tell you it’s genetic — a disease of the brain that results in an insatiable hunger. They do this because surgeries and weight loss drugs are profitable. In this lesson, we will address these issues one by one.

programme.title: Break Out of the Addiction Frequency - Section 1: The Addiction Frequency & The Power of Breath
programme.desc: Breathing is the single most important thing we do. Addiction is characterized by a sense of lack, of missing something. And when you breathe poorly, like when anxious or angry, you’re caught up in your head and aren’t breathing well and that sends a signal to your body that perpetuates the addiction frequency. Deep, long breathing is how we interrupt this pattern.

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie - My Mother Terrifies Me
programme.desc: The way you recall a memory and the way it actually happened might be completely different. The question is, do you know which version feeds you? We can become so wrapped up in our recollections, we convince ourselves of these untruths. Is that person a monster? Were they wishing you harm? Or were they dealing with a difficult situation in the best way they knew how?

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie - I Want to Be Famous
programme.desc: Stop focusing on the object of your desires and start focusing on the reason for desiring that object in the first place. When you turn it around, you may find that what you really want is completely different than what you’ve been telling yourself.

programme.title: Spiritual Makeover with Marianne Williamson - Spiritual Makeover - Part 1
programme.desc: This is not a religious course; rather, it’s a universal system based on love. You think you have many different problems, but you have only one — the illusion of your separation from God, the true nature of reality. We get trapped in illusions (and create our own suffering) when we over-identify with a particular problem or stay stuck in fear-based thinking. This program is here to remind you of a key universal principle: Only love is real.

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson - Relationships: Relationships and Your Spiritual Journey
programme.desc: Today's lesson is a bit of a reality check, as we'll begin to question the current way we look at relationships, romantic or not. How we see ourselves and our relationship to God influences our view of our relationships with other people. Today we're going to examine that view from a place of love.

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson - Relationships: Overcoming the Ego Mind
programme.desc: In the following lesson, we'll discover how the ego mind influences both our way of thinking and our relationships. We'll also identify the unconscious barriers we've built that cause us to form these judgments and thoughts. That's where the problem is, and that's where the solution lies.

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson - Relationships: How to Have Miraculous Relationships
programme.desc: A miracle happens when you stop thinking with fear and start thinking with love. Your greatest power lies in your mind. To establish stronger connections, you need to go into every situation requesting to be an instrument of love. When you approach your interactions with love, you'll begin to have more miraculous relationships.

programme.title: Hacking Your Healthcare - Day 1: Health Care vs. Sick Care
programme.desc: Today, we talk about a revolutionary approach to health called Functional Medicine, and how you can have a healthy doctor-patient relationship.

programme.title: Hacking Your Healthcare - Day 2: Vital Signs
programme.desc: Today we start with a discussion of reference ranges, and how what medicine considers as “normal” may not be optimal for your health

programme.title: Yoga For All - Yoga For All Day 1: Notice
programme.desc: Your Day 1 practice offers an invitation to slow down and take stock.

programme.title: Yoga For All - Day 2: Befriend
programme.desc: Your Day 2 session invites you to use the tools of the at-home yoga practice to befriend your body and your breath. Build on the art of noticing from Day 1 as we expand our vocabulary with a focus on a strong foundation. This session encourages a healthy flow of energy up and down the spine and lovingly guides you to learn how to take responsibility for your experience on the mat.

programme.title: The Wright Turn - The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: La Dolce Vita (Sweet Life) - Ten years after the divorce from Maxwell Turner, with children grown, Celeste Wright Turner makes a choice to start living her life. No SEX with the EX! Simon and Mimi try to get Celeste’s head on straight when it comes to Maxwell’s charm. After facing an emotional challenge, Celeste decides to take a trip abroad.

programme.title: The Wright Turn - The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down
programme.desc: London Bridges Burning Down - Breakdowns are inevitable when Celeste tries to run from her past. Her therapist gives Celeste sound advice on how to spice up her sex life.

programme.title: The Wright Turn - The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up
programme.desc: Butter Me Up - Celeste returns back to Los Angeles after her journey. Her friends throw her a sex toy birthday party. When an old flame comes back, can he melt her butter? Nikki reveals a trauma from her childhood.

programme.title: Fantastic Fungi: Remastered
programme.desc: Fantastic Fungi Remastered is a breathtaking journey into the hidden world of mycelium. Through stunning imagery and expert insights, the film reveals fungi’s beauty, intelligence, and power to heal, inspire, and offer solutions for our planet’s future.

programme.title: HEAL
programme.desc: Director Kelly Noonan Gores’ HEAL takes us on a scientific and spiritual journey where we discover that our thoughts, beliefs, and emotions have a huge impact on our health and ability to heal. We have more control over our health and life than we have been taught to believe.

programme.title: Fantastic Fungi: Remastered
programme.desc: Fantastic Fungi Remastered is a breathtaking journey into the hidden world of mycelium. Through stunning imagery and expert insights, the film reveals fungi’s beauty, intelligence, and power to heal, inspire, and offer solutions for our planet’s future.

programme.title: HEAL
programme.desc: Director Kelly Noonan Gores’ HEAL takes us on a scientific and spiritual journey where we discover that our thoughts, beliefs, and emotions have a huge impact on our health and ability to heal. We have more control over our health and life than we have been taught to believe.

programme.title: The Highest Pass
programme.desc: Part heart-pounding adventure, part spiritual quest, THE HIGHEST PASS, a feature length documentary, premiered in Los Angeles to sold out audiences. The award-winning film shares the journey of seven seekers, including one who has never ridden a motorcycle, who follow a guru with a Vedic death prophecy on a moto journey up to the highest pass of the Indian Himalayas. Over 21 days and up to an elevation of 18,000 feet along a winding road, they never let low oxygen, altitude sickness, river-flooded roads, icy edges, snow and loaded trucks dampen their spirits or, ultimately, their deeper selves.

programme.title: HealthDay - Medical Gaslighting: How to Avoid It
programme.desc: We speak with experts about how to protect yourself from medical gaslighting, and other things you should know before you visit a doctor or dentist.

programme.title: HealthDay - The Truth About Vitamins
programme.desc: Nutrition expert Dr. Thunder Jalili joins us to discuss why Americans spend more than $30 billion a year on dietary supplements, despite decades of research disputing their ability to improve health outcomes.

programme.title: HealthDay - Diabetes: The Path to a Cure
programme.desc: Dr. Robert Gabbay, chief scientific and medical officer of the American Diabetes Association, speaks with us about new preventative drugs and devices for diabetes patients, and how much progress has been made in the path towards a cure.

programme.title: HealthDay - Inside the Latest Health Technology
programme.desc: In our medical technology episode, we explore how patients can use mobile apps to monitor and treat chronic conditions, discuss the positive and negative effects of video games on children, and look at how robotic pets are being used to assist people with dementia.

programme.title: HealthDay - What You Need to Know about the 988 Hotline
programme.desc: In this episode, we are joined by members of the National Action Alliance for Suicide Prevention to talk about the 988 suicide and crisis lifeline, discussing how the lifeline works and what more needs to be done to ensure equitable support for everyone.

programme.title: HealthDay - Fighting Heart Disease
programme.desc: The president of the American College of Cardiology joins us to discuss how heart disease is the leading cause of death in American women, and how different factors and treatments can lower or worsen your risk of cardiovascular disease.

programme.title: HealthDay - Why Are Allergies Getting Worse Every Year?
programme.desc: Medical experts meet to discuss seasonal allergies and why each spring brings more intense allergy symptoms than the last.

programme.title: HealthDay - What's Next for the CDC?
programme.desc: We’re joined by the former chief of staff at the CDC to discuss what the agency learned during the COVID-19 pandemic and how it plans to move forward. We’ll also take a look at the long-term effects of COVID and how you can boost your vaccine’s effectiveness even further.

programme.title: HealthDay - Maternity Risks
programme.desc: We’re joined by the president and CEO of March of Dimes to discuss the risks that pregnant women — particularly women of color — still face in the United States.

programme.title: HealthDay - The Future of Mental Health Treatment
programme.desc: In this episode, we take a look at the mental health benefits of healthy eating and exercising and explore the future of depression treatment, while debunking popular myths about causes and cures for depression.

programme.title: Sex Talk - Sex Talk - It’s Alright to Talk About Sex
programme.desc: A man gets terrible headaches right at the height of passion. And a woman won’t talk about her sexual desires. What should her partner do? All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.

programme.title: Sex Talk - Sex Talk - Is There Really a G Spot?
programme.desc: A man wonders if he should look for love while his wife battles dementia and the classic tale of the G spot gets a rewriting. This week on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.

programme.desc: A man falls asleep during sex. Is it a medical emergency? And could testosterone gel be the cure for painful sex in seniors? All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.

programme.desc: Want to keep the fires burning even when you’re too tired? Got questions about how long ED medications last? We break it down on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.

programme.desc: Keeping it sexy between the sheets is possible even without the big “O” and a man wonders if he can get intimate post-heart attack. All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.

programme.desc: Self-confidence is sexy, but how do you get it? Plus, what happens in Vegas doesn't stay in Vegas. Avoiding sexually transmitted infections after casual sex on vacation. All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - Marci Shimoff
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Marci Shimoff.

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - Human Powered Health
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Laura Kunces and Cory Greenberg on the topic of Human Powered Health

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - Anita Moorjani
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Anita Moorjani

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show: Dr Harley Rotbart - No Regrets Parenting
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Dr. Harley Rotbart, a nationally renowned infectious diseases specialist, pediatrician, parenting expert, speaker, and educator who discusses his latest book No Regrets Parenting: Turning Long Days and Short Years into Cherished Moments with Your Kids. He shares special keys for parents to guide children to live a life of wonder and contentment by conscious parenting.

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show: Dr. Michael Tobin - Secrets to a Loving Relationship
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews marital and family psychologist Dr. Michael Tobin who believes the secret to a happy, long-lasting relationship is mutual respect for one another. He’s been with his life partner, soulmate, and wife, Deborah, for 47 years, and in practice as a psychologist for more than 45 years. His most recent book, Riding the Edge, A Love Song to Deborah, chronicles his six-month transformative journey.

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show: Dr. Cari Schaefer - Feel Better with Optimal Hormone Health
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Dr. Cari Schaefer, DACM, an expert in hormones who specializes in fertility and menopause. She is the best-selling author of the book, The Food Solution. As a healthcare expert and provider, educator, and lecturer, she is also the founder of Wise Woman Emerging, a platform designed to midwife women through the menopausal change. She is a Doctor of Traditional Chinese Medicine with more than 21 years of experience.

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show: Marci Shimoff and Dr. Sue Morter - Your Year of Miracles 2022
programme.desc: Host LisaGarr interviews Marci Shimoff , No. 1 NYT bestselling author, world-renowned transformational teacher, and an expert on happiness, success, and unconditional love, and Dr. Sue Morter, international speaker, Master of Bio-Energetic Medicine and Quantum Field visionary. Marci is the founder of Your Year of Miracles, a yearly online program with Dr. Sue and Lisa Garr in which they discuss the numerous ways of living a truly miraculous life

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show: John Assaraf - The Power to Change
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews John Assaraf, one of the leading high performance, success coaches in the world. He is a behavioral neuroscience researcher who has written four books including two NYT bestsellers and has been featured in 11 movies. He is CEO of MyNeuroGym.com, a neuroscience-based company, dedicated to helping individuals strengthen their mindset and skills, so they achieve their goals and dreams. Info: theawareshow.com/brainathon.

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - Power of Intentions
programme.desc: Today Lisa Garr discusses the power of intentions with best-selling author and international speaker Lynne McTaggart. An expert in consciousness, and editor of the magazine “What Doctors Don’t Tell You,” Lynne suggests going for “small wins” which all add up to greater success and flourishing health. Info: lynnemctaggart.com.

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - Keep Calm in Chaotic Times
programme.desc: How can we remain calm and centered during stressful times? Today Lisa talks about meditation with Sister Dr. Jenna, an acclaimed spiritual mentor committed to bridging divides in societies and building relationships between global influencers. Info: meditationmuseum.org.

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - Healthy Fats that Heal
programme.desc: Today Lisa speaks with Udo Erasmus, best-selling author of “Fats that Heal, Fats that Kill.” As an expert in health and healing, he talks about “good fats,” healthy eating, and ways to reconnect to the self and live a life of thriving! Info: Udoschoice.com.

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - College Admissions Scams Exposed
programme.desc: Lisa Garr talks with Fast Company Senior writer Nicole LaPorte. She researched the divide between the haves & have-nots including examining the vicious competitiveness of college admissions, bribes & lack of ethics within certain departments.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 172
programme.desc: Discover the stunning Pershing GTX116, the iconic Donzi XLV at PIBS, the rugged Tidewater 3100 Carolina Bay, and the luxurious Nordhavn N 51 Awanui in this episode, showcasing performance, adventure, and unparalleled craftsmanship.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 179
programme.desc: Experience the elegance of the Riva 82 Diva and the innovative design of the MJM 4 in this episode, showcasing luxury and performance in modern yachting.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 181
programme.desc: This episode showcases two Italian icons: the exhilarating Pershing GTX70 Sport Yacht, a 35-knot performance cruiser with a stunning fold-out beach club, and the ultimate luxury sailing escape aboard a Sailuxe Spartivento crewed catamaran, featuring five-star service and gourmet cuisine.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 188
programme.desc: The segment showcased four key boats: the Prestige M7 luxury power catamaran, the long-range, efficient Grand Banks 62 motor yacht, the versatile Regal 43 SAV sport vessel with fold-down terraces, and the rugged offshore fishing center console Boston Whaler 280 Outrage.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 192
programme.desc: This episode is dedicated to performance and versatility, highlighting the 50-knot Italian maxi-RIB Mar.co E44 with its luxury cabin. It also covers three premier US fishing boats: the wide-beamed Southport 38 FE (PBIBS 2025), the serious offshore Bertram 39 CC (PBIBS 2025), and the versatile hybrid bay boat Blackfin 262 HB (MIBS 2025).
