It also covers three premier US fishing boats: the wide-beamed Southport 38 FE (PBIBS 2025), the serious offshore Bertram 39 CC (PBIBS 2025), and the versatile hybrid bay boat Blackfin 262 HB (MIBS 2025).

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 200
programme.desc: We dive into the raw power and timeless lines of the Baia Atlantica 84 before shifting gears to the stylish versatility of the Ranieri International 255 SL

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 199
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore the sheer elegance of the new Swan 128 flagship and take a high-speed look at the versatile Ranieri Sauvage 24

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 204
programme.desc: Admire the sleek lines and performance-driven design of the Solaris 55, then celebrate four decades of nautical history with the special edition Ranieri Azzurra 40th

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 172
programme.desc: Discover the stunning Pershing GTX116, the iconic Donzi XLV at PIBS, the rugged Tidewater 3100 Carolina Bay, and the luxurious Nordhavn N 51 Awanui in this episode, showcasing performance, adventure, and unparalleled craftsmanship.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 179
programme.desc: Experience the elegance of the Riva 82 Diva and the innovative design of the MJM 4 in this episode, showcasing luxury and performance in modern yachting.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 181
programme.desc: This episode showcases two Italian icons: the exhilarating Pershing GTX70 Sport Yacht, a 35-knot performance cruiser with a stunning fold-out beach club, and the ultimate luxury sailing escape aboard a Sailuxe Spartivento crewed catamaran, featuring five-star service and gourmet cuisine.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
This week the lads are sitting down with the Blackburn, Tottenham and all round legend that is David Bentley!!
Few of the guests we have had on the podcast have brought the energy that David has, be it nights out that Crouchy would probably rather forget or flogging flooring none of knew we needed - Bentley doesn’t mess around.
If you have ever wondered how to smuggle chicken nuggets into an England training camp or how to tell Mr Redknapp himself exactly what you think of him then we have got the podcast for you.
Also tune in for updates on Wayne Bridge’s eponymous bridge as well as our hot take on how VAR can be used for the greater good.
Chumbawamba

programme.title: Peter Crouch's Ultimate Squad!
programme.desc: The much-awaited second half of Peter Crouch's ultimate squad is here! Despite already naming his goalkeepers, Crouchy still finds time to dig them out so expect a team littered with stars and an episode with plenty of the usual nonsense. You'll hear about the 'Croatian Mafia', the impact that Pete's first mentor at Portsmouth has had on his diet and insight into Gareth Bale.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: Peter Crouch on Tottenham! Here's the best bits on Spurs from the last two series all in one video for you! Jermain Defoe joins Peter Crouch, Chris Stark and Statman Dave to talk all things Tottenham and Crouchy!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Peter Crouch on Liverpool! Here's the best bits on Liverpool from the last two series all in one video for you! Peter Crouch, Chris Stark and Statman Dave talk all things Liverpool and Crouchy! Have we missed anything? Let us know in the comments...
This video; Crouch on the amazing influence of Jamie Carragher at Liverpool, how much he'd love to play in this Liverpool side with Firmino, why Steven Gerrard is the best player Peter Crouch played with, funny messages from Liverpool players on Crouchy's hat-trick ball vs Arsenal, Steven Gerrard the manager, Steven Gerrard the captain and how he arranged the Christmas Party... Steve Finnan, a funny story about Robbie Fowler, how it felt to be dropped for the Champions League final, Rafael Benitez unusual training regime AND playing Red Ar$e with Steven Gerrard!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: Peter Crouch on Goalkeepers! Aaron Ramsdale and David James join Peter Crouch, Chris Stark and Statman Dave to talk all things Strikers vs Goalkeepers!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: In 'That Contracts Episode' Peter Crouch brings an old contract from his days at Stoke City in the Premier League. You'll learn what clubs do to motivate players, the clauses that are important for footballers and some random stipulations that don't make much sense.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Peter Crouch on Liverpool! Here's the best bits on Liverpool from the last two series all in one video for you! Peter Crouch, Chris Stark and Statman Dave talk all things Liverpool and Crouchy! Have we missed anything? Let us know in the comments...
This video; Crouch on the amazing influence of Jamie Carragher at Liverpool, how much he'd love to play in this Liverpool side with Firmino, why Steven Gerrard is the best player Peter Crouch played with, funny messages from Liverpool players on Crouchy's hat-trick ball vs Arsenal, Steven Gerrard the manager, Steven Gerrard the captain and how he arranged the Christmas Party... Steve Finnan, a funny story about Robbie Fowler, how it felt to be dropped for the Champions League final, Rafael Benitez unusual training regime AND playing Red Ar$e with Steven Gerrard!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: Joe Cole joins Peter Crouch and the boys at the pub to tell us how to win an argument with Jose Mourinho, what the worst role in football is and discusses which managers he'd like to take on a lads holiday to Malia.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: Peter Crouch & Ed Sheeran Discuss Crouchfest, Jay Z AND England’s World Cup 2022 Chances! There's just a month until Crouchfest! Ed Sheeran passes on valuable advice to Peter Crouch, Chris Stark and Statman Dave about how to handle a big crowd as well as discussing England's chances at the World Cup 2022 in Qatar, his best [and worst] ever gigs, being friends with Beyonce and Jay-Z and what he'd put his time into after his music career?! Crouchy gets asked about former team mates and has to pick his favourite England football song. Plus you'll also hear Ed Sheeran discuss the challenges of being a parent and pass judgement on Chris wearing shinpads to 5 a-side!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
This week on That Peter Crouch Podcast, the boys get deep into the topic of loyalty—and all the chaos that comes with it in football. The lads unpack the messiest transfers, the fan backlash, the manager betrayals, and the true legends who stayed loyal to one badge their whole careers.
From personal stories about Crouchy's days at Southampton and Portsmouth, to Sids’ move from Reading to Chelsea, the lads lay it all out: when loyalty means staying, when it means going, and when the fans don’t forgive. Plus, they shout out the proper one-club legends like Maldini, Totti, and Giggs—was their loyalty heroic or career-limiting?
You’ll also get outrageous stories about coins passed through the human body, bacon sandwiches thrown in anger, football kits as walking billboards, and a surprise battle of the lawns in suburban Lancashire…
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
On this week’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, we’re coming to you straight from the Liverpool team hotel on the morning of the Liverpool Legends Match at Anfield.
Crouchy is joined by an all-star lineup of former Reds, including Steven Gerrard, John Barnes, Djibril Cissé, Yossi Benayoun, Ryan Babel, and Jay Spearing, for an exclusive behind-the-scenes chat about what it really means to pull on the famous red shirt.
The lads reminisce about unforgettable Champions League nights, legendary team talks, and share hilarious behind-the-scenes stories.
From Gerrard’s best Liverpool memories to Cissé’s injury recovery, and Barnes on the evolution of the modern game, this episode is packed with iconic moments.
Let us know in the comments – who’s the greatest Liverpool legend of all time?
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
On this week’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, we’re coming to you straight from the Liverpool team hotel on the morning of the Liverpool Legends Match at Anfield.

From Gerrard’s best Liverpool memories to Cissé’s injury recovery, and Barnes on the evolution of the modern game, this episode is packed with iconic moments.
Let us know in the comments – who’s the greatest Liverpool legend of all time?
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
This week, Crouchy, Chris and Sids are joined by Youtube and boxing extraordinaire - KSI!!
He sits down with the lads to discuss how his preparations have been going in the lead up to his big fight against pro boxer Tommy Fury - brother of World heavyweight boxing champion Tyson.
KSI gives the lads a masterclass in how to make it on YouTube and the mindset needed to handle being one of the most recognisable faces of a generation.
KSI and the boys also speak candidly about the dark side of fame and the toll that being in the limelight 24/7 can have upon your mental health.
Predictions for the big fight night? KSI reckons it will all be over in 4 - leave your predictions in the comments!
Chumbawamba!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
On this week’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, Pete, Chris, and Sids are joined by free agent and Crystal Palace legend Joel Ward. From lifting the FA Cup to living in a Bible college, Joel dives deep into the highs, lows, and surprises of his footballing journey.
The lads chat about Ward’s free agent life, what it’s really like being on the sidelines after a long stint at a club, and how he's mentoring the next generation at Palace. They also get stuck into proper dressing room stories, the real power of player faith groups, and one of the most intense atmospheres in football — Fratton Park on a European night.
Oh, and things take a serious left turn into 18-hour brisket smoking sessions and barbecuing like a pro. Is Joel Ward the best footballing pitmaster in the country? You'll have to listen to find out.
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: How do you become a professional footballer? In this episode Peter Crouch gives advice to listeners who've reached out, discusses the sacrifices and choices he made as a player and gives you all an insight into the dedication, attitude and mentality required to make it at an elite level. It's That Mentality Episode! There's a discussion about becoming a 'competitive Dad' at a child's sporting event and plenty more!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
On this week’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, the lads are joined by former Arsenal and Nottingham Forest midfielder Henri Lansbury—a man known for his composed playmaking style, his Premier League journey, and now, his unexpected new life as a lawn-care entrepreneur.
Henri gets candid about a life-changing diagnosis—testicular cancer—and opens up on how he discovered it, why he kept it quiet during his career, and how football dressing room culture shaped his response. In a powerful, funny, and refreshingly honest chat, Henri explains the moment he realised something was wrong, the speed of his surgery, and how football banter helped him process it all.
The lads also dive into Henri’s career journey through Arsenal’s elite youth system, wild loan spells at Scunthorpe and Norwich, and his glory years at Forest. There’s even time to talk about robot lawn mowers, silent discos, and how Henri went from footballer to founder of Grass Gains, the fertiliser brand making waves in Premier League stadiums and home gardens alike.
Stick around to hear some top-class football nostalgia, locker room laughs, and the kind of heartfelt real talk that this podcast delivers best.
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: Is the number 9 shirt still the most iconic in football? Peter Crouch discusses the return of the position once threatened by extinction thanks to those pesky false 9's at Manchester City and Barcelona! There's a Crouchfest related giveaway and Statman Dave goes through the ups and downs of seeing into the future whilst accepting his performance in fantasy football needs work! Plus Chris Stark has an idea which he believes should grace the stage at Wembley Arena...

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
On this week’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, Crouchy, Chris Stark, and Steve Sidwell reunite to discuss the state of modern football—and it’s safe to say, the game has well and truly gone. From nostalgic takes on goal celebrations to fuming over financial fair play, the lads aren’t holding back.
Chris discusses his injury from a rogue five-year-old’s high five, Steve shares his story about proposing again on his 20th wedding anniversary, and Crouchy flexes his new golf trophy win, sparking a movement to secure him VIP parking across the UK.
But it’s the main debate that steals the show—“has football officially lost the plot?” The team deep dive into everything that grinds their gears about the modern game: players filming with phones on the pitch, soulless shirt sponsors, managers refusing to adapt tactics, and the death of spontaneity in football moments thanks to VAR.
Plus, we use AI to generate Sids a FAKE girlfriend in the Chumbawumbar… trust us, this one's a belter.
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Crouchfest 2 is here! Access all areas with Peter Crouch, Chris Stark and Statman Dave at Wembley Arena to experience a night that was scarcely believable! You'll see what happens backstage at Crouchfest and the amazing lineup and crowd who have all signed up to take part without really knowing what to expect! Come inside the dressing room as well as experience the best parts of the show on stage!
When an evening! Including performances from Kasabian, Paul Potts, Olly Murs and the finest UK Garage MCs, Joel Stewart's Mike Dean Song, plus David James as a landlord and frequent visits to the Samrat, you never quite know which direction it's going to turn next...
Peter, Chris, Dave and the pod team would like to thank everyone who played a role in the event and for everyone who bought tickets to see the show. An unforgettable night like Crouchfest 2 is only possible because of the loyalty and fun that all of you bring. Cheers!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
The pod with no name is back this week with a very special guest….Joleon Lescott!
We review how the lads did with their previous score predictions and Joleon is on hand to help Chris avoid making any outrageous shouts such as his triple 3-0 predictions last week.
The lads also put down their predictions for some of the big games this weekend, including; Liverpool v Spurs, Everton v Luton and Newcastle v Burnley. The boys have also joined forces with Paddy Power who have given us the odds on some of lads latest predictions and some inspiration for the lads on how they can supercharge the Christmas forfeits.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: That Training Session Episode! Who knew that netball, table tennis, water polo and red ar$e would all play an integral part in a Premier League training session?! Peter Crouch details what motivates players, the sessions that footballers hate and how a manager like Rafael Benitez coached teams to play his tactics. Playing true to his selfish-striker mindset, Crouchy raises the issues he has with Erling Haaland and the impact the Norwegian is having on the Premier League and its historic football statistics....

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Crouchy, Chris and Notorious are back in action brightening up your Fridays with their Friday review pod.
In light of two of Sid’s former clubs, Brighton and Fulham playing each other this weekend, it felt only right for us to give this weekend the moniker ‘El Puddingo’
In what is becoming almost routine, Chris has suffered another weekend he would rather forget and edges ever closer to that dreaded Christmas forfeit. Crouchy managed to secure himself a cheeky three pointer which has granted him a bit of breathing space and Steve ‘Mystic’ Sidwell continues to look back at the lads in his rear view mirror.
Apart from ‘El Puddingo’ the other matches the lads are taking a look at are; the Manchester Derby and Wolves v Newcastle - will Chris follow his head or his heart? Stay tuned to find out.
We still want your forfeit suggestions - we’ve had a few so far but no deal breakers - keep em coming in!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
With the end of the season looming, Crouchy, Chris and Statman take a minute to look back at some of their biggest hits and misses throughout the past 9 months.
We look at some of the runaway successes of the season and some of the more sh*thousery moments (Sam Allardyce comparing himself to Pep springs to mind)
We also have a very special voice note from the one and only Jose Enrique who finally puts to bed the one question on everyone’s minds…..if he’s guilty of THAT Gucci slippers purchase
And with the season almost at its end, the boys decide its time to put some planning into the coveted That Peter Crouch Podcast Awards night so watch this space.
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Crouchfest 2 is here! Access all areas with Peter Crouch, Chris Stark and Statman Dave at Wembley Arena to experience a night that was scarcely believable! You'll see what happens backstage at Crouchfest and the amazing lineup and crowd who have all signed up to take part without really knowing what to expect! Come inside the dressing room as well as experience the best parts of the show on stage!
When an evening! Including performances from Kasabian, Paul Potts, Olly Murs and the finest UK Garage MCs, Joel Stewart's Mike Dean Song, plus David James as a landlord and frequent visits to the Samrat, you never quite know which direction it's going to turn next...
Peter, Chris, Dave and the pod team would like to thank everyone who played a role in the event and for everyone who bought tickets to see the show. An unforgettable night like Crouchfest 2 is only possible because of the loyalty and fun that all of you bring. Cheers!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: Peter Crouch reveals all the things that footballers, managers and coaches discuss at a team meeting... You'll learn about which managers dominate the room, the softer tactics employed by others and what happens when the gaffer loses the dressing room?! Chris Stark and Statman Dave discuss more ideas for Crouchfest and Crouchy reveals why David Beckham holds a special place in his bedroom...

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Ahead of last weeks clash of the titans at the Premier League Darts Final, Crouchy, Chris and Statman sit down with some of the legends of the sport to pick their brains on what qualities it takes to become a pro darter in 2023
The lads are joined by Jonny Clayton, Gerwyn Price, Michael van Gerwen and Michael Smith who give insights into their glittering careers and what they are hoping to accomplish over the coming season.
They are also on hand to give some top tips to the lads on how to improve their own form, culminating in a nine dart, winner takes all, tournament at the end of the podcast - so watch this space.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: What footballers really think about each other! It's time to take a look at B*tchy Players! It's just a few days until Crouchfest and we've decided to hand this podcast over to you, the listener. It's Peter Crouch's favourite episode of the series as you - the viewers and listeners take control and get to ask a member of the Premier League 100 club anything you like! The main theme is how b*tchy strikers can be about the rest of the squad(!) especially those pesky goalkeepers Rambo! AND Peter Crouch answers questions about making body parts disappear, playing Monopoly and there's a final update on Crouchfest! Crouchy issues a warning for event organisers as well as a serious discussion about when players get 'too comfy' at an elite football club.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
After a whirlwind couple of weeks which has seen the lads brushing shoulders with movie stars and legends of the game, Crouchy, Chris and Statman are back in their safe space doing what they do best….chatting sh*t over a couple of cold ones.
With a brief cameo from San Marino to check in on Chris’ ball health, Pete also takes a bit of a grilling for his recent #BBQc antics.
In Swap Shop, we finally procure a swap worthy of the boots worn by Charlie Adams during last years midges dick challenge - who knew Jose Enrique would be the hero we didn’t think we would all need?
The lads also take a look at some of their personal icons of the game with legends like George Best, Maradona and Kerry Dixon all getting honourable shout outs.
Enjoy this week’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: Ahead of recording in the pub, Aaron agreed to take the podcast team on a tour of the Emirates and surrounding areas. You'll learn which Arsenal legend has set a challenge for one of the current squad, the agenda for the podcast recording and all the best bits of club history around Highbury and Arsenal.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
On this week’s Friday review podcast, we find out the results of Chris following his heart over his head last week for the Manchester derby (spoiler alert it didn’t pan out)
We also hear from the Minister of Mischief who has personally sent us a letter to give us some tantalising hints on how we can supersize this mofo when it comes the lads forfeits - so keep your ideas coming in.
Looking ahead to this weekend’s games, the lads throw down their predictions for the Newcastle v Arsenal, Spurs v Chelsea and Burnley v Palace.
There are also some honourable shoutouts to the one and only Kanye West and we hear about the time Stoke City signed a fish finger
Enjoy!

programme.title: Harry Redknapp Will Love This!
programme.desc: Peter Crouch & Jermain Defoe! Harry Redknapp's going to love this episode! The podcast reunites one of the Premier League's most iconic duos. Jermain Defoe heads to the pub with Crouchy, Chris Stark and Statman Dave to discuss his relationship with Peter Crouch, when strikers become 'too selfish' and where his obsession with scoring goals came from! There's initial scepticism about the role of stats plus a complaint from friend of the pod Aaron Ramsdale! It's a Jermain Defoe Podcast!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
This week, Crouch and Chris are joined by the man, the myth, the legend that is Lee Hendrie.
The lads discuss some of the changing room antics that went down during their time at the Villa as well as some of their BIG night outs on the town.
The lads are also privileged enough to to be given an insight in to some of the more difficult periods in Lee’s life and just how he was able to overcome them.
With a career in football that spanned nearly 25 years, it is safe to say Lee has seen more than his fair share both on and off the field with a lot of those antics involving the big man himself.
This could be one of our most entertaining guests of the season so far….
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
This week, Crouch and Chris are joined by the man, the myth, the legend that is Lee Hendrie.
The lads discuss some of the changing room antics that went down during their time at the Villa as well as some of their BIG night outs on the town.
The lads are also privileged enough to to be given an insight in to some of the more difficult periods in Lee’s life and just how he was able to overcome them.
With a career in football that spanned nearly 25 years, it is safe to say Lee has seen more than his fair share both on and off the field with a lot of those antics involving the big man himself.
This could be one of our most entertaining guests of the season so far….
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Joining Chris, Crouchy and Notorious this week, is Tottenham legend and one of Pete’s OG friends in football…..Ledley King!
One of the few giants of the game that dedicated their whole professional career to one team, Ledley has seen more than most down the White Hart Lane - having been present for both of the big man’s stints for the North London stalwarts.
Ledley also lifts the lid on some of the antics that the lads went through, from England training camps to big nights out with the boys, it’s fair to say Ledley doesn’t pull any punches when it comes to exposing some of Crouchy’s most memorable moments.
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
On this week’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, Crouch and Chris sit down with West Ham legend Julian Dicks to discuss his iconic role in shaping the hammer’s team during his 11 year reign at the club between 88-99.
‘The Terminator’ sheds light on his absolute power penalties, all or nothing winning mentality and aversion to all things flight simulator related (sorry Starky)
Outside of football, we also hear what Dicksy would have been if it wasn’t for the beautiful game and how a knee injury almost turned him into the UK’s answer to Tiger Woods.
We also FINALLY hear back from our pal Lukas Enrique who goes into detail on that night behind the velvet rope….
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
In today’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, the lads sit down with the Liverpool, and all round legend that is Jamie Carragher.
In this no holds barred chat, the lads talk about their glory days on the red side of merseyside. With insights into some of Pete’s questionable Spanish chat up lines as well Jamie’s peculiar reading habits, it’s safe to say this pod has it all.
So, if you have ever found yourself wondering - Is Jamie Carragher parched? What fun could I have with 8 nuns at a wedding? Or where Crouch thinks Carra can stick his champions league medal? Then look no further than That Peter Crouch Podcast!
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
In the first full episode of their new football review podcast, the lads sit down and discuss England’s performance during the international break and get the ball rolling on their new predictions league table.
This week, the games that the boys are shining a spotlight on are Wolves v Liverpool, Newcastle v Brentford and West Ham v City. If any of you want to get involved in our weekly tournament then leave your predictions in the comments below and see how you fare against the boys!
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
This week, Crouchy, Chris and Notorious sit down to discuss some of the big money and big name moves to the Middle East and the impact that this may have on the beautiful game.
Pete reminisces on a misspent youth spent watching the Serie A highlights on football Italia and reveals some surprising news about his own potential venture into the foreign leagues during his time as a player.
The gang also receives one of their favourite ever listener messages relating to a certain Mr Brie and in celebration of Brewdog’s Elvis Juice, our new beer of the month, Pete treats the lads to very special rendition of Suspicious minds……oh yes you read that correctly.
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
In today’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, Pete opens the door on his footballing allegiances which, it is fair to say, have changed slightly throughout the years.
Starting off as a staunch ‘Chelsea of old’ fan, the more his glittering career progressed the more bitter his reception at Stamford Bridge became.
Join us as we chart Crouchy’s journey through different clubs and gain a better idea on where his allegiances lie now.
Chris also sheds light on some slight football sh*thousery he inflicted on his best mate Dougsie during the 2019 FA Cup final which he eloquently tries too pin on the missus.
The hunt for a decent swap for Charlie Adams’ coveted boot is also back on, with some hair raising offers been put on the table.
That Peter Crouch Podcast - Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: Is Anthony Joshua a Watford fan? What do you reckon is the best seat at Leyton Orient's stadium? In this special bonus episode brought you in partnership with Acast and DAZN, the global sports broadcaster, we sit down with Eddie Hearn and Anthony Joshua to talk about the relationship with Boxing and Football and AJ's upcoming fight against Jermaine Franklin on April 1st exclusively on DAZN

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
In this weeks episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, the lads sit down and delve into some of the most iconic derbies from across the world as well as those the big man himself has featured in.
Chris discusses why he feels his 5-a-side days may be coming to a close as well as his recent interaction with global megastar Orlando Bloom and wife Katy Perry.
The hunt for a suitable swap shop on Charlie Adam’s boots continues and we also hear from you, the listener on what you think provides the best level of protection when it comes to…..shin pads.
All this only available on, That Peter Crouch Podcast!
Chumbawamba.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: In the first episode of the new series, Crouchy, Chris and Statman find themselves in unfamiliar surroundings, a far cry from their usual pub setting. In a fitting tribute to their first episode in almost 3 months, the lads are discussing comebacks because boy, it feels good to be back. Chumbawamba.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Crouchy and Chris sit down with Burnley and Brentford BNOC Ben Mee to discuss some of the highlights from a career that has seen him rack up over 300 appearances for the clarets and his recent move to the cherries.
Ben and Crouchy reminisce on some of their playing days together down at Turf Moor and Ben lifts the lid on some of the big man’s dressing room antics.
You guys have also been taking part in our Elvis Juice challenge and we have some big hitters this week - expect Chris Eubank-esque Ed Sheeran impressions as well as some away day talismans.
You do not want to miss it!
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
This week, Crouchy, Chris and Notorious are back in action and discussing all things Assistant Managers.
Often the unsung heroes of the backroom staff - with the exception of Newcastle - the lads feel it’s only right to highlight some of the best duos in football history, as well as UK Pop culture.
The lads take a deep dive into how assistant managers are often the go-between between senior players and the managers and the dynamics between them and the managers.
Sid’s is also on hand for a mini game that caught the lads slightly off guard and turned out to be one of the highlights of the pod - after Chris’ attire.
And finally, no one on this podcast is free from the firing line, including not Sir David Beckham himself who has drawn Crouchy’s ire for his BBQ set up in his recent documentary.
Its a goodun!
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
From bringing handball instincts into the Premier League to transforming goalkeeping with his iconic throws and psychological tactics, Schmeichel gives fans unmatched behind-the-scenes insight into Man United’s dominance, Sir Alex Ferguson’s trust in the Class of ’92, and the unbelievable run that led to the famous 1999 treble.
He even talks about his love-hate relationship with baked beans, his time on Strictly Come Dancing, and how he may have nearly joined Liverpool on a night out with Ian Rush!
This one is for the diehard football romantics. Bacon sandwiches at the ready—this is the Schmeichel episode you didn’t know you needed.
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Robson-Kanu on the pod!
From youth football rejection to that unforgettable Cruyff turn goal at Euro 2016, Hal opens up about his rollercoaster of a career—one that includes two ACL ruptures, founding a multi-million pound wellness brand, and becoming Wales’ unlikely hero on the global stage.
The lads dig deep into Hal’s journey, how his homemade turmeric shots went from his dad’s blender to supermarket shelves, and why inflammation might be the root of most modern-day health issues.
There’s talk of brutal Premier League realities, the dressing room dynamics no one sees, and how football still fails players when it comes to mental health.
Plus, what it’s really like being a boot boy for the one and only Steve Sidwell, why David Ginola was tight at Christmas, and the story behind how a promised £50-a-goal bonus proved surprisingly lucrative for a young Robson-Kanu.It's a brutally honest, hilarious, and inspiring insight into a career that's anything but ordinary.
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Crouchfest 2 is here! Access all areas with Peter Crouch, Chris Stark and Statman Dave at Wembley Arena to experience a night that was scarcely believable! You'll see what happens backstage at Crouchfest and the amazing lineup and crowd who have all signed up to take part without really knowing what to expect! Come inside the dressing room as well as experience the best parts of the show on stage!
When an evening! Including performances from Kasabian, Paul Potts, Olly Murs and the finest UK Garage MCs, Joel Stewart's Mike Dean Song, plus David James as a landlord and frequent visits to the Samrat, you never quite know which direction it's going to turn next...
Peter, Chris, Dave and the pod team would like to thank everyone who played a role in the event and for everyone who bought tickets to see the show. An unforgettable night like Crouchfest 2 is only possible because of the loyalty and fun that all of you bring. Cheers!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
This week, Crouchy, Chris and Sids are joined by Youtube and boxing extraordinaire - KSI!!
He sits down with the lads to discuss how his preparations have been going in the lead up to his big fight against pro boxer Tommy Fury - brother of World heavyweight boxing champion Tyson.
KSI gives the lads a masterclass in how to make it on YouTube and the mindset needed to handle being one of the most recognisable faces of a generation.
KSI and the boys also speak candidly about the dark side of fame and the toll that being in the limelight 24/7 can have upon your mental health.
Predictions for the big fight night? KSI reckons it will all be over in 4 - leave your predictions in the comments!
Chumbawamba!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: In this week’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, Pete, Chris and the Notorious S.I.D sit down with Hollywood Superstar Idris Elba to discuss all things Arsenal, rap battles, flight simulators and his new and upcoming Apple TV+ series Hijack.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
On this week’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, Pete, Sids, and Chris are joined by James Tarkowski, the no-nonsense centre-back for Everton Football Club. Known for his leadership, resilience, and heart-on-sleeve playing style, Tarkowski opens up about life at Goodison Park, Sean Dyche’s influence, and what it’s really like to play in Merseyside derbies.
He shares stories from Burnley’s golden years, the chaos of Everton’s survival seasons, and his thoughts on football’s return to big number 9’s, directness, and long balls.
The lads also dive into dressing room psychology, VAR frustrations, and post-football plans — from coaching to business ventures. Expect honest football chat, great banter, and a few unexpected laughs (including Tarky’s Frozen piano moment).
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: Peter Crouch reveals all the things that footballers, managers and coaches discuss at a team meeting... You'll learn about which managers dominate the room, the softer tactics employed by others and what happens when the gaffer loses the dressing room?! Chris Stark and Statman Dave discuss more ideas for Crouchfest and Crouchy reveals why David Beckham holds a special place in his bedroom...

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
In the second episode of the new series of That Peter Crouch Podcast, Crouchy, Chris and Dave take a dive into some of the most famous quotes to come out of the beautiful game.
We hear some big shouts from the Peterborough legend that is Barry Fry, and hear just what the ‘Special One’ said to Peter when trying to coax him out of retirement.
The gang also analyse why it is Airline pilots are allowed to get away with some top class sh*thousery and why Peter will likely never make a career out of performing accents.
So, strap into your shin pads, get your pancakes at the ready and enjoy this week’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Ahead of last weeks clash of the titans at the Premier League Darts Final, Crouchy, Chris and Statman sit down with some of the legends of the sport to pick their brains on what qualities it takes to become a pro darter in 2023
The lads are joined by Jonny Clayton, Gerwyn Price, Michael van Gerwen and Michael Smith who give insights into their glittering careers and what they are hoping to accomplish over the coming season.
They are also on hand to give some top tips to the lads on how to improve their own form, culminating in a nine dart, winner takes all, tournament at the end of the podcast - so watch this space.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
On this week’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, we’re coming to you straight from the Liverpool team hotel on the morning of the Liverpool Legends Match at Anfield.
Crouchy is joined by an all-star lineup of former Reds, including Steven Gerrard, John Barnes, Djibril Cissé, Yossi Benayoun, Ryan Babel, and Jay Spearing, for an exclusive behind-the-scenes chat about what it really means to pull on the famous red shirt.
The lads reminisce about unforgettable Champions League nights, legendary team talks, and share hilarious behind-the-scenes stories.
From Gerrard’s best Liverpool memories to Cissé’s injury recovery, and Barnes on the evolution of the modern game, this episode is packed with iconic moments.
Let us know in the comments – who’s the greatest Liverpool legend of all time?
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
This week on That Peter Crouch Podcast, Crouchy, Chris and Statman Dave sit down with global superstar Jason Sudeikis, star of Apple TV's Ted Lasso, as they discuss all things football (NOT soccer) related.
Jason talks about why he thinks the show has been such such a runaway success on both sides of the pond and also displays some surprisingly impressive footy knowledge.
Starky finally finds an ally in the BBQ game and Mike Dean's biggest fan also reveals why he thinks the former ref/chicken slaughterer was born to be in showbusiness.
And in a very surprising turn of events, AFC Richmond make a mockery of the transfer windows and make a swoop on one of their biggest players yet....quite literally.
Enjoy this and much more only on That Peter Crouch Podcast!
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
It’s the Rodcast baby.
On this very special episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, Pete, Chris, and Sids make a pilgrimage to the stately home of none other than Sir Rod Stewart—rock legend, model train aficionado, and die-hard Celtic fan.
Recorded inside Rod’s private gym and overlooking his personal football pitch, this episode is a goldmine of outrageous stories and charming confessions. From Elton John gifting him a Rembrandt painting, to the infamous drunken Scottish Cup draw, Rod holds nothing back.
He opens up about his lifelong love affair with football, his competitive friendship with Elton, and how his model railway obsession helps him stay grounded (and vocally fit!) while touring the world.
Whether he’s reminiscing about pitch invasions at Wembley, revealing the secrets behind his Vegas shows, or naughty 70's antics, this is Rod Stewart at his most raw and relatable.
Chumbawamba

programme.desc: Peter Crouch & Ed Sheeran Discuss Crouchfest, Jay Z AND England’s World Cup 2022 Chances! There's just a month until Crouchfest! Ed Sheeran passes on valuable advice to Peter Crouch, Chris Stark and Statman Dave about how to handle a big crowd as well as discussing England's chances at the World Cup 2022 in Qatar, his best [and worst] ever gigs, being friends with Beyonce and Jay-Z and what he'd put his time into after his music career?! Crouchy gets asked about former team mates and has to pick his favourite England football song. Plus you'll also hear Ed Sheeran discuss the challenges of being a parent and pass judgement on Chris wearing shinpads to 5 a-side!

programme.desc: In 'That Contracts Episode' Peter Crouch brings an old contract from his days at Stoke City in the Premier League. You'll learn what clubs do to motivate players, the clauses that are important for footballers and some random stipulations that don't make much sense.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: What footballers really think about each other! It's time to take a look at B*tchy Players! It's just a few days until Crouchfest and we've decided to hand this podcast over to you, the listener. It's Peter Crouch's favourite episode of the series as you - the viewers and listeners take control and get to ask a member of the Premier League 100 club anything you like! The main theme is how b*tchy strikers can be about the rest of the squad(!) especially those pesky goalkeepers Rambo! AND Peter Crouch answers questions about making body parts disappear, playing Monopoly and there's a final update on Crouchfest! Crouchy issues a warning for event organisers as well as a serious discussion about when players get 'too comfy' at an elite football club.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
After a bruising international break for some of the team, Crouchy, Chris and Notorious SID are back to their bread and butter - the Premier League.
The lads talk about how they were able to keep themselves entertained over a gruelling two weeks, even going the extremes of becoming rugby fans (as shown by Chris’ attire) and a boxing match featuring one of our new mates.
Looking ahead, the games the lads are putting their necks on the line this week are the merseyside derby, Sheffield United vs Manchester United and Chelsea vs Arsenal.
With Pete being closer to Chris than he would like in the leaderboards, it is all to play for as we edge closer to that Christmas forfeit deadline.
Speaking of - please continue to send in your forfeit ideas and names for the pod and you could be the next Mr Holiday!!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: Peter Crouch reveals all the things that footballers, managers and coaches discuss at a team meeting... You'll learn about which managers dominate the room, the softer tactics employed by others and what happens when the gaffer loses the dressing room?! Chris Stark and Statman Dave discuss more ideas for Crouchfest and Crouchy reveals why David Beckham holds a special place in his bedroom...

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Crouchy, Chris and Notorious are back in action brightening up your Fridays with their Friday review pod.
In light of two of Sid’s former clubs, Brighton and Fulham playing each other this weekend, it felt only right for us to give this weekend the moniker ‘El Puddingo’
In what is becoming almost routine, Chris has suffered another weekend he would rather forget and edges ever closer to that dreaded Christmas forfeit. Crouchy managed to secure himself a cheeky three pointer which has granted him a bit of breathing space and Steve ‘Mystic’ Sidwell continues to look back at the lads in his rear view mirror.
Apart from ‘El Puddingo’ the other matches the lads are taking a look at are; the Manchester Derby and Wolves v Newcastle - will Chris follow his head or his heart? Stay tuned to find out.
We still want your forfeit suggestions - we’ve had a few so far but no deal breakers - keep em coming in!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: That Training Session Episode! Who knew that netball, table tennis, water polo and red ar$e would all play an integral part in a Premier League training session?! Peter Crouch details what motivates players, the sessions that footballers hate and how a manager like Rafael Benitez coached teams to play his tactics. Playing true to his selfish-striker mindset, Crouchy raises the issues he has with Erling Haaland and the impact the Norwegian is having on the Premier League and its historic football statistics....

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Ahead of last weeks clash of the titans at the Premier League Darts Final, Crouchy, Chris and Statman sit down with some of the legends of the sport to pick their brains on what qualities it takes to become a pro darter in 2023
The lads are joined by Jonny Clayton, Gerwyn Price, Michael van Gerwen and Michael Smith who give insights into their glittering careers and what they are hoping to accomplish over the coming season.
They are also on hand to give some top tips to the lads on how to improve their own form, culminating in a nine dart, winner takes all, tournament at the end of the podcast - so watch this space.

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: The Knights will face their biggest challenge yet. There be giants.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Missing

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: Tim heads to the Smoky Mountains for an action-packed adventure that’s as sharp as it gets. The journey kicks off at the world-famous Smoky Mountain Knife Works, the largest knife store on the planet, where Tim explores the artistry and precision behind the blades of We Knife. There, he reconnects with shooting legend Kyle Lamb, who shares his thoughts on the craftsmanship that keeps professionals equipped for anything. The action continues at Buds Gun Shop, where Tim joins Kyle once again to complete two of Lamb’s signature courses—the intense “Chaos Drill” and the dynamic “Triple Threat.” Together, they test speed, accuracy, and the mental discipline needed to master the range. But the day wouldn’t be complete without a little backwoods ingenuity. IraqVeteran8888 joins Tim for a bit of unconventional fun—combining creativity, curiosity, and some good old Redneck Science to wrap up an unforgettable episode.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Boom America is kicking off with a bang, led by the legendary shark himself, Kevin Harrington. Backed by his team of successful entrepreneurs, Kevin meets with businesses to jumpstart their success and take them to a whole new level. From Nuethix, a supplement line struggling with client acquisition and education, to Stream2Sea, a eco-friendly sunscreen wanting to become a household name—Kevin and the A-team are ready to jump in and get their hands dirty.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: It’s time to go to work. Now that we’ve met our companies, Kevin and the A-team are ready to hit the ground running. NuEhtix, Dr Price Vitamins, Stream2Sea and Clear Water get a deep dive round table session from Kevin and His A-team. We also get to meet the A-Team players and what make them titans in their trades. Tune in to see the insights the team come up with and how the companies apply it to build their brands.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: Laura Zaspel (Farm Hero) takes you inside the cockpit for a high-flying look at the future of farming. From cutting-edge aerial applications to next-gen science and sustainability, Air Tractor’s technology is redefining how we grow from the ground up.

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: In the premiere of Fortress, Sheriff Mark Lamb and co-hosts explore America’s urgent need for security—both personal and societal. They meet a passionate team turning donated land into a homestead that feeds and shelters trafficking survivors. Then, CCW Safe steps in to showcase how legal protection for concealed carriers can be the line between justice and ruin. Powerful stories of resilience, protection, and purpose unfold in this compelling first episode.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The day begins with a powerful dose of perspective as contestants hear real-life breaching stories from American heroes—reminders of the stakes they’re preparing for. The team is then introduced to a concealed firearm headrest safe designed for rapid-response vehicle defense. Next, it’s straight into the action with a preliminary course of fire using GreenLight sights, where top performers are pushed even further with a bonus round to test speed, accuracy, and composure under pressure. The intensity ramps up during a sentry scenario featuring SABRE CO₂ non-lethal cartridges, putting their stealth and judgment to the test. But just as the dust begins to settle, a new CIA briefing drops—and it’s the most dire yet. With mission reality closing in fast, the contestants close the day with a crash course in S.E.R.E. (Survival, Evasion, Resistance, and Escape) training, rounding out their classroom combat readiness with hard-earned grit.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The challenges have only gotten started. In episode two, the teams must go beyond their limits to come out on top. From the brutal Blah line to building their own shelters with only a small ax, it’s a battle for scoring points and survival that’ll test these elite competitors like never before.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The contestants of “Surviving Mann” are handpicked for their exceptional skills and determination. Under the guidance of survival expert Don Mann, they face a series of challenges designed to push them beyond their limits. Each contestant must adapt, innovate, and collaborate to survive in an unforgiving environment. As the grueling challenges unfold, they discover new strengths and forge deeper bonds. This episode sets the tone for a season filled with intense tests of endurance, strategy, and resilience, with Don Mann inspiring and pushing them every step of the way.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: With the contestants narrowed down to 32, Don Mann and Randy Couture reveal a new twist that changes the game: a complex point system that turns survival into a strategic battle. Contestants face grueling military training and a brutal 5K run through Nevada’s desert, testing their endurance and mental toughness. As mentors and adversaries, Don and Randy push the contestants to their limits. This episode marks the beginning of an intense journey where only the strongest and most strategic will prevail.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Episode 3 continues with a grueling desert run under Las Vegas’ heat, where endurance is tested to the extreme. As contestants push through, one unexpectedly stands out. They are then trained with cutting-edge weaponry, showcasing their skills on the course of fire. A high-stakes plank competition follows, with only two contestants left standing. Through intense physical and mental challenges, this episode reveals the contestants’ true character and resilience, setting the stage for more survival tests ahead.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: A new team commander emerges, but can they hold the title? Contestants face long-range shooting challenges, mastering both standard artillery and the powerful 50 Caliber rifle. The intensity continues with surprise physical training led by a SEAL Team 6 warrior and MMA Champion, pushing contestants to their breaking point. This episode is a relentless test of endurance, skill, and resilience, as the competition intensifies and only the most determined will claim the title of Ultimate Competition Lead.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Only a few days in, the 32 are rapidly progressing through their training for the upcoming mission. This episode includes several challenges including live ammo run and shoot, barriers and cover and an extreme rope course. Can the leader stay on top? Or will someone else pull ahead?

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: In this Surviving Mann Episode, the 32 face an intense and dangerous desert and tunnel navigation challenge with a high-valued prize going to the winner. Some of the 32 need to pay attention and there’s a bit of drama brewing in the ranks.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The competitors are back with guns in their hands for an action-packed, mobile combat drill in a canyon with live fire. And of course, it wouldn't be Las Vegas without a little gambling, right? Watch the bravest of the top 10 risk it all with the elite, 700-yard pinnacle shot – a chance to win (or lose) BIG.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The competitors heat up the desert with some tough physical training that tests both physical and mental strength. Then, the team heads to the range for yet another level of precision shooting with both rifles and pistols. Will we see a new leader emerge?

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The contestants of “Surviving Mann” are handpicked for their exceptional skills and determination. Under the guidance of survival expert Don Mann, they face a series of challenges designed to push them beyond their limits. Each contestant must adapt, innovate, and collaborate to survive in an unforgiving environment. As the grueling challenges unfold, they discover new strengths and forge deeper bonds. This episode sets the tone for a season filled with intense tests of endurance, strategy, and resilience, with Don Mann inspiring and pushing them every step of the way.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Surviving Mann returns with its most punishing season opener yet. In true Don Mann fashion, the bar is raised with a grueling 10-part physical readiness test—infused with a blast of hypothermia for good measure. Don himself calls it “the most brutal PT [he’s] ever witnessed,” and it’s clear the contestants are in for a world of hurt. To push them even further, MMA legend Ken Shamrock joins the fray, bringing his no-nonsense intensity to whip the group into fighting shape. Those who survive the trial by ice and exertion are rewarded with a chance to test-fire the lightest AR on the market—if they can still feel their trigger fingers.

programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: Our realtors were already superstars, but now it’s time to move them even higher. In this episode, you’ll learn what it takes to win at the highest levels from the 30-billion-dollar-man Jay Abraham, SEO wizard AJ Aluthwala, leadership powerhouse Nate Bailey, and mindset genius Michael Bernoff. They’ll each share game-changing strategies to take our superstars (any anyone watching) into the stratosphere.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail circle back with the A-Team to map out growth strategies for Law Enforcement Specialists, whose new app has the potential to scale nationwide through smart media outreach. Kyle Reyes takes a personal interest in guiding the process, while the team also welcomes powerhouse attorney Stephen Geday, bringing sharp legal expertise to the roster. David Beavis Photography explores fresh marketing moves and B2B opportunities with designers, laying the groundwork for a gallery launch in Naples, Florida. Provision Brokerage looks to streamline its legacy with a clear plan forward, while new A-Team member Riggs Eckelberry—pioneering disruptor in the water industry—joins the mission. Finally, the team evaluates how Connected & Protected can expand their safety tech beyond seniors and first responders, reaching hospitals and even children.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This episode kicks off inside the headquarters of Law Enforcement Specialists, where their mission is clear: Prevent. Protect. Respond. From their signed officer wall to their welcoming space for first responders, Bonnie and her team are on the front lines for those who serve. We also get an inside look at their groundbreaking Blue Dispatch software, helping departments streamline jobs and response times. Next, the A-Team travels to Naples, Florida, to celebrate the grand opening of David Beavis’ newest gallery, where his breathtaking photography delivers a powerful message of God’s love and the beauty of creation. Then, Eric Couch of Provision Brokerage shows how his company protects seniors’ “safe money” and builds retirement security for the long haul. Finally, we visit the Connected & Protected call center with president Adam Marsh, where their team makes it simple for seniors to stay safe with innovative, easy-to-use technology.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Country Ball Coach Jesse Chinchar kicks off the first season of Country Ball in the heartland of football — Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. His first challenge is to help Cole Weightman - a powerful yet unknown linebacker who reminds many of another great Pittsburgh linebacker — Jack Lambert of the Steelers fame. What lessons and tactics does Jesse have to help Cole get his first offer? And how will Coach Jesse fare when he adventures with Cole and his family? Find out in the premier episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Coach Jesse heads to Little Rock Arkansas, home of the famous Pulaski Academy and super-star high school football coach, Coach Kelly. The player? Joe Himon. With NFL speed and skills already, a heart of gold and courage to match, Joe has yet to commit and be recognized as the top rated recruit he should be. Find out what advice and help Coach Jesse has for Joe in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: The Knights will face their biggest challenge yet. There be giants.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Coach Jesse heads to Little Rock Arkansas, home of the famous Pulaski Academy and super-star high school football coach, Coach Kelly. The player? Joe Himon. With NFL speed and skills already, a heart of gold and courage to match, Joe has yet to commit and be recognized as the top rated recruit he should be. Find out what advice and help Coach Jesse has for Joe in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Ryan Nolan, a hardworking, talented play-maker with integrity and intelligence to match. Unfortunately, at only 5’ 9”, his size has kept him off of many coaches' radar. Find out what strategies Coach Jesse has for Ryan to help him get scholarship offers and follow them on their shooting adventure as they compete to see who’s the fastest shot in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Richard Myers is a versatile offensive lineman with an exceptional work ethic, already college football material. The challenge? He’s from a small Indiana town and struggles to get noticed by recruiters. Join Coach Jesse and Richard as they bond over fishing and an old-fashioned Indiana demolition derby, discussing strategies to build Richard’s football future with Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: With over 30 scholarship offers and a place in his high school’s Hall of Fame, Mario Eugenio embodies the rewards of hard work and dedication. But what happens when plans go awry? Find out as Country Ball follows his story.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This week is all about health and wellness. Kyle Reyes is back with Nuethix for an inspection into the inner workings of their company.. and his health. Then, the team gets a closer look at Dr. Price’s chiropractor practice and his unique start to the vitamin operations game. Then, get your questions about Clear Water quenched as we take a deeper dive into the company and their global legacy. To cap off the episode, two A-Team members head over to check out Stream2Sea’s innovative factory.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Today, Kevin and Toli sit down with a new batch of business owners looking to grow and thrive. This first business owner is the heart of America personified. Mark Baylis founded Valor for struggling veterans around America and now it’s time for the A-team to help him scale his mission to reach more patriots in need. From there, the team touch base with a rough and tumble businessman who brings bespoke adventure experiences to life. After that, the pioneers of STAYCA VACA bring their niche business model to the team for evaluation. Then, Compliant Tech caps off the day with a shock to the system.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail meet with the team at Advanced Vitality to explore the cutting edge of preventative healthcare. With over 60% of Americans facing accelerated cellular aging, the company is looking to scale fast—and needs the right strategy to do it. Next, Cindy from Scout & Zoe’s joins the conversation to share how her insect-based dog treats are creating buzz in the pet industry. Her clever and down-to-earth grassroots marketing approach (pun intended) is changing the game for alternative protein sources. Finally, Kevin and Toli sit down with leaders from Hammer Haag Steel and Zenith Trek to dive into the challenges and opportunities of building complex, large-scale equipment and structures.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: The A-Team gets back to work—this time diving into cross-marketing strategies for Advanced Vitality. Over at Hammer Haag, the team discusses launching a gritty new “Micro Dirty Jobs” miniseries to spotlight American manufacturing in action. We’re also introduced to serial entrepreneur Jeff Kline, founder of 1-800-Medigap, who brings a powerhouse presence to the team’s growing roster. Meanwhile, Cindy from Scout & Zoe’s returns for a full brand overhaul with the experts. Newest A-Team member Rudy Mawer steps in with high-level influencer insight and a mission to empower the next generation of entrepreneurs. And finally, Zenith Trek makes bold moves to break into big box retail—with the A-Team guiding the way.

programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: In this episode, the contestants are off and running, putting what they've learned so far into practice and reaping the rewards. Now it's your turn! Learn what these pros have been learning and how you can use it to improve the value of your home and the safety and happiness of your life.

programme.title: Real Man TV
programme.desc: In the last episode, Kyle took to the skies; now it’s the seas. Co-host Josh Peterson joins Kyle on a deep sea fishing excursion that ends in one of them losing their lunch.. but who will it be? Later (after everyone’s cleaned up) the gang reconvenes for a legendary course of fire with some serious artillery.. and Bob.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Coach Jesse heads to Little Rock Arkansas, home of the famous Pulaski Academy and super-star high school football coach, Coach Kelly. The player? Joe Himon. With NFL speed and skills already, a heart of gold and courage to match, Joe has yet to commit and be recognized as the top rated recruit he should be. Find out what advice and help Coach Jesse has for Joe in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: In the season premiere of Farm Hero, host Laura Zaspel scours the country for the best farming practices and the people behind them. Her search winds her up in Gunnison Colorado at Parker pastures. Bill Parker and his daughters are fighting desertification with their grass-fed livestock. Using a collaboration with local farmers, Bill fights against the stigma of livestock farming with a holistic approach. Parker pastures breathes new air into the concept of farm-to-table.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Ever-increasing rainfall, coupled with monocultural farming, is eradicating the topsoil in Iowa farms. With an estimate that all topsoil in the area will be gone within 35 years, the race is on to change farming culture. Elizabeth Garst and her farm are at the forefront of the fight to educate farmers and the public on the necessity of cover crops and soil health. Elizabeth’s ancestors turned Dust Bowl land into a thriving farm with morals, and she’s not stopping there.

programme.title: Real Man TV
programme.desc: Ziplining in Colorado’s Gorges, free falls and donuts. The Real Man show is back in full swing in Colorado. Kyle is joined by special guests and American Patriots as he explores what thrills and adventures this amazing country has to offer. And he’s just getting started.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Missing

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Climbing to the top, literally! In this episode, you better put your fear of heights away. The contestants have the option to earn extra points, but not everyone is happy about it. Mental strength is tested through rappelling from high above the sky. Who will come out on top?

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: After a grueling night braving the elements, the second half of the challenge continues. The All-Stars and Space Cowboys are pushed to the limit when they are tasked with fabricating their own survival structures. Then, catastrophe strikes on the rope climbs, a timber hitch tests the group’s endurance and the day finishes off with Uncle Sam’s Misguided Children’s stress course. Will the All-Stars make it through? Only time will tell.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Planks, Don! Don gave the contestants an option to earn extra points for planking. How does this shake up the top points earners? And of course, there’s shooting challenges. First, Don puts the contestants through realistic military training for a car ambush scenario. Then, three-time state champion, Renee Enchautegui, takes the 32 on a night-time shooting challenge.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: As the mission gets closer, the 32 must prepare for various scenarios, including CQB - Close Quarters Battle - which can be essential in hostage rescue. Watch the live-fire CQB drill teams and see how they stack up. Plus Don & Randy give the top competitors one last chance to rack up BIG points with another 700 yard Roll-The-Dice Pinnacle Shot. Find out who won... and who lost, in this episode of Surviving Mann.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: It's mission time! The clock is ticking and our hostage's demise is imminent, unless the team can get him out in time. Watch the mission unfold and whether the team succeeds fully in this, the season finale of Surviving Mann. As the mission concludes, see who of the 32 Survived Mann, who came out on top and reminisce with the cast as they say goodbye to the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: With the contestants narrowed down to 32, Don Mann and Randy Couture reveal a new twist that changes the game: a complex point system that turns survival into a strategic battle. Contestants face grueling military training and a brutal 5K run through Nevada’s desert, testing their endurance and mental toughness. As mentors and adversaries, Don and Randy push the contestants to their limits. This episode marks the beginning of an intense journey where only the strongest and most strategic will prevail.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Season 3 of Surviving Mann starts with no time wasted... straight to PT. The contestants are thrown straight into physical training, to determine where everyone lies and how to properly group them into the iconic Black and Blue Surviving Mann teams. From Olympic athletes to cast favorites, these eight competitors are ready to prove what they’ve got.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: Surviving Mann Season 1 thrilled with action, adventure, and good old-fashioned American determination. But, before Season 2 arrives, Don has a new challenge for the best of the best. In All-Stars the top 3 Surviving Mann contestants face off against 3 elite special ops veterans in a 50-hour no-sleep marathon battle of endurance, skill, and willpower. Do the All-Stars have what it takes to take on these spec ops legends? Find in Surviving Mann: All-Stars.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The challenges have only gotten started. In episode two, the teams must go beyond their limits to come out on top. From the brutal Blah line to building their own shelters with only a small ax, it’s a battle for scoring points and survival that’ll test these elite competitors like never before.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: A Finnish defense course tests the contestants' marksmanship and combat medical training. Later, Don serves dinner with a twist. To cap off the competition, the two teams face off in a sniper hide “cat and mouse” challenge. Find out who wins this legendary All Star competition.

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: The Knights will face their biggest challenge yet. There be giants.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: With over 30 scholarship offers and a place in his high school’s Hall of Fame, Mario Eugenio embodies the rewards of hard work and dedication. But what happens when plans go awry? Find out as Country Ball follows his story.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Kayleb Wagner, Florida’s all-time record-breaking running back from a football recruitment powerhouse state. On September 17, 2021, Kayleb shattered the state rushing record previously held by Derrick Henry—Alabama alum, now a Tennessee Titan and one of the NFL’s most dominant running backs. As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? Despite his athletic and academic excellence, Kayleb has one arm. Join Country Ball to hear Kayleb’s journey through his own words and those of his inspiring mom, Sam, exploring where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and where he’s headed.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: The first part of the season finale starts now. Jesse’s back on his home turf of Clearwater, Florida, at Clearwater Academy International with not one, but TWO of his top players: Luca Stanzani and Dylan Djeté – who’ve both been playing football since they were little. Dylan’s a family-oriented player who got five touchdowns across his first two games in America. Luca’s been CAI’s starting quarterback since eighth grade and has both the brains and the dedication to go far. See just what these players can do in this episode of Country Ball!

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: It’s the finale of Country Ball season one. Through their journey, Dylan and Luca have become brothers. With Jesse’s help, they’ll show just how much they’ve grown as players. Get ready to cheer for some incredible football. You’re not going to want to miss this!

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: Overconfidence can doom a season and the Knights meet their biggest obstacle of the year. Were they ready or not? Why was Coach Jesse so upset on Halloween night?

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Kayleb Wagner, Florida’s all-time record-breaking running back from a football recruitment powerhouse state. On September 17, 2021, Kayleb shattered the state rushing record previously held by Derrick Henry—Alabama alum, now a Tennessee Titan and one of the NFL’s most dominant running backs. As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? Despite his athletic and academic excellence, Kayleb has one arm. Join Country Ball to hear Kayleb’s journey through his own words and those of his inspiring mom, Sam, exploring where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and where he’s headed.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Country Ball Coach Jesse Chinchar kicks off the first season of Country Ball in the heartland of football — Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. His first challenge is to help Cole Weightman - a powerful yet unknown linebacker who reminds many of another great Pittsburgh linebacker — Jack Lambert of the Steelers fame. What lessons and tactics does Jesse have to help Cole get his first offer? And how will Coach Jesse fare when he adventures with Cole and his family? Find out in the premier episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: The Knights continue down the path to victory. Their journey must include team growth and bonding. Friendships and trust develop as the team goes through hardships such as injuries and new players. Along the way, we learn more about them, why they work so well together, whom they’ve lost, and how they’ve charged forth in spite of it all. Oh, and there’s rain, lots of rain. Meet the team and hear their stories. They will excite you, move you and make you think about things you didn’t expect out of a sports documentary. Its original score, also composed and performed by the students, will have you tapping your feet as you root for the Knights.

What lessons and tactics does Jesse have to help Cole get his first offer? And how will Coach Jesse fare when he adventures with Cole and his family? Find out in the premier episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Coach Jesse heads to Little Rock Arkansas, home of the famous Pulaski Academy and super-star high school football coach, Coach Kelly. The player? Joe Himon. With NFL speed and skills already, a heart of gold and courage to match, Joe has yet to commit and be recognized as the top rated recruit he should be. Find out what advice and help Coach Jesse has for Joe in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.desc: The Knights will face their biggest challenge yet. There be giants.

programme.desc: Meet Ryan Nolan, a hardworking, talented play-maker with integrity and intelligence to match. Unfortunately, at only 5’ 9”, his size has kept him off of many coaches' radar. Find out what strategies Coach Jesse has for Ryan to help him get scholarship offers and follow them on their shooting adventure as they compete to see who’s the fastest shot in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Richard Myers is a versatile offensive lineman with an exceptional work ethic, already college football material. The challenge? He’s from a small Indiana town and struggles to get noticed by recruiters. Join Coach Jesse and Richard as they bond over fishing and an old-fashioned Indiana demolition derby, discussing strategies to build Richard’s football future with Country Ball.
