programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: The first episode of The Big Reveal kicks off with a bang or rather, a jolt, as Compliant Technologies premieres their newest gadget for pioneering the safety of police officers and civilians alike. Next, Kevin Harrington meets with two individuals that Unlock Math for children around the world. Later, Sheriff Mark Lamb sits down with Bonnie from Off Duty Police Officers for a look at her streamlining systems.

programme.title: Real Man TV
programme.desc: In the last episode, Kyle took to the skies; now it’s the seas. Co-host Josh Peterson joins Kyle on a deep sea fishing excursion that ends in one of them losing their lunch.. but who will it be? Later (after everyone’s cleaned up) the gang reconvenes for a legendary course of fire with some serious artillery.. and Bob.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: For the first time in Surviving Mann history, the contestants undergo intense combat training led by none other than Ken Shamrock—"the most dangerous man in the world." His relentless situation drills push this elite group beyond their limits, sharpening their instincts and forging next-level tactical readiness. As a new mission begins to take shape, the pressure mounts—and the team learns that the strongest among them will earn a game-changing reward. But in a world where every edge matters, not everyone is built to keep up. Fatigue sets in, tensions rise, and the difference between teammate and competitor begins to blur. With Shamrock watching closely, only the most disciplined will rise to meet the challenge—and prove they’re worthy of what lies ahead.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: In the Season 2 premiere of Surviving Mann you'll meet The Black Team and The Blue Team—12 tough-as-nails contestants who will take on everything Don could throw at them even after seeing Season 1! Co-host Sheriff Mark Lamb jumps in to bring advanced law enforcement training tactics & strategies to the evolution line-up.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Episode 2 is star-studded and action-packed! Get ready for amazing celebrity guests; and you know Don and Sheriff Lamb won't be giving the contestants a break. The challenges keep coming as SAR USA brings in a former FBI agent & trainer to put our contestants through an adrenaline-pumping exercise. Will all the contestants make it through the day? Watch now to find out!

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: A group of 5 All Star contestants were chosen to embark on an adventure overseas, but what they didn’t know is that it would become a maritime mission. Radio Host Kerri Kasem and rockstar Ashba join Don as he breaks the news to the contestants that there’s more to this yacht than a pleasure cruise. If they thought that this trip was going to be smooth sailing, they soon realized how mistaken they were when Don hit them with the hardest physical evolution in Surviving Mann’s history.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Brace yourself for an edge-of-your-seat Tyrolean traverse (a horizontal ladder) over—and occasionally plunging into—the alligator occupied lake. Then, watch as our celebrity shooters and s

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: If the previous day wasn’t physically challenging enough, Donn kicks off this episode with a mad dash for individual points. Next, the contestants and celebrity guests are tested with a unique course of fire. As an added treat, a Black-Hawk-Down pilot and war hero introduces the contestants to “The Glove”.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Mann announces a reconnaissance and surveillance mission is imminent. The contestants are then tasked with electing a mission commander, while another top-notch competitor joins their ranks. Next, it’s not a day on Surviving Mann without a little physical training and a unique course of fire equipped with a folding AR.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Don tests the competitors with the most grueling Log PT in the history of Surviving Mann and Surviving Mann All-Stars. From there, a brand new Cobalt rifle makes the new course of fire a breeze.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The legendary Black Rambo returns to help the crew with an all new weapons system. A new course of fire, combined with some survival training, challenges the contestants’ mission readiness. After that, the contestants are instructed on how to build a shelter from a survival expert among their ranks.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The contestants are T-minus one day out from the critical mission and the heat is on. But before that, it wouldn’t be a Surviving Mann episode without some intensive PT. With a crash-course on how to build a sniper’s hide under their belts, the teams get their chance to get their hands dirty.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The day begins with a powerful dose of perspective as contestants hear real-life breaching stories from American heroes—reminders of the stakes they’re preparing for. The team is then introduced to a concealed firearm headrest safe designed for rapid-response vehicle defense. Next, it’s straight into the action with a preliminary course of fire using GreenLight sights, where top performers are pushed even further with a bonus round to test speed, accuracy, and composure under pressure. The intensity ramps up during a sentry scenario featuring SABRE CO₂ non-lethal cartridges, putting their stealth and judgment to the test. But just as the dust begins to settle, a new CIA briefing drops—and it’s the most dire yet. With mission reality closing in fast, the contestants close the day with a crash course in S.E.R.E. (Survival, Evasion, Resistance, and Escape) training, rounding out their classroom combat readiness with hard-earned grit.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: After a grueling night braving the elements, the second half of the challenge continues. The All-Stars and Space Cowboys are pushed to the limit when they are tasked with fabricating their own survival structures. Then, catastrophe strikes on the rope climbs, a timber hitch tests the group’s endurance and the day finishes off with Uncle Sam’s Misguided Children’s stress course. Will the All-Stars make it through? Only time will tell.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: A Finnish defense course tests the contestants' marksmanship and combat medical training. Later, Don serves dinner with a twist. To cap off the competition, the two teams face off in a sniper hide “cat and mouse” challenge. Find out who wins this legendary All Star competition.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: The rain simulator is up and running and the results are shocking. But where do we go from here? How do we fix what’s broken and return to farming with Mother Nature and not against it? Wayne Swanson in Chattanooga Tennessee has some answers. This special episode of Farm Hero highlights the important mission American farmers are on tackling to protect and revitalize our soil… with the help of some Swiss Army Bugs.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: The first episode of The Big Reveal kicks off with a bang or rather, a jolt, as Compliant Technologies premieres their newest gadget for pioneering the safety of police officers and civilians alike. Next, Kevin Harrington meets with two individuals that Unlock Math for children around the world. Later, Sheriff Mark Lamb sits down with Bonnie from Off Duty Police Officers for a look at her streamlining systems.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: The Big Reveal does it again by bringing three very different entrepreneurs together, all connected by their pioneer spirit. Flag Guard tips off this episode by explaining how they’re doing their part in keeping your loved ones safe. After that, Dr. West explains how his revolutionary probiotic will fix your digestive health 100% of the time. Host Kevin Harrington then caps off this episode in style with a trip to Tommasina Eyewear’s studio with a peak behind the curtain.

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: In Like a Train, the award-winning documentary that began as a student film project, you will follow the Clearwater Knights, a high school football team determined to have a perfect, undefeated season and to have fun doing it. Wit

programme.title: Country Ball

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: In the premiere of Fortress, Sheriff Mark Lamb and co-hosts explore America’s urgent need for security—both personal and societal. They meet a passionate team turning donated land into a homestead that feeds and shelters trafficking survivors. Then, CCW Safe steps in to showcase how legal protection for concealed carriers can be the line between justice and ruin. Powerful stories of resilience, protection, and purpose unfold in this compelling first episode.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: Surviving Mann Season 1 thrilled with action, adventure, and good old-fashioned American determination. But, before Season 2 arrives, Don has a new challenge for the best of the best. In All-Stars the top 3 Surviving Mann contestants face off against 3 elite special ops veterans in a 50-hour no-sleep marathon battle of endurance, skill, and willpower. Do the All-Stars have what it takes to take on these spec ops legends? Find in Surviving Mann: All-Stars.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The challenges have only gotten started. In episode two, the teams must go beyond their limits to come out on top. From the brutal Blah line to building their own shelters with only a small ax, it’s a battle for scoring points and survival that’ll test these elite competitors like never before.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: With over 30 scholarship offers and a place in his high school’s Hall of Fame, Mario Eugenio embodies the rewards of hard work and dedication. But what happens when plans go awry? Find out as Country Ball follows his story.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Missing

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: It’s time to break down what the A-Team has learned from our latest group of companies—and how we can best support them in reaching their goals. Today, the spotlight is on A-Team member Larry Ward of Market Rithm. This seasoned CEO has seen it all when it comes to marketing strategy—and he’s got the accolades to prove it. Now, he’s setting his sights on helping businesses gain a competitive edge in their marketing efforts. Next, we’re introduced to another powerhouse on Kevin’s team: Nate Bailey, founder of Unleash the Leader Within. Nate brings a dynamic, personalized approach to scaling businesses that have often been overlooked. Rounding out this insightful roundtable discussion are A-Team members Chandler Kline from PICMII Crowdfunding and podcaster Dr. Jason Dean, each contributing their own unique areas of expertise.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: We’re back with Valor Clinic to take a deeper look at the inner workings of their foundation, which supports financially struggling veterans. Watch how these dedicated Americans are giving back to their fellow patriots in a big way. Fair warning—Mark’s work at Valor Clinic is a true tearjerker. Next, we take a quick trip to the tropics to catch Aggressor Adventures in action. Kyle Reyes checks in with owner Wayne for an update on how he’s been implementing the A-Team’s sage advice. After saying goodbye to Wayne, the team visits another incredible destination to reconnect with the founders of STAYCA VACAY. To wrap things up, Kyle Reyes stops by Compliant Technologies to experience their innovative product firsthand. And of course, we wouldn’t leave without a live demo of their shockingly advanced invention—The G.L.O.V.E.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: In this episode of Wildshots, host Tim Harmsen heads to Sig Sauer for an exclusive look inside one of America’s most advanced firearms manufacturing facilities. With a motto of “Every day you wake up and get a little better,” Sig Sauer lives up to its words—producing over 5,000 firearms a day with cutting-edge robotics and precision automation. After a full factory tour, Tim hits Sig’s state-of-the-art testing range to get hands-on with the legendary XM250 machine gun, pushing the limits of modern firepower. Then it’s time for some pure shooting mastery as Tim meets up with friend and firearms influencer 22Plinkster. Known for his unbelievable accuracy and showmanship, 22Plinkster ups the ante—splitting playing cards with a .22 bullet, upside down, and even splitting a single bullet mid-flight to hit two separate targets at once. Finally, the episode caps off with a nod to Hollywood as Tim checks out the Genesis Arms machinery seen in John Wick, blending cinematic cool with real-world firepower.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: With over 30 scholarship offers and a place in his high school’s Hall of Fame, Mario Eugenio embodies the rewards of hard work and dedication. But what happens when plans go awry? Find out as Country Ball follows his story.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Back by unpopular demand, the infamous “Blah Line” returns—and it’s more brutal than ever. The contestants kick off the day with a hellish PT session that leaves bodies broken and spirits tested. Things only get rougher from there with a punishing stealth crawl over jagged rocks, grinding them down before they face Ken Shamrock’s infamous Lion’s Den training—a relentless gauntlet of pain, grit, and raw endurance. As Don Mann continues to forge a battle-ready team, the squad is thrown into breaching drills designed for high-stakes mission execution. It’s chaos, it’s calculated, and it separates the contenders from the pretenders. In the heat of the action, two standouts emerge from the ranks—earning the coveted role of designated breachers.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Bar Fight De-escalation - S13E3
programme.desc: David defends his son from a knife-wielding drinker, trains in reading intent and verbal commands.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Truck Kidnap Rescue - S13E4
programme.desc: Joe stops carjackers from abducting his niece. He trains angles, cover and priority evacuation.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Ambushed at the Door - S13E5
programme.desc: Trent is distracted and ambushed for his car keys. He trains situational awareness and movement.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Held Up at the Car - S13E6
programme.desc: Laura aids a friend against armed robbers. She trains fanny pack draw and distraction techniques.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Fender-Bender Execution - S13E7
programme.desc: Wesley steps in when a fender-bender escalates out of control. Maintaining distance is highlighted.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Sidewalk Cafe Robbery - S13E8
programme.desc: Chris stops a robbery at an outdoor cafe. He trains concealment techniques, timing and restraint.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Naked Home Invader - S13E9
programme.desc: Chris confronts an erratic, naked intruder. He trains verbal de-escalation and maintain distance.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - Desert Eagle 1911s & More - S6E8
programme.desc: Magnum Research showcases new Desert Eagle 1911s including the compact Undercover 3-inch alloy model.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - Ruger American Rimfire - S6E9

programme.title: Guns & Gear - Springfield RO Compact 1911 - S6E10
programme.desc: Springfield’s Range Officer Compact 1911 delivers a 4-inch bull barrel, thin grips and fiber optic sights.

programme.desc: Timney’s Calvin Elite trigger drops into Remington 700, adjustable from 8 oz to 2.5 lbs.

programme.desc: SIG Sauer launches consistent V-Crown pistol ammo in 9mm, .40, .45, .357 SIG & .380 with perfect expansion.

programme.desc: Timney upgrades the Ruger American rifle. Double Tap Safari ammo. Polycase polymer-copper defensive rounds.

programme.desc: Bill defends his granddaughter from attack. Distraction and de-escalation are covered in training.

programme.desc: Paul stops a brutal beating in a store. Training includes closing the distance and shot placement. (79 chars)

programme.title: First Person Defender - Gas Station Robbery - S13E15
programme.desc: Kameron stops armed robbers in the store. Waiting for an opening and backroom safety are trained.

programme.desc: Arianna defends her dad from and armed man at the Pizza Hat and learns shooting aftermath aid.

programme.title: Remember Who You Are
programme.desc: When you know who you are, you won't worry. As God's child, you're crowned with favor; He's got you!

programme.title: Your Destiny is Calling
programme.desc: Discover the greatness within you! You're meant for more, and God is ready to take you higher!

programme.title: It's Already Yours
programme.desc: God has blessings already prepared with your name on them. You're about to reach a new level of His favor.

programme.title: Call Out The King In You
programme.desc: Each one of us has a King on the inside. Only God can show you how to let that king reign in your life.

programme.title: Living Joyful
programme.desc: Feeling weighed down? You can access God's joy no matter your circumstances!

programme.title: High Time
programme.desc: You're closer to your dreams than you think. Expect the new things God will do!

programme.title: Who's The Boss?
programme.desc: Letting feelings rule limits your potential. Choose discipline, and God will pour out His favor on you!

programme.title: Dropped But Not Forgotten
programme.desc: Moments of disappointment may come, but they can't stop your destiny. God wants to restore what’s lost!

programme.title: Disconnect From Discord
programme.desc: Your time is too valuable for those who sow discord. Stay on the high road, and God will help you thrive!

programme.title: Grace For Gethsemane
programme.desc: Divine strength can help navigate personal Gethsemane moments and find peace amidst turmoil.

programme.title: No More Bad Days
programme.desc: Life is 10% what happens to you and 90% how you respond. You get to decide how you respond. Choose Joy.

programme.title: Something New Is Coming
programme.desc: You weren't created to stay at the same level. God has new blessings for you, but you must let go of the past.

programme.title: Sleep On
programme.desc: God uses frustrating situations to help us grow. Learn to handle difficulties and find peace within!

programme.title: Get Ready For Overflow
programme.desc: You weren't meant to just get by. God wants you to have abundance to bless others. Get ready for overflow!

programme.title: Easier Than You Think
programme.desc: God is going before you to arrange things in your favor, making what you can't achieve on your own!

programme.title: Under Construction
programme.desc: God knows how to work things out in your favor. No struggle can stop the incredible plan He has for you.

programme.title: Seasons Of Silence
programme.desc: You may be in a hidden season, but God hasn't forgotten you. Stay in faith, He'll prepare you for blessings.

programme.title: Invite God In Your Difficulties
programme.desc: Sometimes you must face difficulty to see the miracle. Invite God into the storm; He'll give you peace!

programme.title: Upstream Blessings
programme.desc: To see upstream blessings, you need downstream faith. Your prayer set the miracle in motion.

programme.title: Release Control
programme.desc: Let go of what you can't control to find peace. Trust God to work all things together for your good!

programme.title: Daily Direction
programme.desc: "God wants to be part of your daily life. Ask Him for guidance, and He'll lead you to your destiny!"

programme.title: Purify Yourself
programme.desc: It's easy to go through life carrying things that are poisoning us. We must release these to grow and prosper.

programme.title: Acceleration
programme.desc: We serve a supernatural God. He knows how to accelerate your dreams and arrange things in your favor.

programme.title: Stay On The Potter's Wheel
programme.desc: God uses uncomfortable moments to prepare you for promotion and refine your character for His blessings!

programme.title: It's The Heart That Matters
programme.desc: Mistakes don't disqualify you from God's purpose. Turn to Him, and He'll take you from glory to glory!

programme.title: Keep Strife Out Of Your Life
programme.desc: To live in peace and victory, keep strife out of relationships. Create peace, and God will bless you!

programme.title: The Second Touch
programme.desc: Feeling limited? A second touch from God is coming. It will renew your passion and fulfill your destiny!

programme.title: Today Is Your Day
programme.desc: True faith means expecting God's favor now. Start each day expecting His goodness!

programme.title: Favor Connections
programme.desc: If you want to become who God called you to be, surround yourself with people who call you higher.

programme.title: Pruned For Promotion
programme.desc: Pruning is essential for growth. Trust God during these times; He's preparing you for greater fruit.

programme.title: Just Obey
programme.desc: God longs to guide you daily, listen to His voice, and He'll lead you to favor, promotion, and blessings.

programme.title: The Power Of Favor
programme.desc: God's favor can take you further than you imagine. Expect to see His hand of favor in your life today.

programme.title: The Guardian Of Your Soul
programme.desc: Even against impossible odds, remember you're not alone. God is your protector and guardian.

programme.title: Invisible But Invaluable
programme.desc: Use your talents to help others rise, and God will promote you. You'll reap what you sow in their lives!

programme.title: It's Not Over
programme.desc: God wants to fill your future with blessings. Your greatest victories are still ahead!

programme.title: Make The Switch
programme.desc: God desires your healing. Believe in His will for your wholeness. Receive His healing!

programme.title: Become A Miracle
programme.desc: Bless others to set your own miracle in motion; your destiny is tied to helping those around you!

programme.title: Positioned For Increase
programme.desc: When something ends, it signals something better is coming. Don't be discouraged; God is opening new doors!

programme.title: Prosper Where You're Planted
programme.desc: Sometimes God keeps you in trouble to bless you within it. You don't have to wait to see His favor!

programme.title: An Atmosphere Of Praise
programme.desc: Praise attracts favor, healing, and abundance, inviting God to show up in your life. Create that atmosphere!

programme.title: Better Together
programme.desc: "To reach your potential, develop your relationships. Unity prepares you for the incredible future God has!"

programme.title: Blessed Indeed
programme.desc: Sometimes, we miss bigger blessings by asking too small. Dare to pray for the uncommon and believe for more!

programme.title: Calling Over Comfort
programme.desc: God may call you to leave the familiar for the unknown. Push past fear, and He'll make the impossible happen.

programme.title: Expecting A Favor-Filled Future
programme.desc: God's favor is not for a season; it's for a lifetime. Live each day expecting His goodness over your life.

programme.title: Redeem The Time
programme.desc: If we want to reach our highest potential, we have to live each day with purpose. You are a person of destiny!

programme.title: Win The War Within
programme.desc: Every day, we choose between settling or doing the right thing. That discomfort is a sign God is calling you.

programme.title: The Right Mirror
programme.desc: To reach your full potential, see yourself as God sees you. He calls you valuable, talented, and worthy.

programme.title: You Are Not A Victim
programme.desc: No unfair situation can block your destiny. God will turn what was meant for harm into your advantage!

programme.title: Time Is On Your Side
programme.desc: It may feel like you've lost time, but God knows how to restore you and make up for what you lost.

programme.title: The God Who Overrules
programme.desc: What stopped you before won't stop you now. God can overturn any negativity and deliver you from it!

programme.title: Knowing You Are Loved
programme.desc: No mistake can cancel God's amazing plan for your life. His love is unconditional; just receive it!

programme.title: Dealing With Negative Thoughts
programme.desc: Our thoughts can limit or empower us. Focus on God's promises to be empowered to reach your destiny.

programme.title: Stay Positive Toward Yourself
programme.desc: Our words are powerful. Speak in faith, and you'll usher in God's blessings, favor, and abundance!

programme.title: A Healthy Soul
programme.desc: A healthy soul allows God's grace to help you flourish. Release bitterness and worry for new blessings.

programme.title: Remember What God Said
programme.desc: Under pressure, focus on what you think. Dismiss negativity and remember God's promises will come to pass.

programme.title: Gladly Welcomed
programme.desc: God's approval of you is not based on your performance. He welcomes you gladly because you are His child.

programme.title: Blessings Prepared For You
programme.desc: God has blessings lined up for your future. When He favors you, nothing can stop the good in store!

programme.title: Choose To Be Happy
programme.desc: Expecting God's favor with a faith-filled attitude allows Him to do incredible things in your life.

programme.title: Coming Out Better
programme.desc: Facing sickness or heartbreak? God will bring you out better and help you become an overcomer.

programme.title: Your Destiny Outweights Your History
programme.desc: What God has for your future is greater than your past. He'll bring you out better than before!

programme.title: The Good Who Exceeds Expectations
programme.desc: What God has planned for you is greater than anything you've ever dreamed.

programme.title: The Right People
programme.desc: Choose your inner circle wisely. Walk with the wise to become wise and reach your God-given potential!

programme.title: Living Guilt Free
programme.desc: You weren't made to carry shame from your past. Through Jesus, you can walk in God's mercy daily!

programme.title: Pulled Strings
programme.desc: Don't worry about your future. God is orchestrating your steps and those of others for your good.

programme.title: Your Wings Are Coming
programme.desc: Like a caterpillar, you may feel in the dark, but you're being transformed. Your wings are coming!

programme.title: Breaking Negative Cycles
programme.desc: God has equipped you to break negative family cycles and set a new standard for future generations.

programme.title: Your Time To Reign
programme.desc: When God created you, He crowned you with favor to overcome obstacles. Trouble is temporary, reign is coming.

programme.title: The Blessing And The Burden
programme.desc: Don't waste the gift of today by wishing for tomorrow. Each season has its own blessings to enjoy.

programme.title: Seeing Beyond The Logical
programme.desc: God is not limited by your circumstances. When you agree with Him, He makes things happen beyond the natural.

programme.title: Anchored To Hope
programme.desc: Stay anchored to hope. God will lead you to brighter days and blessings beyond what you can imagine.

programme.title: A Public Display
programme.desc: God works behind the scenes, but sometimes His goodness is publicly displayed. Get ready for your season.

programme.title: Make Room For More
programme.desc: We must remember its God who wants to increase us and enlarge our vision and take us to the next level.

programme.title: By This Time Next Year
programme.desc: Even when you see no change, God is working behind the scenes. Get ready for Him to show out in your life.

programme.title: A Never Doubt Mindset
programme.desc: Never doubt what God can do. He always exceeds our limited mindset.Have a never doubt mindset.

programme.title: Commanded To Be Blessed
programme.desc: Nothing can stop God's blessing in your life. One touch of His favor will get you where you belong!

programme.title: God Given Desires
programme.desc: Put God first, and He'll inspire dreams that lead you to your destiny. Trust Him to guide your path.

programme.title: Tell Yourself A New Story
programme.desc: God is the author of your story. If you agree with Him, He will take you further than you can go alone.

programme.title: It's Not What You Think
programme.desc: What is God doing behind the scenes? We only know what we see, the natural. Gods works in the supernatural.

programme.title: Nothing Missing
programme.desc: What limited you in the past won't limit your future. When God restores, nothing in your life will be missing!

programme.title: Your Reputation Is In God's Hands
programme.desc: God knows how to vindicate you. If you'll stay on the high road, He will fight your battles for you.

programme.title: Counted By The Creator
programme.desc: You're not limited by your past or opinions. God made you worthy and fully equipped you!

programme.title: Keep On Walking
programme.desc: Waiting for dreams can be discouraging, but God is working. Believe, and you'll see shifts in your favor.

programme.title: It's Too Small
programme.desc: May God bless you abundantly! Pray bigger, expand your vision, and see His favor take you further!

programme.title: Listening To The Whisper
programme.desc: God places promptings in our hearts to guide us. That still, small voice is Him leading you on the best path.

programme.title: Over And Above Blessings
programme.desc: God gave of himself generously and desires that we would follow His example and look for ways to bless others.

programme.title: Peace With Yourself
programme.desc: Don't go through life at war with yourself, focusing on the negative. See yourself victorious like God does.

programme.title: Rebooting
programme.desc: In waiting seasons, God is rebooting you for new things. Let go of the old and embrace His plan.

programme.title: Sing To The Promise
programme.desc: Just as a seed needs water, God's promises need your faith to grow. Stand in faith for His promises!

programme.title: Your Father's World
programme.desc: God knew you before your birth and has planned your days. He created you for more than ordinary.

programme.title: God Is Your Source
programme.desc: God provides resources, but He is our true Source. Trust Him to supply all your needs through Christ!

programme.title: Daily Renewal
programme.desc: Every morning you need a daily renewal. Release all the toxins from the day before.

programme.title: Divine Surprises
programme.desc: What God has planned for you is more rewarding than you can imagine.

programme.title: Promotion In The Problem
programme.desc: Every difficulty is a setup for God to do something new. He uses it to your advantage.

programme.title: Rewire Your Brain
programme.desc: Rewire your brain to use God's decryption of yourself, your situations your family. Rewire and renew.

programme.title: Celebrate Partial Victories
programme.desc: Focus on celebrating small victories to stay motivated, not just the goals you haven't achieved.

programme.title: Dealing With Ugly Situations
programme.desc: You couldn't become who you were created to be without the hard times. Don't fight it. Embrace it.

programme.title: Living Cause Driven
programme.desc: Your destiny's next level is tied to helping others. Get involved, and you'll see God's favor anew!

programme.title: Approval Addiction
programme.desc: Don't let fear of others' opinions hold you back. You have Almighty God's approval, not theirs.

programme.title: Time To Try Again
programme.desc: Just because it hasn't happened yet doesn't mean it's not going to happen. God gives strength over setbacks.

programme.title: Deaf To The Negative
programme.desc: To reach your destiny, become deaf to negativity. Don't let others' unbelief deter you from God's promises.

programme.title: Have A Positive Mindset
programme.desc: To become all God created you to be, you need the right mindset. Believe to release your faith!

programme.title: Ready To Rise
programme.desc: Difficult seasons aren't final. You're about to rise again to places beyond your imagination.

programme.title: Don't Get Sidetracked
programme.desc: This day is a gift from God. We have a responsibility to live focused, making the most of it.

programme.title: Just The Opposite
programme.desc: Joel Osteen encourages embracing challenges, as they often lead to unexpected breakthroughs.

programme.title: Overcoming Weariness
programme.desc: Don't let weariness block your blessings. Let God strengthen you in every area of your life!

programme.title: I Will Not Fear
programme.desc: Strength comes from faith and the assurance that we are never alone in facing life's challenges.

programme.title: Be Happy Where You Are
programme.desc: Putting conditions on your happiness only leads to delays in being happy. Focus on the blessings in life now.

programme.title: How Bad Do You Want It?
programme.desc: Your will is incredibly powerful. When you decide to act, God will breathe life into your efforts.

programme.title: Fast Forward
programme.desc: God can accelerate your destiny; what seems far off will happen sooner than you think.

programme.title: Enviable Enemies
programme.desc: We must be aware our battle is not with people or things but the spiritual forces behind them.

programme.title: The Fight For Your Future
programme.desc: Opposition often signals greatness within you. Setbacks are attacks, but God is working. Victory is coming!

programme.title: Rest From Your Enemies
programme.desc: Your past limits don't define your future. Let Joel help you break barriers and find rest from enemies!

programme.title: Ease Is Coming
programme.desc: We all go through seasons of struggle. Keep trusting God because ease is coming.

programme.title: Distinctive Favor
programme.desc: God's favor brings prosperity even in hard times. The greatest force breathes in your direction!

programme.title: You've Been Chosen
programme.desc: Before you were born, God chose and equipped you with all you need to fulfill His calling on your life.

programme.title: Blessed In The Dark Places
programme.desc: God can use difficult seasons to take you to new levels. He knows how to turn the trial to your advantage.

programme.title: Time To Stop Running
programme.desc: God will give you grace to confront the difficult things. Beyond that giant is a new level of destiny.

programme.title: It Has to Go Back
programme.desc: What seems permanent isn't final. God has the last sayï¿½your story isn't over, and trouble won't prosper.

programme.title: Trusting God's Ways
programme.desc: Believe that God's wisdom surpasses our understanding and leads us toward a purposeful life.

programme.title: The Power of No
programme.desc: What you say "no" to has as much impact as what you say "yes" to. No to compromise. No to people pleasing.

programme.title: Turn Off The Flow
programme.desc: Turn off negativity and cultivate a positive mindset to focus on what truly matters.

programme.title: Letting Go Of Control
programme.desc: Your breakthrough is coming. Even when nothing changes, trust God's timing. His promises will come to pass!

programme.title: You Have A Defender
programme.desc: Let God be your defender. Don't waste energy on wrongs. Trust Him to fight your battles and protect you!

programme.title: Power for Your Purpose
programme.desc: God knows every difficulty you will face. He wound not allow it to happen if it would stop your purpose.

programme.title: You Are Enough
programme.desc: It's easy to feel lacking, but God gave you the right personality and talent to reach your destiny!

programme.title: Overflow With Hope
programme.desc: Overflowing with hope brings expectancy. Even unseen, trust that God will do something extraordinary!

programme.title: Thank God Before The Promise
programme.desc: Prayers and faith set miracles into motion, God is always at work behind the scenes.

programme.title: Choose A Good Mood
programme.desc: Feelings don't shape your destiny. Fill your mind with faith and victory, and the right feelings follow.

programme.title: He'll Do It Again
programme.desc: Use what God has done in your life and the Bible as reference points, when believing God for the future.

programme.title: Protect Your Peace
programme.desc: You can remain in peace during challenges by trusting God. His peace is available to you today.

programme.title: Build Your Altar
programme.desc: Recognizing God's goodness opens the door for more favor. Take time to remember His blessings.

programme.title: Hearing In Your Spirit
programme.desc: Often, God speaks what contradicts our sight. If you listen with spiritual ears, His promises will prevail.
